</div>


                        </div>
                        <div class="backlink-type-container" id="advancedBacklink">
                            <div class="placement-content">
                                <div class="row steps backlink-step">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-4 flex-wrap">
        <div class="col-md-4">
            <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Step 1 of 3: <span class="text-dark-70">Choose your domain (min. 2)</span></p>
        </div>
        <div class="col-md-8">
            <div class="d-md-flex flex-column flex-md-row w-MIN_BACKLINK_DOMAIN0 justify-content-between align-items-center">
                <p class="s-700 s-m-700 text-dark-40 m-0 mb-3 mb-md-0 align-content-start" id="total-domains">Showing 127 domain(s)</p>
                <div class="d-flex gap-sm-3 gap-1 flex-column flex-sm-row">
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <span class="input-group-text background-white" id="search">
                            <i class="bx bx-search"></i>
                        </span>
                        <input type="text" id="search-domain" class="form-control b2-400 p-m-400" placeholder="Search by domain name" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="search">
                    </div>
                    <button class="d-md-none btn button-gray-20 b2-400 b2-m-400" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#filterModal">Filter</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row inner-container m-0">
        <div class="col-12 col-md-4">
            <div class="modal fade" id="filterModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="filterModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-scrollable" id="filterContent">
        <div class="modal-content border-0">
            <div class="modal-header d-md-none">
                <div class="modal-title s-700 text-dark-70" id="filterModalLabel">Filter</div>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body" id="filterBody">
                <div class="filter-container b1-500 b1-m-500 text-dark-70">
                    <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 d-none d-md-block">Filter</p>
                    <div class="accordion" id="accordionFilter">
                        <input class="form-check-input" name="domain-category" type="hidden" value="all" id="all" checked="">
                        <div class="accordion-item">
                            <p class="accordion-header">
                                <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseOne" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="collapseOne">
                                    Domain Type                                </button>
                            </p>
                            <div id="collapseOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse show">
                                <div class="accordion-body px-1 py-2">
                                    <div class="form-check">
                                        <input class="form-check-input" name="domain-category" type="checkbox" value="all" id="all" checked="">
                                        <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="all">
                                            All                                        </label>
                                    </div>
                                                                                                                        <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-category" type="checkbox" checked="" name="domain-category" value="1" id="domain-category-1">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-category-1">
                                                    Big Media
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-category" type="checkbox" checked="" name="domain-category" value="2" id="domain-category-2">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-category-2">
                                                    High Quality Media
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-category" type="checkbox" checked="" name="domain-category" value="3" id="domain-category-3">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-category-3">
                                                    Local Media
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                                            </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="accordion-item">
                            <p class="accordion-header">
                                <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400 collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseTwo" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseTwo">
                                    Niche / category                                </button>
                            </p>
                            <div id="collapseTwo" class="accordion-collapse collapse">
                                <div class="accordion-body px-1 py-2">
                                    <div class="form-check">
                                        <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="all" id="all_category" checked="">
                                        <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="all_category">
                                            All                                        </label>
                                    </div>
                                                                                                                        <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-topic" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="1" id="domain-topic-1" checked="">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-topic-1">
                                                    National News
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-topic" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="2" id="domain-topic-2" checked="">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-topic-2">
                                                    Local News
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-topic" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="3" id="domain-topic-3" checked="">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-topic-3">
                                                    Life Style/Health/Entertainment
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-topic" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="4" id="domain-topic-4" checked="">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-topic-4">
                                                    Otomotif/Sport
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-topic" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="5" id="domain-topic-5" checked="">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-topic-5">
                                                    Technology
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                    <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input domain-topic" type="checkbox" name="domain-topic" value="6" id="domain-topic-6" checked="">
                                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="domain-topic-6">
                                                    Business/Market
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                                                                                            </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="accordion-item">
                            <p class="accordion-header">
                                <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400 collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapseThree" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseThree">
                                    Advanced Specs                                </button>
                            </p>
                            <div id="collapseThree" class="accordion-collapse collapse">
                                <div class="accordion-body px-1 py-2" id="advanced-specs-container">
                                    <div class="advanced-specs">
                                        <p class="text-dark-30 xs-700 xs-m-700 text-uppercase m-0">Majestic Score</p>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="tf_score" class="form-label">TF</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter majesticScore-tf" name="tf-start" id="majesticScore-tf" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter majesticScore-tf" name="tf-end" id="majesticScore-tf" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="cf_score" class="form-label">CF</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter majesticScore-tf" name="cf-start" id="majesticScore-cf" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter majesticScore-cf" name="cf-end" id="majesticScore-cf" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="advanced-specs">
                                        <p class="text-dark-30 xs-700 xs-m-700 text-uppercase m-0">Moz Score</p>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="domain_authority" class="form-label">Domain Authority</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="text" class="form-control score-filter moz-domainAuthority" name="dau-start" id="moz-domainAuthority" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="text" class="form-control score-filter moz-domainAuthority" name="dau-end" id="moz-domainAuthority" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="page_authority" class="form-label">Page Authority</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter moz-pageAuthority" name="pau-start" id="moz-pageAuthority" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter moz-pageAuthority" name="pau-end" id="moz-pageAuthority" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="spam_score" class="form-label">Spam Score</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center">
                                                <select name="" id="" class="form-select">
                                                    <option value="&gt;">&gt;</option>
                                                    <option value="&gt;=">&gt;=</option>
                                                    <option value="&lt;">
                                                        &lt; </option>
                                                    <option value="&lt;="> &lt;= </option>
                                                    <option value="=">=</option>
                                                </select>
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter" id="moz-spamScore" placeholder="3">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="advanced-specs">
                                        <p class="text-dark-30 xs-700 xs-m-700 text-uppercase m-0">Ahrefs Score</p>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="ahrefs_dr_score" class="form-label">DR</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter aHrefsScore-dr" name="dr-start" id="aHrefsScore-dr" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter aHrefsScore-dr" name="dr-end" id="aHrefsScore-dr" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="ahrefs_ur_score" class="form-label">UR</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter aHrefsScore-ur" name="ahref-ur-start" id="aHrefsScore-ur" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter aHrefsScore-ur" name="ahref-ur-end" id="aHrefsScore-ur" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="advanced-specs">
                                        <p class="text-dark-30 xs-700 xs-m-700 text-uppercase m-0">Similarweb Score</p>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="similarWebScore-dr" class="form-label">DR</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter similarWebScore-dr" name="similarity-dr-start" id="similarWebScore-dr" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter similarWebScore-dr" name="similarity-dr-end" id="similarWebScore-dr" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div>
                                            <label for="similarweb_ur_score" class="form-label">UR</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter similarWebScore-ur" name="similarity-ur-start" id="similarWebScore-ur" placeholder="Start range" value="0">
                                                -
                                                <input type="number" class="form-control score-filter similarWebScore-ur" name="similarity-ur-end" id="similarWebScore-ur" placeholder="End range" value="100">
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="position-sticky d-flex flex-column set-button-container">
                                        <button class="btn button-primary-130 score-filter-button" data-bs-dismiss="modal" id="score-filter-button">Set score</button>

                                        <button id="resetButton" class="d-none btn p-0 text-decoration-underline s-400 s-m-400 text-gray-110 mt-2">Reset
                                            score filter</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

        </div>
        <div class="p-0 col-12 col-md-8 d-flex flex-column justify-content-between gap-3">
            
            <div class="media-container flex-grow-1 m-0 ">
                <div class="row h-100" id="domain-list"><div class="col-6 col-sm-3 col-lg-3">
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/backlink/domain/2024/04/22/d3vhHt2ud1ZQ0gPP0l1RVlsy8lNhdEFjukJNu6rO.png" alt="Kompas TV" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="Kompas TV" id="Kompas TV" value="1" hidden="">
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">Kompas TV</p>
                                </div></div><div class="col-6 col-sm-3 col-lg-3">
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/backlink/domain/2024/04/22/BLZMl7YJM4fSSqkuXlN7075Dx4dwZyB2bjWbHBX5.png" alt="Kompasiana" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="Kompasiana" id="Kompasiana" value="2" hidden="">
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">Kompasiana</p>
                                </div></div><div class="col-6 col-sm-3 col-lg-3">
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/backlink/domain/2024/04/22/9p3bmwRCTZFf0IuG8GwWMWkCmInaOAccfA3ZCpan.png" alt="Tribun News" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="Tribun News" id="Tribun News" value="3" hidden="">
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">Tribun News</p>
                                </div></div><div class="col-6 col-sm-3 col-lg-3">
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/backlink/domain/2024/04/22/ec06chzmY2ATEWgrjpX5PFgOI1hQOqdv7WWpqpEm.png" alt="Grid" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="Grid" id="Grid" value="4" hidden="">
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">Grid</p>
                                </div></div><div class="col-6 col-sm-3 col-lg-3">
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/backlink/domain/2024/04/22/082m59lYHkPUtMHZt2cnqYv62GSH3cjRnGkiOLHC.png" alt="Grid Oto" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="Grid Oto" id="Grid Oto" value="5" hidden="">
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">Grid Oto</p>
                                </div></div><div class="col-6 col-sm-3 col-lg-3">
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/backlink/domain/2024/04/22/OWFfqY6LUHCgqtsCmgZeigv6QiFwFACZQEmKDb1c.png" alt="Detik" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>

                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="marketeers" id="marketeers" value="151" hidden="">

        </div>
    </div>
    <div>
        <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row gap-3 justify-content-between align-items-lg-center mt-3">
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center justify-content-lg-end">
                <div class="form-check">
                    <input class="form-check-input read-tnc step-1" type="checkbox" value="" id="read">
                    <label class="form-check-label b2-400 b1-m-400 mt-1" for="read">
                        I have read <a href="#" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#tnc-modal" class="text-primary-70 text-decoration-none">Terms &amp; Conditions</a>
                    </label>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center justify-content-between">
                <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-dark-70 m-0" id="selectedStatus">
                    <span id="total-selected-domains">No domain(s) selected</span>
                    <span id="qualified" class="d-none">, qualified to continue</span>
                    <span onclick="removeSelected(this)" id="clear-selected-domains" class="text-decoration-underline text-primary-70 d-none" style="cursor: pointer">Clear selected</span>
                </p>

                <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-danger-70 m-0" id="errorTnc" style="display: none">
                    You have to read Terms &amp; Conditions                </p>


                <button class="btn button-primary-70 p-400 p-m-400" id="button-step-1" onclick="nextStep(1)" disabled="">
                    Continue                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

                                <div class="row steps backlink-step d-none">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between col-12 mb-4 align-items-center">
        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40 mb-4">Step 2 of 3: <span class="text-dark-70">Define Backlink Specification</span></p>
        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end align-items-center">
            <div class="gap-2 align-items-center d-none">
                <button class="btn p-400 p-m-400 button-gray-20" onclick="prevStep(1)">
                    Back                </button>
                <button class="btn p-400 p-m-400 button-primary-70 button-step-2" onclick="nextStep(2)" disabled="">
                    Continue                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row inner-container m-0">
        <div class="col-12 col-sm-6 selected-domain-container">
            <div class="selected-domains">
                <p class="s-400 s-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70" id="selected-domain-total">Domain Total: 0</p>
                <nav class="nav-backlink-domain d-sm-none">
                    <div class="nav nav-tabs" id="nav-tab-domain" role="tablist">
                        <button class="flex-1 b2-400 b2-m-400 count count-saved nav-link" id="nav-saved-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#nav-saved" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="nav-saved" aria-selected="true"></button>
                        <button class="flex-1 b2-400 b2-m-400 count count-empty nav-link" id="nav-empty-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#nav-empty" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="nav-empty" aria-selected="false"></button>
                        <button class="flex-1 b2-400 b2-m-400 count count-draft nav-link" id="nav-draft-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#nav-draft" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="nav-draft" aria-selected="false"></button>
                    </div>
                </nav>
                <div class="accordion b1-500 b1-m-500 text-dark-70 tab-content" id="accordionFilter">
                    <div class="accordion-item tab-pane fade show active" id="nav-saved" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="nav-home-tab">
                        <p class="accordion-header d-sm-block d-none">
                            <button class="accordion-button count b1-400 b1-m-400 count-saved" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#saved-domains" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="saved-domains">
                                Saved (0)
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="saved-domains" class="accordion-collapse count collapse show">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <div class="media-container selected-domains">
                                    <div class="row flex-nowrap flex-md-wrap" id="saved-selected-domain-list">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item mt-lg-3 tab-pane fade show active" id="nav-empty" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="nav-home-tab">
                        <p class="accordion-header d-sm-block d-none">
                            <button class="accordion-button count b1-400 b1-m-400 count-empty" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#empty-domains" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="empty-domains">
                                Empty (0)
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="empty-domains" class="accordion-collapse count collapse show">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <div class="media-container selected-domains">
                                    <div class="row flex-nowrap flex-md-wrap" id="empty-selected-domain-list">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item mt-lg-3 tab-pane fade show active" id="nav-draft" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="nav-home-tab">
                        <p class="accordion-header d-sm-block d-none">
                            <button class="accordion-button count b1-400 b1-m-400 count-draft" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#draft-domains" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="draft-domains">
                                Draft (0)
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="draft-domains" class="accordion-collapse count collapse show">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <div class="media-container selected-domains">
                                    <div class="row flex-nowrap flex-md-wrap" id="draft-selected-domain-list">
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-12 col-sm-6 text-dark-60 mt-4 mt-lg-0 text-center p-400 p-m-400 mb-3 mb-lg-0 domain-spec-container position-relative" id="selected-domain-order">
            Please select a domain        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="d-flex justify-content-end align-items-center mt-3 gap-3">
        <p id="qualified-step-2" class="b2-400 b2-m-400 mb-0 d-none">All domain specs completed. You're qualified to continue.</p>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center">
            <button class="btn p-400 p-m-400 button-gray-20" onclick="prevStep(1)">
                Back            </button>
            <button class="btn p-400 p-m-400 button-primary-70 button-step-2" onclick="nextStep(2)" disabled="">
                Continue            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

                                <div class="row steps backlink-step d-none">
    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between col-12 mb-4 align-items-center">
        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40 mb-4">Step 3 of 3: <span class="text-dark-70">Payment</span></p>
        <div class="d-flex justify-content-end align-items-center">
            <div class="gap-2 align-items-center d-none">
                <button class="btn p-400 p-m-400 button-gray-20" onclick="prevStep(2)">
                    Back                </button>
                <button class="btn p-400 p-m-400 button-primary-70 button-step-2" disabled="" onclick="backlinkDomainCheckout()">
                    Checkout                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="row inner-container m-0">
        <div class="col-12 col-sm-6">
            <div class="preview-container">
                <div class="preview-domains">
                    <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0 text-dark-70">Backlink Plan Preview</p>
                    <div class="preview-domain-detail">
                        <div class="preview-header">
                            <p class="b2-500 b2-m-500 m-0">Domain Selected <span class="text-dark-10" id="total-selected-domains-step-3">(0)</span></p>
                        </div>
                        <div class="preview-content overflow-auto">
                            <div class="row flex-nowrap flex-md-wrap" id="review-selected-domains">
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="preview-spec text-center p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-60">
                    Please select a domain                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col-12 col-sm-6 position-relative">
            <div class="position-sticky top-0">
                <div class="checkout">
                </div>
                <p class="text-dark-40 b2-400 b2-m-400 mt-2">(*) The price shown is the accumulated price of all domains. We do not display the price of each domain due to national media policies.</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-end align-items-md-center flex-column flex-md-row gap-3 mt-3">
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mt-4 align-self-start">
            <div class="form-check">
                <input class="form-check-input read-tnc step-3" type="checkbox" value="" id="read-step3">
                <label class="form-check-label b2-400 b1-m-400 mt-1" for="read-step3">
                    I have read <a href="#" data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#tnc-modal" class="text-primary-70 text-decoration-none">Terms &amp; Conditions</a>
                </label>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center">
            <button class="btn button-gray-20 p-400 p-m-400" onclick="prevStep(2)">
                Back            </button>
            <button class="btn button-primary-70 p-400 p-m-400 checkout-btn" onclick="backlinkDomainCheckout()" disabled="">
                Checkout            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

                                <div class="row justify-content-center steps d-none">
    <div class="col-12">
        <div class="payment-container">
            <div class="payment-header">
                <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0">Pay before 24 March 2023 09:31 AM</p>
                <p id="total-fee" class="h6-700 h6-m-700 m-0 text-primary-70">IDR 7,700,000</p>
                <p id="virtual-account-number"></p>
            </div>

            <div class="payment-body">
                <div class="accordion" id="paymentAccordion">
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header">
                            <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#bank" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="bank">
                                <i class="bx bxs-bank"></i>
                                Bank Tansfer
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="bank" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" data-bs-parent="#paymentAccordion">
                            <div class="accordion-body overflow-auto">
                                <div class="row flex-nowrap flex-md-wrap g-4">
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="mandiri" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/mandiri.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="mandiri" onclick="requestXendit('VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT', 'MANDIRI')">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="bni" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/bni.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="bni">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="permata" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/permata.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="permata">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="bca" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/bca.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="bca">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="bri" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/bri.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="bri">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="bjb" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/bjb.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="bjb">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="bsi" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/bsi.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="bsi">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="bank_choice" value="bri" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/bri.webp" class="img-fluid" alt="bri">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header">
                            <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400 collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#credit" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="credit">
                                <i class="bx bx-credit-card"></i>
                                Credit Card
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="credit" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#paymentAccordion">
                            <div class="accordion-body overflow-auto">
                                <form action="#" class="row g-4">
                                    <div class="col-12">
                                        <label for="card_number" class="form-label b2-400 b1-m-400">Card Number</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="card_number" placeholder="1234-5678-9012">
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6">
                                        <label for="card_valid" class="form-label b2-400 b1-m-400">Valid Until</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="card_valid" placeholder="MM/YY">
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6">
                                        <label for="card_cvv" class="form-label b2-400 b1-m-400">CVV</label>
                                        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="card_cvv" placeholder="000">
                                    </div>
                                </form>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header">
                            <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400 collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#qris" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="qris">
                                <i class="bx bx-barcode"></i>
                                QRIS
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="qris" class="accordion-collapse collapse" data-bs-parent="#paymentAccordion">
                            <div class="accordion-body overflow-auto">
                                <div class="row flex-nowrap flex-md-wrap g-4">
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="ewallet_choice" value="ovo" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/ovo.png" class="img-fluid" alt="ovo">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="ewallet_choice" value="spay" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/spay.png" class="img-fluid" alt="spay">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="ewallet_choice" value="dana" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/dana.png" class="img-fluid" alt="dana">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="ewallet_choice" value="linkaja" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/linkaja.png" class="img-fluid" alt="linkaja">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="col-6 col-md-3 col-lg-2">
                                        <div class="img-container">
                                            <input type="radio" name="ewallet_choice" value="astra" hidden="">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/banks/astra.png" class="img-fluid" alt="astra">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="payment-footer">
                <button class="btn button-gray-20 p-400 p-m-400" onclick="prevStep(3)">
                    Back
                </button>
                
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <hr class="w-100 m-0">
                    <div class="backlink-placement-footer">
                        
                        <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-dark-40 m-0">Interested in selling your domain or blogger to us? Submit your domain <a href="#" id="openModal" class="text-primary-70 text-decoration-underline">Submit New Domain</a></p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal fade" id="submit-domain-modal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="submit-domain-modalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <form action="https://cmlabs.co/page/api/backlink-domain" method="POST" class="modal-dialog modal-lg modal-dialog-centered modal-dialog-scrollable">
        <input type="hidden" name="_token" value="kOnJafLPPFelut7xaR7b4IqztVrjE5Z9g8hAdH8i">        <div class="modal-content" style="border-radius: 8px">
            <div class="modal-header background-gray-20">
                <div class="modal-title" id="submit-domain-modalLabel">Submit New Domain</div>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body d-flex flex-column gap-3">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="url" class="form-label b1-400 b1-m-400">E-mail<span class="text-danger-70">*</span></label>
                    <input type="email" class="form-control b1-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain" id="email" value="" placeholder="eg: yourmail@example.om" name="email" required="">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="url" class="form-label b1-400 b1-m-400">Name<span class="text-danger-70">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" class="form-control b1-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain" id="name" placeholder="eg: Mary Jane" name="name" value="" required="">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="url" class="form-label b1-400 b1-m-400">Phone Number<span class="text-danger-70">*</span></label>
                    <div class="row valid-control">
                        <div class="col-4 col-md-3">
                            <select class="form-select b1-400 b1-m-400" name="phone_code">
                                <option value="62" selected="">(+62)</option>
                                <option value="65">(+65)</option>
                                <option value="60">(+60)</option>
                                <option value="66">(+66)</option>
                                <option value="63">(+63)</option>
                                <option value="84">(+84)</option>
                                <option value="61">(+61)</option>
                                <option value="7">(+7)</option>
                                <option value="44">(+44)</option>
                                <option value="1">(+1)</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="col">
                            <input type="tel" name="phone_number" class="form-control valid-control shadow-none b1-400 b1-m-400" placeholder="81234567890">
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="url" class="form-label b1-400 b1-m-400">Domain Name<span class="text-danger-70">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" class="form-control b1-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain" id="domain-name" placeholder="eg: cmlabs" name="domain_name" required="">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="url" class="form-label b1-400 b1-m-400">Domain URL<span class="text-danger-70">*</span></label>
                             <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                    <input type="text" class="form-control b1-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain" id="domain-url" placeholder="eg: www.cmlabs.co" name="domain_url" required="">
                         <button type="button" class="button-primary-70 flex-shrink-0" id="who-is-check" disabled="">Who is check</button>
                     </div>
                      <div class="whois-feedback text-success-70 mt-2 s-400 d-none" id="whois-true">
                        <i class="bx bx-check-circle"></i> Domain found
                    </div>
                    <div class="whois-feedback text-danger-70 mt-2 s-400 d-none" id="whois-false">
                        <i class="bx bx-x-circle"></i> Domain not found
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer background-gray-20">
                <button type="button" class="btn button-gray-20" data-bs-dismiss="modal">Cancel</button>
                <button type="submit" id="button-submit-domain" class="btn button-primary-70" disabled="">Submit</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>
    <div class="modal fade" id="tnc-modal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="tnc-modalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg modal-dialog-centered modal-dialog-scrollable">
        <div class="modal-content text-dark-70">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <div class="modal-title" id="tnc-modalLabel">Terms &amp; Conditions</div>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body">
                                    <div class="main__paragraph seo-terms-content">
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc1"><strong>WELCOME TO CMLABS!</strong></p>
    <p>Thank you for using our services and SEO tools. The tools and services are provided by <strong>PT. cmlabs
            Indonesia Digital</strong>, located at Jl. Pluit Kencana Raya No.63, Pluit, Penjaringan, North Jakarta,
        Indonesia. By using our SEO tools and services, you agree to these terms. Please read carefully.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc2"><strong>USING CMLABS</strong></p>
    <p>Using cmlabs, does not give you ownership of any intellectual property rights in our services or the content you
        access. The services and fees that we provide are an agreement of both parties.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc3"><strong>DESCRIPTION OF CMLABS' SERVICES AND SEO TOOLS</strong></p>
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>Services</strong></p>
    <p>Services available in cmlabs (SEO Services, SEO Content Writing, SEO Expert Writing, Media Buying, and SEO For
        Political Campaign), can be adjusted with suggestions from cmlabs, according to your needs, and of course with
        your consent. Services from cmlabs, SEO Services, SEO Content Writing, and SEO Expert Writing are available for
        all countries in Southeast Asia, Australia, the US, the UK, and Kazakhstan, while Media Buying &amp; SEO For
        Political Campaign are only available for the Indonesian market.</p>
    <p>SEO Services is a service for doing consultation to optimize the SEO function on your website. We will help you
        optimize your SEO on-page, technical, and off-page, as well as improve the quality performance website on search
        engines.</p>
    <p>SEO Content Writing is a content creation service in the form of articles with SEO-friendly standards that we
        will properly provide for you. You can adjust the number of words you want with a minimum of 750 words to more
        than 3000 words per article. If you want to have more knowledge about SEO-friendly content, we can provide the
        best advice for you, of course with approval from both parties (you &amp; cmlabs).</p>
    <p>SEO Expert Writing offers a writing solution designed for those seeking verified content produced by our reliable
        specialists in various subjects. This service aims to bridge the divide between SEO-optimized content and
        exceptional subject matter proficiency. Our assurance ensures that content quality remains excellent. In the
        event of any challenges during the writing process, we maintain ongoing communication with you as a
        collaborator.</p>
    <p>Media Buying is a service we provide to help your placement or publish articles that you make into an online
        publisher and blogger. We have a lifetime guarantee of publishing articles in online media, but if there are
        problems in publishing the article, we will report to you regularly regarding this matter.</p>
    <p>SEO for Political Campaign is a service intended for political parties or candidates who need to run for office.
        We provide full SEO services on all sides, including technical and on-page optimization. Additionally, we also
        provide content writing services and media buying to boost your website’s position on the SERP.</p>
    <!-- <p>Backlink to National Media is a service where clients will get a brand mention and the website's link included in the article written by reputable publishers so that clients can generate more website traffic.</p>
    <p>Backlink is a service that aims to help clients gain more website traffic from relevant websites references. In cmlabs, clients are not able to choose the websites, instead cmlabs team will find the right website that is fit to client's business based on research.</p> -->
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>SEO Tools</strong></p>
    <p><strong>SEO Tools</strong> are provided for content writers (Word Counter, Title and Meta Description Checker &amp; Crawler, Plagiarism Checker) as well as for SEOs and Webmasters (JSON-LD Generator, Page Speed Test, Sitemap XML Generator, Mobile-Friendly Test, SSL Certificate Checker, Robots. TXT Generator, Ping Tool, HTTP Header Checker, Robots.TXT Checker, SERP Simulator, Meta Generator) can be used for free via <strong>cmlabs'</strong> website, which is based on your needs.</p>
    
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc4"><strong>YOUR ACCOUNT REGISTRATION OBLIGATION</strong></p>
    <p>As a registered user of <strong>cmlabs'</strong> SEO tools, you represent that you are old enough to make a
        binding contract. You also agree to: </p>
    <ol type="a">
        <li>provide true, accurate, current, and complete information about yourself and your company as requested by
            the service registration form ("registration data") </li>
        <li>maintain and promptly update the registration data to keep it true, accurate, current, and complete. If you
            provide information that is untrue, inaccurate, not current or incomplete, or <strong>cmlabs</strong> has
            reasonable reasons to suspect that the information is untrue, inaccurate, not current, or incomplete,
            <strong>cmlabs</strong> reserves the right to suspend or terminate your account and refuse any current or
            future use of the service.</li>
    </ol>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc5"><strong>NOT PERMITTED TO REDISTRIBUTE CMLABS' SERVICES AND SEO TOOLS</strong></p>
    <p>You are permitted to use our services and SEO Tools internally within the company analysis to optimize your
        website and related campaigns.</p>
    <p>You agree not to reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, trade, resell, modify, create derivative works, or exploit for
        any commercial purposes, any part of the services, or SEO Tools. You are responsible for all use of the services
        and SEO Tools that uses your account and are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your online
        account credentials.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc6"><strong>ACCOUNT ACCESS ON CMLABS' SERVICES AND SEO TOOLS</strong></p>
    <!-- <p class="mt-3"><strong>Services &amp; SEO Tools</strong></p>
    <p>In Services &amp; SEO Tools no personal information is needed about yourself and/or your company because you don't need to register an account to use our services and SEO Tools.</p> -->
    
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc7"><strong>EMAIL MARKETING</strong></p>
    <p>By registering for an account at <strong>cmlabs</strong> you allow us to send notification messages to the email
        address you specified upon registration.</p>
    <p>This email notification may include new features, <strong>cmlabs'</strong> updates, system messages, tips and
        tutorials on using <strong>cmlabs</strong> tools.</p>
    <p>You are also given the option to subscribe to the <strong>cmlabs'</strong> website to follow information about
        promotions and weekly updates from the <strong>cmlabs</strong> blog, you are not required to complete the
        registration process. Please note that you can take out one of these optional emails at any time by clicking the
        'Unsubscribe' link included at the bottom of every email we send to you.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc8"><strong>ILLEGAL / UNAUTHORIZED USERS</strong></p>
    <p>Account registration must be done by humans. Accounts registered by "bots" or other automated methods are not
        permitted.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc9"><strong>UNAUTHORIZED USER</strong></p>
    <p>You may not modify, adapt, or hack services and SEO Tools or modify websites other to indirectly imply that it is
        related to services and SEO Tools, or <strong>cmlabs</strong>. You may not reverse engineer object code or reuse
        source code provided in connection with services and SEO Tools. This includes JavaScript. The code is copyright
        <strong>cmlabs</strong>. You must not transmit worms or viruses or anything of a destructive or dangerous
        nature. You agree not to change any code provided in connection with services and SEO tools in any way or form,
        or to use modified versions of the code, including (without limitation) to illegally gain access to services and
        <strong>cmlabs'</strong> SEO tools. You agree not to access services and SEO tools in any way other than through
        the interface provided by <strong>cmlabs</strong> for use in accessing services and SEO tools. All ways that are
        detected to be improper or attempt to violate the law to access our services, SEO tools, websites, servers or
        databases including through any automated means such as crawlers or bots are prohibited. We may stop, suspend
        and/or block your access if we find that your use of or access to our services and SEO tools violates our terms.
        Subject to the other limitations stated herein, you may only use automated tools to access our services via the
        Application Program Interface (API) we provide.</p>
    <p>You must not attempt to bypass any functionality or access features on the website directly by using a special
        HTTP (or other) call or attempt to manipulate the service or access it in a manner other than in a manner that
        would be considered by normal permitted use.</p>
    <p>You should not try to take advantage of any features that some people consider to be obvious omissions or errors
        on the services, SEO tools, and websites.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc10"><strong>IP ADDRESS BLOCKING</strong></p>
    <p>To protect the integrity of our services and SEO Tools, <strong>cmlabs</strong> reserves the right at its sole
        discretion to block registrants and customers from certain IP addresses from accessing our services and SEO
        Tools.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc11"><strong>REGISTRATION AND SUBSCRIPTION</strong></p>
    <p>You can register for services without paying (SEO Tools),</p>
    <p>Some of our SEO tools such as Word Counter, Title and Meta Description Checker, JSON-LD Generator, and Keyword
        Permutation do not require the user to register. While the rest of the tools will require the user to register
        after the maximum free usage is reached.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc12"><strong>REFUND POLICY</strong></p>
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>Services</strong></p>
    <p><strong>cmlabs</strong> not obligated to provide refunds for the services we have. Amounts paid (or the
        equivalent in your local currency) agreed by both parties are non-refundable.</p>
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>SEO Tools</strong></p>
    <p>In SEO Tools, there will be no refunds because these tools are free and can be accessed by anyone, anytime and
        anywhere.</p>
    
    <!-- <p class="mt-5" id="tnc13"><b>SERVICES AND PRODUCT</b></p> -->
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>Cancellation</strong></p>
    <p><strong>cmlabs</strong> is entitled to unilateral service and SEO Tools cancellation in the following
        circumstances, and if you violate any of the following terms;</p>
    <ul>
        <li>We detect unusual usage patterns related to services and SEO tools;</li>
        <li>You are trying to cause damage or damage our reputation, work or services or SEO tools;</li>
        <li>Respond to requests from law enforcement or other public agencies.</li>
        <li>Reproduce, duplicate, copy, sell, trade, resell, modify, create derivative works, or exploit them for any
            commercial purpose.</li>
    </ul>
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>Collection and Use of Data</strong></p>
    <p>You understand and agree that <strong>cmlabs</strong> can anonymize and collect any data that you share with
        services and SEO tools, then use it without identifying you to improve the quality of services and SEO tools.
    </p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc14"><b>MODIFICATIONS to CMLABS' SERVICES AND SEO TOOLS</b></p>
    <p>We are constantly changing and improving the quality of services and SEO Tools from <b>cmlabs</b>.</p>
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>Services</strong></p>
    <p>You cannot stop our work unilaterally from cooperation from cmlabs before the deadline set by both parties
        through the agreement letter. If in the middle of the work period you have a request to modify or add work
        outside the existing agreement, we can do so if agreed by both parties. Of course, this is related to changes in
        cost given and the objectives of your project.</p>
    <p class="mt-3"><strong>SEO Tools</strong></p>
    <p>We may add or remove functionality and features, and we may suspend or stop using SEO Tools at the same time. You
        can stop using SEO Tools at any time, even though we regret your departure.</p>
    <p><strong>cmlabs</strong> may also stop providing services and SEO Tools to you, or add or create new restrictions
        for our services and SEO Tools at any time. You agree that <strong>cmlabs</strong> is not responsible to you or
        any third party for modification, suspension or termination of services and SEO tools.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc15"><strong>LINKS</strong></p>
    <p>Services and SEO Tools can provide links to sites or other resources of the World Wide Web. Because
        <strong>cmlabs</strong> has no control over these sites or resources, you acknowledge and agree that
        <strong>cmlabs is</strong> not responsible for the availability of these external sites or sources, does not
        endorse such websites/sources, and is not responsible or liable for any advertising content, or other materials.
        available from the website. You further acknowledge and agree that <strong>cmlabs is</strong> not responsible or
        liable, directly or indirectly, for any damage or loss caused or suspected to be caused.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc16"><strong>CONTACTING CMLABS</strong></p>
    <p><strong>cmlabs</strong> can be reached by email at marketing@cmlabs.co. By contacting <strong>cmlabs</strong>,
        you give <strong>cmlabs</strong> non-exclusive rights around the world to any ideas, information, designs, or
        other materials contained in any communication, unless you have obtained prior written consent which has been
        authorized. You agree not to provide any commercially sensitive information and data to <strong>cmlabs</strong>
        regarding your operations.</p>
    <p>You accept that information sent to <strong>cmlabs</strong> under any circumstances will not be deemed to be
        subject to any form of confidentiality agreement unless you have obtained the prior written consent of
        <strong>cmlabs</strong>. All parties consider that email is not a safe and secure communication medium. Email is
        only considered to be received by <strong>cmlabs</strong> if you receive a manually generated response.</p>
    <p>All discussions via email are considered to be informal, and should only be considered binding when a valid
        written agreement is made. Any suggestion, mention or reference regarding any changes to the terms of a past,
        present or future by contract <strong>cmlabs</strong> should be considered purely speculative until you have
        valid written confirmation from <strong>cmlabs</strong>.</p>
    <p class="mt-5" id="tnc17"><strong>ABOUT THESE TERMS</strong></p>
    <p>We may change these terms or any additional terms that apply to our services and SEO Tools, for example, to
        reflect changes in the law or changes to our services and SEO Tools. You should periodically view the online
        version of our terms. We will post a notice of modification to these terms on this page. Changes will not be
        retroactive and will take effect no later than seven days after they are posted. However, changes to new
        functionalities for services and SEO Tools or changes made for legal reasons will take effect immediately. If
        you do not agree with our terms of service and SEO Tools you must stop using our services and SEO Tools. These
        terms control the relationship between <strong>cmlabs</strong> and you. They do not create third-party
        beneficiary rights.</p>
    <p>If you do not comply with these terms, and we do not take action immediately, this does not mean that we are
        giving up any rights we may have, such as taking action in the future.</p>
    <p>If any of these terms are deemed invalid, unenforceable, or canceled, the other terms remain valid, enforceable
        and unaffected.</p>
    <p>Section headings in the terms here are for convenience only and have no legal or contractual effect.</p>
    <!-- <p class="mt-5" id="tnc18"><strong>WHAT IS THIS PAGE</strong></p>
    <p>This page consist of a modal or pop up message that lead user to fill a form and allow them to ask for a free demo with cmlabs team related to the functionality and how to operate the analytic tools (product).</p>
    <p>The aim of this modal is to inform the user that they can have a free demo by filling the following form. The target of this modal is everyone that has the interest in tracking the keyword performance of certain websites by using cmlabs Keyword Ranking Tracker.</p>
    <p>The information that cmlabs will collect from each user will consist of company name (required), name (required), position (required), country of origin (required), website address (required), industry sector (required), email address (required), and additional information (optional) if there's any.</p>
    <p>The website behavior : it will appear after the user visits cmlabs in the third times in one session. The modal is only available at homepage. The KPI of this page is when a lot of users can fill the form and the marketing team receives a lot of inquiries, minimum 3 inquiries per-week.</p> -->
</div>
                            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer">
                <button id="aggre-tnc" type="button" class="btn button-primary-70" data-bs-dismiss="modal">I agree</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
    <div class="modal fade" id="submit-email-modal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="submit-email-modalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
    <form method="POST" id="submit-email-form" class="modal-dialog modal-lg modal-dialog-centered modal-dialog-scrollable">
        <input type="hidden" name="_token" value="kOnJafLPPFelut7xaR7b4IqztVrjE5Z9g8hAdH8i">        <div class="modal-content" style="border-radius: 8px">
            <div class="modal-header background-gray-20">
                <div class="modal-title b1-700 b1-m-700" id="submit-email-modalLabel">Receive Updates from Backlink Placement</div>
                <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close"></button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-body d-flex flex-column gap-3">
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400">Submit your email here to get e-mail when this service available for content from external.</p>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="url" class="form-label b1-400 b1-m-400">E-mail<span class="text-danger-70">*</span></label>
                    <input type="email" class="form-control b1-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain" id="email-input" required="" placeholder="eg: yourmail@example.om" name="email">
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-footer background-gray-20">
                <button type="submit" class="btn button-primary-70">Submit</button>
            </div>
    
</div></form>

<script>
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
        const emailForm = document.getElementById('submit-email-form');

        emailForm.addEventListener('submit', function(event) {
            event.preventDefault();

            const emailInput = document.getElementById('email-input');
            const email = emailInput.value;

            const apiUrl = 'https://cmlabs.co/page/api/backlink-domain/subscribe';

            fetch(apiUrl, {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                            .getAttribute('content'),
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        email: email
                    }),
                })
                .then(response => response.json())
                .then(data => {
                    if (data.code == 200) {
                        $("#toast-success").find(".message").html("Your email submitted successfully")
                        $("#toast-success").show()
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            $("#toast-success").hide()
                        }, 3000);
                    } else {
                        $("#toast-error").find(".message").html("An error occurred, please try again later")
                        $("#toast-error").show()
                        setTimeout(function() {
                            $("#toast-error").hide()
                        }, 3000);
                    }
                })
                .catch(error => {
                    console.error(error)
                    $("#toast-error").find(".message").html("An error occurred, please try again later")
                    $("#toast-error").show()
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        $("#toast-error").hide()
                    }, 3000);
                })
                .finally(() => {
                    emailInput.value = ''
                    var myModalEl = document.getElementById('submit-email-modal');
                    var modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(myModalEl)
                    modal.hide();
                });
        });
    });
</script>
</div></section>



        <section class="media-buying-activities" id="what-we-provide">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="title h2-700 h2-m-700 text-dark-70 text-center">See what cmlabs do to ease your activities</div>

                <div class="service-detail">

                        </div>
                        <div class="desc b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">cmlabs PR/branding services ensure the effectiveness of digital marketing strategies through brand mentions in leading media that can provide positive exposure to your website. Your website rank and market share will increase with authoritative brand mentions through various media relevant to your business niche.</div>

</section>

                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="row" colspan="3" class="p-500 p-m-500 text-dark-40 py-3 ps-4">High Quality Media</th>
                                <td class="py-3 px-4">

                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="row" colspan="3" class="p-500 p-m-500 text-dark-40 py-3 ps-4">Big Media</th>
                                <td class="py-3 px-4">

                                </td>
                            </tr>

            <div class="tab-pane fade branding-fade" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="Backlink">
                <div class="pricing-overview-cover">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
                <div class="pricing-detail h-100 d-flex flex-column justify-content-center gap-2">
                    <p class="title h3-700 h3-m-700 text-dark-70">Pricing Overview</p>
                    <p class="desc b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">Clients can choose PR / Branding services according to their brand promotion needs. The approximate price range for our services can be seen on the right. Please note that these prices can change based on the chosen media. Check out the complete information below!</p>
                    <div class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100 branding-readmore">Additional disclaimer applied. <a data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#readmorebranding" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseExample" class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_pricing_overview_learn_more text-primary-70">Read more</a></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
                <div class="pricing-table">
                    <div class="custom-pricing-branding custom-form-table">
                        <div class="d-flex flex-row">
                            <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-fill">
                                <div class="px-4 py-3 gray-20 p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-40" style="font-size: 13px">Local Media</div>
                                <div class="px-4 py-3 p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-40" style="font-size: 13px">High Quality Media</div>
                                <div class="px-4 py-3 gray-20 p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-40" style="font-size: 13px">Big Media</div>
                                <div class="px-4 py-3 p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-40" style="font-size: 13px">Other Media</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="d-flex flex-fill align-items-center justify-content-center" style="background-color: #F3F3F3;">
                                <div class="p-400 p-m-400 dark-70">Regular Price from Media</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- <table id="table-specification" class="table table-borderless custom-form-table desktop">
                        <tbody>
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="row" colspan="3" class="p-500 p-m-500 text-dark-40 py-3 ps-4">Local Media</th>
                                <td class="py-3 px-4 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" rowspan="4" style="background-color: #F3F3F3;">
                                    <div class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70 text-center">Regular Price from Media</div>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="row" colspan="3" class="p-500 p-m-500 text-dark-40 py-3 ps-4">High Quality Media</th>
                         
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="row" colspan="3" class="p-500 p-m-500 text-dark-40 py-3 ps-4">Big Media</th>
                               
                            </tr>
                            <tr>
                                <th scope="row" colspan="3" class="p-500 p-m-500 text-dark-40 py-3 ps-4">Other Media</th>
                                
                            </tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table> -->
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="collapse-wrapper">
                <div class="height-filler"></div>
                <div class="collapse pricing-branding" id="readmorebranding">
                    <div class="background-purple-10 p-3 rounded d-flex first-box">
                        <i class="bx bxs-message-detail bx-sm me-3 mt-1 text-purple-110 "></i> 
                        <div>
                            <p class="h6-3700 h6-m-700 text-purple-110">
                                Some online publishers may arrange the placement of backlinks up to the device level
                            </p>
                            <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                                Some online publishers may arrange the placement of backlinks up to the device level. Why is that? Because technically, some media provide separate URLs between the desktop version and the mobile version.
                                
                            </p>
                            <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                                Even some online publishers set separate prices for each device. We will inform earlier, if specifications like this have been set by the media.
                            </p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="w-100 d-flex flex-row justify-content-end align-items-end gap-2 close-branding">
                        <a class="text-dark-70 text-decoration-none b2-700 b2-m-700 mt-3" data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#readmorebranding" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseExample">Close additional information</a>
                        <i class="bx bx-chevron-up text-yellow-70"></i>
                    </div>
