                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

            </div>
            <section id="workflow"></section>
            <div class="tab-pane fade workflow-backlink show active" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="Backlink">
                <div class="workflow-cover">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <p class="title h3-700 h3-m-700 text-dark-70">Workflow</p>
        <p class="sub-title b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">The trust between us and our clients is very important in this process. We handle deals with clients based on the following work flow:</p>
                <div class="workflow-assets">
            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/pricing/workflow-en.webp" alt="Workflow" class="img-fluid d-none d-md-flex">
        </div>
            </div>
        <div class="workflow-assets">
        <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/pricing/workflow-en.webp" alt="Workflow" class="d-flex d-md-none">
    </div>
        <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="wrapper-info">
            <div class="parent-wrapper">
                <div class="wrapper">
                    <div class="light-blue"></div>
                    <div class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-dark-70">What cmlabs do</div>
                </div>
                <div class="wrapper">
                    <div class="light-dark"></div>
                    <div class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-dark-70">What company / brand do</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-gray-100 d-flex align-items-center additional gap-1">
                Additional disclaimer applied.                <a class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_Work_Flow_Additional_Disclaimer_Read_more read-more-workflow collapsed text-primary-70" data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#readMoreWorkflow" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseExample">Read more</a>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="collapse-wrapper collapse-workflow closed">
            <div class="collapse" id="readMoreWorkflow">
                <div class="height-filler"></div>
                <div class="background-purple-10 p-3 rounded d-flex first-box">
                    <i class="bx bxs-message-detail bx-sm me-3 mt-1 text-purple-110 "></i> 
                    <div>
                        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                            Basically media forums regulate branding activities (or publications that promote brands), one of which is the media that must attach advertorials. Search engine providers also apply the same thing.                        </p>
                        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                            But business development and needs make this opportunity (SEO needs / Backlink activity) maximized by certain groups to get more money.                        </p>
                        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                            So that media companies make arrangements at the second layer (after the publication of a news story) to be audited to check compliance and application of the rules.                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="background-purple-10 p-3 rounded d-flex">
                    <i class="bx bxs-message-detail bx-sm me-3 mt-1 text-purple-110 "></i> 
                    <div>
                        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                            The same rules may also apply to media groups. Considering the rules set in 1 web may also apply in its media network.                        </p>
                        <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110">
                            We cannot be sure of the rules that apply to the hundreds of Online Publisher on the list. Generally we find out when in the “(4) Content Placement” stage.                        </p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="w-100 d-flex flex-row justify-content-end align-items-end gap-2 close-workflow">
                    <a class="text-dark-70 text-decoration-none b2-700 b2-m-700 mt-3" data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#readMoreWorkflow" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseExample">Close additional information</a>
                    <i class="bx bx-chevron-up text-yellow-70"></i>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

            </div>
            <div class="tab-pane fade workflow-branding" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="Backlink">
                <div class="workflow-cover">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="title h3-700 h3-m-700 text-dark-70">Work Flow</div>
        <div class="sub-title b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">The trust between us and our clients is very important in this process. We handle deals with clients based on the following work flow:</div>
                <div class="workflow-assets">
            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/pricing/workflow-branding-en.webp" alt="Workflow" class="img-fluid d-none d-md-flex">
        </div>
            </div>
        <div class="workflow-assets">
        <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/pricing/workflow-branding-en.webp" alt="Workflow" class="d-flex d-md-none">
    </div>
        <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="wrapper-info">
            <div class="parent-wrapper">
                <div class="wrapper">
                    <div class="light-blue"></div>
                    <div class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-dark-70">What cmlabs do</div>
                </div>
                <div class="wrapper">
                    <div class="light-dark"></div>
                    <div class="b2-400 b2-m-400 text-dark-70">What company / brand do</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="our-strategy-cover">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-lg-6">
                <p class="title h3-700 h3-m-700 text-dark-70">Our Strategy</p>
                <p class="sub-title b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">As an in-depth SEO company, we map out a thorough strategy when executing our plan. We ensure that our backlink services are handled according to a well-planned schedule, a technical approach, and content quality maintenance.</p>
                <ul class="nav nav-tabs flex-column" id="myTab" role="tablist">
                    <li class="nav-item active" role="presentation">
                      <button class="nav-link our-strategy-media p-400 p-m-400 dark-70 w-100 text-start active" id="home-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#home" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="home" aria-selected="true">Backlink Placement Schedule</button>
                    </li>
                    <li class="nav-item not-circled" role="presentation">
                      <button class="nav-link our-strategy-media p-400 p-m-400 dark-70 w-100 text-start" id="profile-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#profile" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="profile" aria-selected="false">Technical Approach</button>
                    </li>
                    <li class="nav-item not-circled" role="presentation">
                      <button class="nav-link our-strategy-media p-400 p-m-400 dark-70 w-100 text-start" id="contact-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#contact" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="contact" aria-selected="false">Content Quality Maintenance</button>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </div>
            <div class="col-lg-6">
                <div class="tab-content h-100" id="myTabContent">
                    <div class="tab-pane img h-100 fade show active" id="home" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="home-tab">
                        <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/pricing/backlink-calendar.webp" loading="lazy" class="calendar-cmlabs" alt="Backlink Calendar">
                    </div>
                    <div class="tab-pane fade" id="profile" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="profile-tab">
                        <div class="technical-approach h-100 d-flex flex-column justify-content-center py-3">
                            <ul class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70 m-0">
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> The content quality of the site</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> The relevance of the site</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> Domain authority</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> Anchor text optimization</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> Robots meta tag</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> Page / URL Rank towards relevant keywords</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> Spammy links</li>
                                <li><i class="bx bxs-check-circle"></i> The link position on the content</li>
                            </ul>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="tab-pane fade h-100" id="contact" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="contact-tab">
                        <div class="content-quality d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center h-100">
                            <p align="center" class="b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70">We do not differentiate content production specifically for “backlinks” and “specifically SEO content in general”. Every content that we provide is made with strict quality levels and complies with SEO rules. So that the published backlink content also has the potential to bring in referral traffic.</p>
                            <a href="https://cmlabs.notion.site/SEO-Guidelines-bb8fae2783df4d7b8e9604bd33c19ed7" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer nofollow" class="text-decoration-none button-primary-70 button-outline p-1 rounded b1-400 b1-m-400 text-primary-70">Read more in SEO Guidelines</a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

        <div class="tpc-section background-primary-10">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="tpc-entry-container text-primary-130 row justify-content-between">
            <div class="left-side col-lg-7 col-12">
                <h2 class="h3-700 h3-m-700">Traffic Projection Calculator</h2>
                <p class="h5-500 font-helvetica mt-3 mb-0">Our latest technologies to project website traffic.</p>
                <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/traffic-calculator" class="mktcmlgtm_tpc_start_projection btn px-4 py-3 button-primary-130 h5-700 h5-m-700 mt-4 project-now-btn">Try Projecting</a>
            </div>
            <div class="col-lg-5 col-12 position-relative right-side d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center">
                <img loading="lazy" src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/tpc/illustration-entry-point-tpc.webp" alt="Project Traffic Calculator Illustration" class="calculator-illustration light">
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
        
        <div id="mediaBuyingForm"></div>
        <div id="mediaBuyingForm" class="custom-form-wrapper d-none d-md-block background-gray-20">
    <div class="custom-form-table media-buying">
        <div class="cmlabs-container">
            <div class="mb-4">
                <h2 class="text-center font-size-h2 fw-bold backlinkTitle d-block">
                    Ready to get your quality backlinks?                </h2>
                <h2 class="text-center font-size-h2 fw-bold brandingTitle d-none">
                    Wanna get positive brand mention?                </h2>
            </div>

            <form action="#" method="post" class="media-buying-form">
                <input type="hidden" name="feature" value="quotation">
                <input type="hidden" name="section" value="content-marketing">
                <input type="hidden" name="category" value="media-buying">
                <input type="hidden" name="priority" value="1">
                <input type="hidden" name="url" value="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/pricing/media-buying">
                <input type="hidden" name="locale" value="en">
                <input type="hidden" name="data[form]" placeholder="Media-buying" value="Media-buying" class="form-control">
                <table class="table table-borderless custom-form-table desktop">
                    <!-- backlink type -->
                    <tbody><tr>
                        <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">Backlink type*                        </th>
                        <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-4">
                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                        <input class="form-check-input mt-0 form-required form-required-desktop" type="checkbox" name="data[type]" id="check_online_publisher" value="online_publisher">
                                        <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="check_online_publisher">
                                            Online publisher (media)                                        </label>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                        <input class="form-check-input mt-0 form-required form-required-desktop" type="checkbox" name="data[type]" id="check_blogger" value="blogger">
                                        <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="check_blogger">
                                            Blogger
                                        </label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <!-- business niche -->
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                            Business Niche*</th>
                        <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <select name="data[niche]" class="form-select form-input b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70 form-required-desktop">
                                    <option value="Travel">Travel</option>
                                    <option value="Finance">Finance</option>
                                    <option value="Finance Technology">Financial Technology</option>
                                    <option value="Education Technology">Education Technology</option>
                                    <option value="E-Commerce">E-Commerce</option>
                                    <option value="Property">Property</option>
                                    <option value="Technology">Technology</option>
                                    <option value="Food and Beverages">Food and Beverages</option>
                                    <option value="Media">Media</option>
                                    <option value="Digital Agency">Digital Agency</option>
                                    <option value="Health">Health</option>
                                    <option value="Other">Other</option>
                                </select>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <!-- website -->
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                            Your website (personal/company)*</th>
                        <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <input type="text" name="data[website]" placeholder="e.g: www.cmlabs.co" class="form-control web form-required form-required-desktop">
                                <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <!-- whatsapp number -->
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                            WhatsApp Number*</th>
                        <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <button id="open-phone-code" class="input-group-text dropdown-toggle bg-white" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/id.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Indonesia flag logo">
                                    (+62)
                                </button>
                                <ul id="list-phone-code" class="dropdown-menu">
                                    <li data-value="62" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/id.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/id.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Indonesia flag logo">
                                            (+62)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="65" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/sg.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/sg.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Singapore flag logo">
                                            (+65)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="60" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/my.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/my.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Malaysia flag logo">
                                            (+60)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="66" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/th.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/th.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Thailand flag logo">
                                            (+66)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="63" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/ph.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/ph.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Philippines flag logo">
                                            (+63)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="84" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/vn.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/vn.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Vietnam flag logo">
                                            (+84)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="61" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/au.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/au.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Australia flag logo">
                                            (+61)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="7" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/kz.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/kz.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Kazakhstan flag logo">
                                            (+7)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="44" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/uk.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/uk.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="United Kingdom flag logo">
                                            (+44)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                    <li data-value="1" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/us.png">
                                        <span class="dropdown-item">
                                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/us.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="United States flag logo">
                                            (+1)
                                        </span>
                                    </li>
                                </ul>
                                <select id="select-phone-code" name="data[phone_code]" class="visually-hidden">
                                    <option value="62" selected="">(+62)</option>
                                    <option value="65">(+65)</option>
                                    <option value="60">(+60)</option>
                                    <option value="66">(+66)</option>
                                    <option value="63">(+63)</option>
                                    <option value="84">(+84)</option>
                                    <option value="61">(+61)</option>
                                    <option value="7">(+7)</option>
                                    <option value="44">(+44)</option>
                                    <option value="1">(+1)</option>
                                </select>
                                <input type="tel" name="data[phone_number]" placeholder="(81234567890)" class="form-control phone form-required form-required-desktop">
                                <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>

                            </div>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                    <!-- email address -->
                    <tr>
                        <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                            Email address*</th>
                        <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                            <div class="input-group">
                                <input type="email" name="email" class="form-control form-required form-required-desktop" placeholder="e.g: yourmail@example.com">
                                <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                </tbody></table>
                <div class="accordion custom-form-accordion" id="accordion_custom_form">
                    <!-- media spec -->
                    <div class="accordion-item d-none" id="accordion_item_media">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="media_specs_collapse_title">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#media_specs_collapse" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="media_specs_collapse">
                                Media Specs*
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="media_specs_collapse" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="media_specs_collapse_title">
                            <table class="table table-borderless custom-form-table desktop">
                                <tbody><tr>
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Media Name (Choose Media)*</th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="input-group">
                                            <select name="data[media_name]" class="form-select form-input b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70">
                                                <option value="Kompas">Kompas</option>
                                                <option value="Liputan6.com">Liputan6.com</option>
                                                <option value="Tirto.id">Tirto.id</option>
                                                <option value="Tribunnews">Tribunnews</option>
                                                <option value="CNBC">CNBC</option>
                                                <option value="Sindonews">Sindonews</option>
                                                <option value="Merdeka.com">Merdeka.com</option>
                                                <option value="iNews">iNews</option>
                                                <option value="Jawapos">Jawapos</option>
                                                <option value="CNN">CNN</option>
                                                <option value="Tempo">Tempo</option>
                                                <option value="Female Daily">Female Daily</option>
                                                <option value="Popmama">Popmama</option>
                                                <option value="Popbela">Popbela</option>
                                                <option value="Bola net">Bola net</option>
                                                <option value="Bola com">Bola com</option>
                                                <option value="Okezone">Okezone</option>
                                                <option value="Suara.com">Suara.com</option>
                                                <option value="IDN Media">IDN Media</option>
                                                <option value="KapanLagi">KapanLagi</option>
                                                <option value="Media Indonesia">Media Indonesia</option>
                                                <option value="Bisnis.com">Bisnis.com</option>
                                                <option value="Fimela">Fimela</option>
                                                <option value="Viva.co.id">Viva.co.id</option>
                                                <option value="Brilionet">Brilionet</option>
                                                <option value="Grid ID">Grid ID</option>
                                                <option value="TechInAsia">TechInAsia</option>
                                                <option value="Republika">Republika</option>
                                                <option value="Detik.com">Detik.com</option>
                                                <option value="Kompas">Kompas</option>
                                                <option value="Republika">Republika</option>
                                                <option value="TechInAsia">TechInAsia</option>
                                            </select>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            </tbody></table>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- blogger specs -->
                    <div class="accordion-item d-none" id="accordion_item_blogger">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="blogger_specs_collapse_title">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#blogger_specs_collapse" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="blogger_specs_collapse">
                                Blogger Specs
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="blogger_specs_collapse" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="blogger_specs_collapse_title">
                            <table class="table table-borderless custom-form-table desktop">
                                <tbody><tr class="blogger-forms">
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Trust Flow <i class="bx bx-info-circle icons text-gray-100" data-tooltip="Trust Flow is a metric developed by Majestic that measures the quality and authority of a website's backlink profile. It's based on the number and quality of links pointing to the website from trusted and authoritative sources. The higher the Trust Flow score, the more trustworthy and authoritative the website is considered to be."></i></th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                            <input type="number" name="data[trust_flow_min]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                            <span>-</span>
                                            <input type="number" name="data[trust_flow_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr class="blogger-forms">
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Citation Flow <i class="bx bx-info-circle icons text-gray-100" data-tooltip="Citation Flow is also a metric developed by Majestic that measures the quantity and popularity of a website's backlinks. It's based on the number of links pointing to the website, regardless of their quality or authority. The higher the Citation Flow score, the more popular the website is considered to be."></i></th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                            <input type="number" name="data[citation_flow_min]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                            <span>-</span>
                                            <input type="number" name="data[citation_flow_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr class="blogger-forms">
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Domain Authority <i class="bx bx-info-circle icons text-gray-100" data-tooltip="Domain Authority is a metric developed by Moz that predicts how well a website will rank on search engine result pages (SERPs). It's based on factors such as the quality and quantity of links pointing to the website."></i></th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                            <input type="number" name="data[authority_min]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                            <span>-</span>
                                            <input type="number" name="data[authority_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr class="blogger-forms">
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Spam Score <i class="bx bx-info-circle icons text-gray-100" data-tooltip="Spam Score is a metric developed by Moz that indicates the likelihood that a website has spammy or low-quality backlinks. The higher the score, the more likely it is that the website has been penalized by search engines."></i></th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                            <select name="data[spam_operator]" class="form-select form-input b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70 w-25">
                                                <option value="less_than">&lt; (less than)</option>
                                                <option value="greater_than">&gt; (more than)</option>
                                                <option value="less_than_equal">≤ (less than equal)</option>
                                                <option value="greater_than_equal">≥ (more than equal)</option>
                                            </select>
                                            <input type="number" name="data[spam]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr class="blogger-forms">
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Domain rating <i class="bx bx-info-circle icons text-gray-100" data-tooltip="Domain Rating is a metric developed by Ahrefs that measures the strength and authority of a website's overall backlink profile. The score ranges from 0 to 100, with higher scores indicating a stronger backlink profile."></i></th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                            <input type="number" name="data[domain_rating]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            </tbody></table>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- meeting appointment -->
                    <div class="accordion-item" id="accordion_item_meeting">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="meeting_specs_collapse_title">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#meeting_specs_collapse" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="meeting_specs_collapse">
                                Meeting Appointment
                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="meeting_specs_collapse" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="meeting_specs_collapse_title">
                            <table class="table table-borderless custom-form-table desktop">
                                <tbody><tr>
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Set meeting appointment?</th>
                                    <td colspan="3" class="py-3">
                                        <div class="input-group">
                                            <input type="date" name="data[meeting_appointment]" class="form-control" placeholder="12:00 Wed Aug 18, 2021">
                                            <span class="open-icon">
                                                <button type="button"><i class="date_icon bx bx-calendar"></i></button>
                                            </span>
                                        </div>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                                <tr>
                                    <th scope="row" colspan="2" class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70 py-3 ps-4">
                                        Message</th>
                                    <td colspan="3">
                                        <textarea class="form-control placeholder-black w-80" name="data[message]" rows="3" placeholder="Hi Marketing, can you please send me the quotation immediately? Thanks :)">Hi Marketing, can you please send me the quotation immediately? Thanks :)</textarea>
                                    </td>
                                </tr>
                            </tbody></table>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button id="submitBtn" disabled="" type="button" class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_submit_and_request_quotation_now! submitBtn btn-custom-add-to-list media-buying-submit btn mt-3 p-400 b1-m-400 button-primary-130 w-100 py-2">
                    Submit and request quotation now!                </button>
                <div class="disclaimer background-purple-10 mt-4">
                    <i class="bx bxs-info-circle text-purple-110 b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110 discicon"></i>
                    <p class="desc">
                        <strong>Disclaimer:</strong> We will respond to your inquiry immediately within 1x24 hours on working days. The publication process itself will be carried out no later than 5x24 hours. For this reason, we cannot accommodate requests for publication in a shorter time frame than the specified time.                    </p>
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2 mt-3 b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">Terms and conditions applied, <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/terms-of-services" class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_terms_conditions_read_more b1-400 b1-m-400 text-primary-70">read more?</a>
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div>
    <form action="#" method="post" class="d-block d-md-none media-buying-form-mobile">
        <input type="hidden" name="feature" value="quotation">
        <input type="hidden" name="section" value="content-marketing">
        <input type="hidden" name="priority" value="1">
        <input type="hidden" name="category" value="media-buying">
        <input type="hidden" name="url" value="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/pricing/media-buying">
        <input type="hidden" name="locale" value="en">
        <input type="hidden" name="data[form]" placeholder="Media-buying" value="Media-buying" class="form-control">

        <div class="custom-form-table mobile">
            <div class="body">
                <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Backlink type*</p>
                <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-4">
                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                <input class="form-required-mobile form-check-input mt-0" type="checkbox" name="data[type]" id="check_online_publisher_mobile" value="online_publisher" aria-label="Checkbox for following text input">
                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="check_online_publisher_mobile">
                                    Online publisher (media)                                </label>
                            </div>
                            <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                <input class="form-required-mobile form-check-input mt-0" type="checkbox" name="data[type]" id="check_blogger_mobile" value="blogger" aria-label="Checkbox for following text input">
                                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="check_blogger_mobile">
                                    Blogger
                                </label>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="body">
                <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Business Niche</p>
                <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <select name="data[niche]" class="form-required-mobile form-select form-input b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70">
                            <option value="Travel">Travel</option>
                            <option value="Finance">Finance</option>
                            <option value="Finance Technology">Financial Technology</option>
                            <option value="Education Technology">Education Technology</option>
                            <option value="E-Commerce">E-Commerce</option>
                            <option value="Property">Property</option>
                            <option value="Technology">Technology</option>
                            <option value="Food and Beverages">Food and Beverages</option>
                            <option value="Media">Media</option>
                            <option value="Digital Agency">Digital Agency</option>
                            <option value="Health">Health</option>
                            <option value="Other">Other</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="body">
                <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Your website (personal/company)*</p>
                <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <input type="text" name="data[website]" placeholder="e.g: www.cmlabs.co" class="form-required-mobile form-control web form-required">
                        <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="body">
                <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">WhatsApp number</p>
                <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <button id="open-phone-code" class="input-group-text dropdown-toggle bg-white" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
                            <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/id.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Indonesia flag logo">
                            (+62)
                        </button>
                        <ul id="list-phone-code" class="dropdown-menu">
                            <li data-value="62" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/id.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/id.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Indonesia flag logo">
                                    (+62)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="65" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/sg.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/sg.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Singapore flag logo">
                                    (+65)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="60" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/my.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/my.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Malaysia flag logo">
                                    (+60)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="66" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/th.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/th.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Thailand flag logo">
                                    (+66)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="63" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/ph.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/ph.png" class="img-fluid" alt="Philippines flag logo">
                                    (+63)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="84" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/vn.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/vn.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Vietnam flag logo">
                                    (+84)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="61" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/au.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/au.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Australia flag logo">
                                    (+61)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="7" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/kz.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/kz.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="Kazakhstan flag logo">
                                    (+7)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="44" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/uk.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/uk.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="United Kingdom flag logo">
                                    (+44)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                            <li data-value="1" data-image="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/us.png">
                                <span class="dropdown-item">
                                    <img src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/images/logo/us.png" class="img-fluid mx-1" alt="United States flag logo">
                                    (+1)
                                </span>
                            </li>
                        </ul>
                        <select id="select-phone-code" name="data[phone_code]" class="visually-hidden">
                            <option value="62" selected="">(+62)</option>
                            <option value="65">(+65)</option>
                            <option value="60">(+60)</option>
                            <option value="66">(+66)</option>
                            <option value="63">(+63)</option>
                            <option value="84">(+84)</option>
                            <option value="61">(+61)</option>
                            <option value="7">(+7)</option>
                            <option value="44">(+44)</option>
                            <option value="1">(+1)</option>
                        </select>
                        <input type="tel" name="data[phone_number]" placeholder="(81234567890)" class="form-required-mobile form-control phone form-required">
                        <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="body">
                <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Email address*</p>
                <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="input-group">
                        <input type="email" name="email" class="form-required-mobile form-control form-required" placeholder="e.g: yourmail@example.com">
                        <div class="invalid-feedback b2-400 b2-m-400"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="accordion custom-form-accordion" id="accordion_custom_form_mobile">
                <!-- media spec -->
                <div class="accordion-item d-none" id="accordion_item_media_mobile">
                    <p class="accordion-header" id="media_specs_collapse_title_mobile">
                        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#media_specs_collapse_mobile" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="media_specs_collapse_mobile">
                            Media Specs*
                        </button>
                    </p>
                    <div id="media_specs_collapse_mobile" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="media_specs_collapse_title_mobile">
                        <div class="body">
                            <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Media Name (Choose Media)*</p>
                            <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <select name="data[media_name]" class="form-select form-input b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70">
                                        <option value="Kompas">Kompas</option>
                                        <option value="Liputan6.com">Liputan6.com</option>
                                        <option value="Tirto.id">Tirto.id</option>
                                        <option value="Tribunnews">Tribunnews</option>
                                        <option value="CNBC">CNBC</option>
                                        <option value="Sindonews">Sindonews</option>
                                        <option value="Merdeka.com">Merdeka.com</option>
                                        <option value="iNews">iNews</option>
                                        <option value="Jawapos">Jawapos</option>
                                        <option value="CNN">CNN</option>
                                        <option value="Tempo">Tempo</option>
                                        <option value="Female Daily">Female Daily</option>
                                        <option value="Popmama">Popmama</option>
                                        <option value="Popbela">Popbela</option>
                                        <option value="Bola net">Bola net</option>
                                        <option value="Bola com">Bola com</option>
                                        <option value="Okezone">Okezone</option>
                                        <option value="Suara.com">Suara.com</option>
                                        <option value="IDN Media">IDN Media</option>
                                        <option value="KapanLagi">KapanLagi</option>
                                        <option value="Media Indonesia">Media Indonesia</option>
                                        <option value="Bisnis.com">Bisnis.com</option>
                                        <option value="Fimela">Fimela</option>
                                        <option value="Viva.co.id">Viva.co.id</option>
                                        <option value="Brilionet">Brilionet</option>
                                        <option value="Grid ID">Grid ID</option>
                                        <option value="TechInAsia">TechInAsia</option>
                                        <option value="Republika">Republika</option>
                                        <option value="Detik.com">Detik.com</option>
                                        <option value="Kompas">Kompas</option>
                                        <option value="Republika">Republika</option>
                                        <option value="TechInAsia">TechInAsia</option>
                                    </select>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- blogger specs -->
                <div class="accordion-item d-none" id="accordion_item_blogger_mobile">
                    <p class="accordion-header" id="blogger_specs_collapse_title_mobile">
                        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#blogger_specs_collapse_mobile" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="blogger_specs_collapse_mobile">
                            Blogger Specs
                        </button>
                    </p>
                    <div id="blogger_specs_collapse_mobile" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="blogger_specs_collapse_title_mobile">
                        <div class="body blogger-forms">
                            <p class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Trust Flow</p>
                            <div>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    <input type="number" name="data[trust_flow_min]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                    <span>-</span>
                                    <input type="number" name="data[trust_flow_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="body blogger-forms">
                            <p class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Citation Flow</p>
                            <div>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    <input type="number" name="data[citation_flow_min]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                    <span>-</span>
                                    <input type="number" name="data[citation_flow_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="body blogger-forms">
                            <p class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Domain Authority</p>
                            <div>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    <input type="number" name="data[authority_min]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                    <span>-</span>
                                    <input type="number" name="data[authority_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="body blogger-forms">
                            <p class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Spam Score</p>
                            <div>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    <select name="data[spam_operator]" class="form-select form-input b1-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70 w-25">
                                        <option value="less_than">&lt; (less than)</option>
                                        <option value="greater_than">&gt; (more than)</option>
                                    </select>
                                    <input type="number" name="data[spam_max]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="body blogger-forms">
                            <p class="p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Domain rating</p>
                            <div>
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
                                    <input type="number" name="data[domain_rating]" placeholder="0" class="form-control web w-25">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- meeting appointment -->
                <div class="accordion-item" id="accordion_item_meeting_mobile">
                    <p class="accordion-header" id="meeting_specs_collapse_title_mobile">
                        <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#meeting_specs_collapse_mobile" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="meeting_specs_collapse_mobile">
                            Meeting Appointment
                        </button>
                    </p>
                    <div id="meeting_specs_collapse_mobile" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="meeting_specs_collapse_title_mobile">
                        <div class="body">
                            <p class="title p-700 p-m-700 text-dark-70">Set meeting appointment?</p>
                            <div class="d-flex align-items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="input-group">
                                    <input type="date" name="data[meeting]" class="form-control" placeholder="12:00 Wed Aug 18, 2021">
                                    <span class="open-icon">
                                        <button type="button"><i class="date_icon bx bx-calendar"></i></button>
                                    </span>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="body bg-white">
                            <textarea class="form-control w-100" rows="3" placeholder="Hi Marketing, can you please send me the quotation immediately? Thanks :)">Hi Marketing, can you please send me the quotation immediately? Thanks :)</textarea>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="w-100">
                <button disabled="" id="submitBtnMobile" type="button" class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_submit_and_request_quotation_now! submitBtn btn-custom-add-to-list media-buying-submit-mobile btn mt-3 p-400 b1-m-400 button-primary-130 w-100 py-2 add-list-btn">
                    Submit and request quotation now!                </button>
                <div class="disclaimer background-purple-10 mt-4">
                    <i class="bx bxs-info-circle text-purple-110 b1-400 b1-m-400 text-purple-110 discicon"></i>
                    <p class="desc">
                        <strong>Disclaimer:</strong> We will respond to your inquiry immediately within 1x24 hours on working days. The publication process itself will be carried out no later than 5x24 hours. For this reason, we cannot accommodate requests for publication in a shorter time frame than the specified time.                    </p>
                </div>
                <p class="mb-2 mt-3 b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100">Terms and conditions applied, <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/terms-of-services" class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_terms_conditions_read_more b1-400 b1-m-400 text-primary-70">read more?</a>
                </p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

        <div>
    <div class="contact_us_cover">
        <div class="cmlabs-container">
            <div class="row w-100">
                <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
                    <div class="contact-us-container1 cta-backlink-1 h-100 gap-2 gap-lg-5">
                        <div class="contact-us-title h5-700 h5-m-700 text-primary-130">Couldn't find what you need?</div>
                        <div class="d-flex gap-5 justify-content-center flex-shrink-0">
                            <a class="" href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/company/contact
                            ">
                                <button class=" button-primary-130 p-400 p-m-400 btn">Consult with our team!</button>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="col-12 col-lg-6">
                    <div class="contact-us-container1 cta-backlink-2 h-100 gap-2 gap-lg-5 mt-4 mt-lg-0">
                        <div class="contact-us-title h5-700 h5-m-700 text-primary-130">Ready to start?</div>
                        <div class="d-flex gap-5 justify-content-center flex-shrink-0">
                            <a class="" href="#media-list">
                                <button class=" button-primary-130 p-400 p-m-400 btn">Choose backlink placement</button>
                            </a>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
        <section id="faq" class="faq-media-buying">
    <div class="cmlabs-container">
        <div class="row">
            <div class="col-xl-6 col-lg-6 col-sm-12 colxs-12 col-12">
                <h2 class="h3-700 h3-m-700 text-dark-70">
                    We are here to <span class="text-primary-70">answer your questions</span>            </h2></div>
            <div class="col-xl-6 col-lg-6 col-sm-12 colxs-12 col-12">
                <div class="accordion faq-accordion" id="accordionExample">
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="faqOne">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed b1-700 b1-m-700" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#answerOne" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="answerOne">
                                Can you provide domain lists (of bloggers and online publishers) that suit my market niche?                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="answerOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="faqOne" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400">
                                    
        Phase 1 — Mainly, we will choose a domain with predefined specifications made by client<br>
        Phase 2 — Then, we will provide a list of domains in which we have marked which categories of writing are written by the media. For specific website topics (eg. Edu-tech topic), we must provide a list of media that discusses school, educational, and related topics.<br>
        Note: We will also group the list of domains in phase 2 depending on whether certain domains fall into the Big Media, High Quality Media, Local Media, and other media groups.<br>
        Note 2: Furthermore, this categorization will affect domain prices and arrangements at media companies. Please note that some media in the High Quality Media group have strict rules for each publication.<br>
        Phase 3 — Then, the next specification is a more technical one, according to the client's preference. Some clients use sizes from Moz / Majestic / Ahrefs / SimilarWeb / and so on. Then we will provide size limitations as expected, for example, TF-CF from Majestic with a certain score.
                                    </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="faqTwo">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed b1-700 b1-m-700" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#answerTwo" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="answerTwo">
                                Can I make the "backlink placement" contract duration shorter, for example, 1 or 2 months?                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="answerTwo" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="faqTwo" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400">
                                    
        For backlink placement or "media buying" activities in general, we do not set the duration of the project. Hence, we will approve a 1-month project.<br>
        General specifications for backlinking activity with us:<br>
        - Blogger: The minimum purchase is 30 domains;<br>
        - Media (online publisher): Minimum purchase is 10 domains — there is no minimum limit in the value of money, and there is no special setting for Big Media, High Quality Media, group or other categorizations;
                                    </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="faqThree">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed b1-700 b1-m-700" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#answerThree" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="answerThree">
                                Can I make the "PR/Branding" contract duration shorter, for example, 1 or 2 months?                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="answerThree" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="faqThree" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400">
                                    
        For PR/Branding activities in general, we do not set the duration of the project. Hence, we will also approve a 1-month project.<br>
        However, there are a few things to be noted:<br>
        - Basically, media forums regulate branding activities (or publications that promote brands), one of which is the media that must attach advertorials. Search engine providers also do the same thing.&gt;br&gt;
        - Media companies make arrangements at the second layer (after the publication of a news story) to be audited to check compliance and application of the rules.<br>
        - The same rules (based on the previous points) may also apply to media groups. Given that the rules established in 1 may also apply to its media network.<br>
        - We cannot be sure of the rules that apply to the hundreds of online publishers on the list. Generally, we find out during the "content placement" stage.<br>
        - Some online publishers may arrange the placement of advertorial articles up to the device level because some media provide separate URLs for the desktop version and the mobile version.<br>
        - Some online publishers set separate prices for each device. We will inform you earlier if specifications like this have been set by the media.
                                    </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="faqFour">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed b1-700 b1-m-700" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#answerFour" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="answerFour">
                                Is there an estimate of the "positive" impact of backlink activity on the average ranking of targeted keywords?                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="answerFour" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="faqFour" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400">
                                    
        Please note that we do not even recommend backlink activity as part of any SEO strategy. What we do is facilitate backlink placement.<br>
        Thus, it can be concluded that:<br>
        We are not responsible for the positive and negative results of the backlink placement that we do. We will carry out the activity with strict supervision by following the guide to placing certain backlinks to manipulate the search engine algorithm. However, we cannot guarantee that your website will not be penalized by search engine providers. As a result, we also cannot guarantee whether there is a positive impact from this backlink placement.
                                    </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="faqFive">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed b1-700 b1-m-700" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#answerFive" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="answerFive">
                                Can we provide and recommend backlink plans?                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="answerFive" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="faqFive" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400">
                                    
        In general, we will provide backlink plans when cooperation has been agreed upon, with the conditions that apply.<br>
        But we will explain briefly how we create a backlink plan:<br>
        To put it simply, we need information on how many backlinks your SEO team has previously built. Why is that? Here, we will also maintain backlink-quality volatility, which has been done to ensure that our backlink activity does not trigger search engine algorithms to detect significant changes (up or down) that have the potential to negatively impact websites.
                                    </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="accordion-item">
                        <p class="accordion-header" id="faqSix">
                            <button class="accordion-button collapsed b1-700 b1-m-700" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#answerSix" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="answerSix">
                                Is it possible to book a meeting with the cmlabs team?                            </button>
                        </p>
                        <div id="answerSix" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="faqSix" data-bs-parent="#accordionExample">
                            <div class="accordion-body">
                                <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400">
                                    Yes, of course. You can arrange a face-to-face meeting with our marketing team via <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/schedule-meeting" class="text-primary-70">this link</a>. Besides that, you can also chat live via the live-chat window on the lower right side and arrange meetings online or directly.                                </p>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

        <div id="section-work-with-us">
    <div class="article-seo gray-10">
        <div class="cmlabs-container">
            <div class="h2-700 h2-m-700 text-dark-70">PR/Branding &amp; Backlink Services - Media Buying by cmlabs</div>
            <div class="main__written b1-400 b1-m-400 text-gray-100 d-flex align-items-center gap-2">
        <i class="bx bxs-user-circle"></i>
        <p class="m-0">
            Written by <span class="writter">cmlabs</span> September 07, 2023
        </p>
    </div>

            <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70 text-dark-70">
                Have you ever wondered why certain websites rank higher than others in search engine results page (<a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-terms/serp" target="_blank">SERP</a>)? Beyond employing effective <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-guidelines/local-seo-guide" target="_blank">SEO strategies</a>, the key often lies in high-quality backlink services, a hidden secret to such achievements.
            </p>
            <a class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_reach read-more-seo p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70 collapsed" data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#readMoreCollapse" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseExample">Read more</a>
            <div class="collapse" id="readMoreCollapse">
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">The key factor for a website to win a higher position in <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-guidelines/how-search-engine-works" target="_blank">search engines</a> generally depends on <strong>domain authority</strong>.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Within the context of <strong>SEO optimization</strong>, domain authority refers to the level of trust, reputation, and credibility a domain holds.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">However, it's important to note that domain authority is not solely influenced by the quantity of links (backlinks) pointing to a website. In fact, you also need to ensure the quality, relevance, and authority of the link sources, as well.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">So, is there a way to obtain high-quality backlink services for your business? Before you delve deeper into the context, let’s explore the definition of the concept first.</p>

                <h3 class="h3-700 h3-m-700">What is a Backlink?</h3>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Just as the name suggests, a backlink is a reciprocal link that provides direction for users to move from one website to another based on recommendations.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">In essence, backlinks act as "bridges" between two or more web pages, utilizing the aspect of referencing. It means that one website can recommend or refer users and direct them to visit another site.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Backlinks serve as a crucial marketing strategy within the internet ecosystem. In the realm of SEO optimization, they signal the search engines about the quality, authority, and relevance of a website.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">If your website has many high-quality backlinks (premium backlinks) originating from numerous reputable and trustworthy sources, your website's authority will consequently increase.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">This is why the existence of national media backlink services are essential to help business optimize the site's ranking in search engine result pages.</p>

                <h3 class="h3-700 h3-m-700">What is Media Buying?</h3>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Media Buying is an essential strategy in the realm of <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-guidelines/digital-marketing-services" target="_blank">digital marketing</a> that involves advertising space or promotional content on various digital platforms.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">In this case, one common approach to Media Buying is through website backlink services. With this strategy, businesses can efficiently reach a suitable audience through the assistance of authorized media outlets.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Executing a Media Buying strategy through SEO backlink services can be a prominent combination to enhance your website's visibility, authority, and <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-guidelines/organic-traffic-guidelines" target="_blank">organic traffic</a>.</p>

                <h3 class="h3-700 h3-m-700">Benefits of Backlink Services in Marketing Strategy</h3>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Utilizing the potential of SEO backlink services offer numerous advantages. These benefits extend beyond mere optimization and delve into the realms of brand empowerment, audience engagement, and competitive edge establishment. Let's explore more in the following:</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">1. Enhancing Brand/Business Visibility</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Beyond the direct SEO advantages, which include improving search engine rankings and domain authority, these strategies offer a broader spectrum of advantages.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">When you buy backlinks, you can ensure that your brand's message reaches the right target audiences, as if you're placing your brand in front of potential customers who are already interested in your niche.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">This precise targeting not only increases the likelihood of engagement but also establishes a sense of familiarity with your brand, leading to potential conversions down the line.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">While this strategy significantly boosts your brand visibility, it can also increase <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-guidelines/ctr-guideline#:~:text=CTR%20stands%20for%20click%2Dthrough,that%20resulted%20in%20a%20click." target="_blank">click-through rates (CTR)</a>, more time spent on your website, and a higher probability of conversions.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">2. Optimizing Revenue</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">With the help of national media backlink services, you are not just reaching out blindly; you're engaging with individuals who are already aligned with what your brand offers.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">This alignment sets the stage for higher response rates, click-throughs, and ultimately, conversions.</p>
