                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">When individuals see content related to their interests intertwined with your brand’s <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-terms/niche-market" target="_blank">niche</a>, it sparks a genuine curiosity and openness to explore further.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">3. Expanding Reach and Marketing Targets</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">In a competitive and ever-changing business landscape, expanding market reach is a primary company objective.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">By subscribing to relevant and reputable GOV / EDU backlink services, your brand can effectively and efficiently broaden its market reach.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">These services offer a unique avenue to tap into the trust and authority associated with relevant institutions so that your brand not only benefits from the SEO advantages but also gains access to a discerning and engaged audience.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">4. Enhancing Website’s Authority and Credibility</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">When authoritative websites within your industry link to your content, it's akin to receiving a vote of confidence from the digital realm.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">These web backlinks services help you to signal the search engines, especially Google, that your website is a well-regarded source of information.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">In accordance, the cumulative effect of these signals gradually elevates your website's standing in search engine results, leading to higher organic traffic and a more influential online presence.</p>

                <h3 class="h3-700 h3-m-700">Media Buying from cmlabs</h3>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">When you aim for that coveted #1 spot in search rankings, Media Buying from cmlabs is here to offer you various reliable and effective strategies.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">In order to assist you in enhancing visibility and credibility from numerous prominent media, we present two enticing offers for your brand.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">SEO Backlink Services by cmlabs</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">We ensure that every backlink you acquire originates from authoritative and prominent media/online publishers, rigorously vetted by cmlabs’ professional team.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Some advantages you can get with website backlink services by cmlabs include:</p>

                <ul class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">
                    <li><strong>Easy Streamline Payment:</strong> We bridge the gap for you to obtain quality backlinks from well-known Indonesian media through an easy and efficient payment system.</li>
                    <li><strong>High-Quality Content:</strong> With cmlabs, backlinks are not just links; they're valuable sources of information for your visitors, serving a dual purpose.</li>
                    <li><strong>Relevant Backlinks:</strong> Backlink success hinges on relevance. Acquiring backlinks from leading sites in your niche can bolster your search engine authority.</li>
                    <li><strong>Rigorous Domain Check:</strong> cmlabs constantly implements a rigorous screening process to ensure that the media domains meet the highest standards.</li>
                    <li><strong>Compliance with Google Spam Policies:</strong> Our strategies adhere to Google's guidelines and policies, maintaining organic and legitimate practices, and steering clear of detrimental spam practices that could harm your site's rank and reputation.</li>
                </ul>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">PR/Branding cmlabs</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">In an increasingly competitive business world, building a strong and positive brand image is key to capturing your target market's attention.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">For this reason, Public Relations (PR) and branding through Media Buying services by cmlabs provide a beneficial solution for your business.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Here are the advantages you can reap by entrusting your brand's journey to Media Buying by cmlabs:</p>

                <ul class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">
                    <li><strong>Exposure from Prominent Media in Indonesia:</strong> We ensure your brand gains significant exposure on various influential and related media platforms to boost your visibility.</li>
                    <li><strong>Positive and Relevant Narrative for Your Brand:</strong> Beyond exposure, we prioritize producing high-quality content that is meticulously crafted to foster a positive connection between you and your audience.</li>
                    <li><strong>Rigorous Test to Ensure Positive Brand Exposure:</strong> Stringent and comprehensive content checks are our priority, given the importance of upholding your brand's integrity and reputation.</li>
                    <li><strong>Transparent and Clear Workflow:</strong> We offer responsive communication and structured editorial workflows.</li>
                    <li><strong>Streamline Payment Process:</strong> With PR/branding services by cmlabs, your business will be managed with professionalism, accountability, and a seamless registration-to-payment process.</li>
                </ul>

                <h3 class="h3-700 h3-m-700">Other Services cmlabs Offers</h3>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">cmlabs presents a range of services that cater to every client’s various needs. Here is a glimpse of several services we provide. If you need other supporting services, kindly explore and select the one that aligns perfectly with your requirements.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">SEO Services:</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Our comprehensive solutions encompass a variety of strategies aimed at enhancing websites. This involves addressing technical aspects and content creation. With cmlabs, your website can undergo a thorough analysis by our team of SEO specialists. We also offer content planning and creation in accordance with <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-guidelines" target="_blank">SEO guidelines</a>.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">SEO Writing:</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Producing SEO-based articles tailored for the digital era to be easily comprehensible by search engine algorithms and target audiences, with a stronger emphasis on achieving organic traffic and other <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/seo-terms/what-are-leads" target="_blank">leads</a>.</p>

                <h4 class="h4-700 h4-m-700">Expert Writing:</h4>
                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">With cmlabs, you can depend on a team of highly adept professionals, each specializing in distinct fields. We elevate the quality of your content by showcasing your mastery within your industry and enriching the depth and breadth of the material, making it more informative and valuable to the audience.</p>

                <p class="p-400 p-m-400 text-dark-70">Ready to take your website to the top of search engine rankings? We've got your back when it comes to optimizing your website, creating SEO-friendly content, and linking you with authoritative media. With specialized PR/Branding and Backlink Services from Media Buying by cmlabs, your website's authority is set to soar!</p>

                <div class="card-body px-4 py-3 bg-dark-10 mt-2 mb-3 background-gray-30">
                    <p class="fz-14 fw-500 m-0 b2-400 b1-m-500">
                        cmlabs are here to skyrocket your success in the modern business landscape. Contact
                        <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/company/marketing" class="mktcmlgtm_lp_digital_media_buying_marketing">Our Marketing Team</a> 
                        now for further information and a personalized offer of our Media Buying service. We will take you into a world of improved marketing strategy performance!
                    </p>
                </div>
                <a class="text-decoration-underline mt-3" data-bs-toggle="collapse" href="#readMoreCollapse" role="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapseExample">Close content</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    
</div>
    </div></div></div></div></main>

    
    <div class="modal fade" id="mediaModal" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="mediaModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">

                </div>

            <div class="floating-notification-section">
            <div class="floating-marketing-section  d-none d-lg-block main-layout-floating">
    <div class="card card-custom card-floating-popup desktop hide d-none">
        <div class="card-header border-0">
            <div class="d-flex w-100 align-items-center justify-content-between mb-2">
                <h3 class="b1-700 p-0 m-0 text-white">
                    Need help?
                </h3>
                <i class="bx bx-x bx-sm d-sm-none text-white-50" id="dismiss-btn"></i>
            </div>
            <p class="text-white s-400 m-0">
                Tell us your SEO needs, our marketing team will help you find the best solution
            </p>
        </div>
        <div class="card-body background-gray-10 p-0">
            <div class="px-2 mx-3 mt-3 rounded-3 py-2 s-400 text-dark-70 background-gray-40">Here is the officially recognized list of our team members. Please <strong>caution against scam activities and irresponsible individuals</strong> who falsely claim affiliation with PT CMLABS INDONESIA DIGITAL (cmlabs).                <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/notification/announcement-beware-of-scam" class="text-primary-70 text-underline">Read more</a>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex flex-column people-container">
                <div class="marketing-contact d-flex align-items-center gap-4 justify-content-between">
        <div class="d-flex align-items-center mr-5">
            <div class="symbol symbol-circle symbol-40 mr-3 flex-shrink-0">

    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display: none;">
    <symbol id="check-circle-fill" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
        <path d="M16 8A8 8 0 1 1 0 8a8 8 0 0 1 16 0zm-3.97-3.03a.75.75 0 0 0-1.08.022L7.477 9.417 5.384 7.323a.75.75 0 0 0-1.06 1.06L6.97 11.03a.75.75 0 0 0 1.079-.02l3.992-4.99a.75.75 0 0 0-.01-1.05z"></path>
    </symbol>
    <symbol id="x-circle-fill" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
        <path d="M16 8A8 8 0 1 1 0 8a8 8 0 0 1 16 0zM5.354 4.646a.5.5 0 1 0-.708.708L7.293 8l-2.647 2.646a.5.5 0 0 0 .708.708L8 8.707l2.646 2.647a.5.5 0 0 0 .708-.708L8.707 8l2.647-2.646a.5.5 0 0 0-.708-.708L8 7.293 5.354 4.646z"></path>
    </symbol>
</svg>
<div id="toast-success" class="toast-cmlabs">
    <div class="alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center" role="alert">
        <svg class="bi flex-shrink-0 me-4" width="24" height="24" role="img" aria-label="Success:"><use xlink:href="#check-circle-fill"></use></svg>
        <div class="message"></div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
</div>
<div id="toast-error" class="toast-cmlabs">
    <div class="alert alert-danger d-flex align-items-center" role="alert">
        <svg class="bi flex-shrink-0 me-4" width="24" height="24" role="img" aria-label="Danger:"><use xlink:href="#x-circle-fill"></use></svg>
        <div class="message"></div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
</div>
<div id="toast-warning" class="toast-cmlabs">
    <div class="alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-center" role="alert">
        <svg class="bi flex-shrink-0 me-4" width="24" height="24" role="img" aria-label="Warning:"><use xlink:href="#exclamation-ocatagon-fill"></use></svg>
        <div class="message"></div>
        <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
    </div>
</div>                            <script src="https://ajax.googleapis.com/ajax/libs/jquery/3.6.1/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script async="" src="/assets/scripts/main3.js?id=4e11bc0f92ebd34de7307fa483f8ff57"></script>
<script async="" src="/assets/scripts/header3.js?id=3c21406dbb8f7a4cd6e45e1fc6dcaff0"></script>
<script defer="" src="https://cmlabs.co/assets/scripts/floating-contact.js"></script>

<script>
    function initializeCarousel(carouselId, duration = 50) {
        const carousel = document.getElementById(carouselId);
        if (carousel) {
            const carouselIndicators = carousel.querySelectorAll(".carousel-indicators button span");
            let intervalID;

            const reviewCarousel = new bootstrap.Carousel(carousel);

            window.addEventListener("load", function() {
                fillCarouselIndicator(1);
            });

            carousel.addEventListener("slide.bs.carousel", function(e) {
                let index = e.to;
                fillCarouselIndicator(++index);
            });

            function fillCarouselIndicator(index) {
                let i = 0;
                for (const carouselIndicator of carouselIndicators) {
                    if (carouselIndicator)
                        carouselIndicator.style.width = 0;
                }
                clearInterval(intervalID);
                reviewCarousel.pause();

                intervalID = setInterval(function() {
                    i++;

                    const spanLoader = carousel.querySelector(".carousel-indicators .active span")
                    if (spanLoader)
                        spanLoader.style.width = i + "%";


                    if (i >= 100)
                        reviewCarousel.next();

                }, duration);
            }
        }
    }
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
    const _uid = 0;
    const _token = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content');

    // localization for form
    const successTitle = "Success"
    const successDesc = "Thank you for filling out our form. The cmlabs team will contact you within 1x24 hours on working days."
    const visitBtn = "Visit cmlabs.co website"

    fetch('/increase-visit-count', {
        headers: {
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
            "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
            "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content')
        },
        method: 'GET',
    })
    .then(response => response.json())
    .then(response => {
        // console.log(response.data)
    })
    .catch(error => {
        console.error('Error:', error);
    });
</script>

<script>
    (function () {
        var script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = 'https://unpkg.com/web-vitals@3/dist/web-vitals.iife.js';
        document.head.appendChild(script);
    })();
</script>
        <script>
        const antiScamModal = document.querySelector("#antiScamModal");
        const isAntiScamShow = localStorage.getItem("isAntiScamShow");

        if (isAntiScamShow === null) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                var scamModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById("antiScamModal"));
                scamModal.show();
                localStorage.setItem("isAntiScamShow", "true");
            }, 1000);
        }
    </script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/moment.js/2.29.4/moment.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        const totallists = document.querySelector('#total-lists');
        const cardLists = document.querySelectorAll('.dropdown-cart-user .card-list').length;

        if (cardLists) totallists.innerHTML = cardLists;
                if (!cardLists) {
            $("#navbar-cart").hide()
            $("#navbar-cart").removeClass("d-lg-flex")
        };
            </script>
    <script>
        let elmToastError = document.getElementById("toast-error");
        let elmToastSuccess = document.getElementById("toast-success");

        const onDeleteListener = (e, buttonDelete, cardlist, divider, cardList, name) => {
                e.preventDefault()
                buttonDelete.setAttribute("disabled", "");
                fetch("/data/add-to-list", {
                        headers: {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json",
                            Accept: "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                            "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document
                                .querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                .getAttribute("content"),
                        },
                        method: "post",
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            category: buttonDelete.getAttribute("data-category"),
                            type: buttonDelete.getAttribute("data-type"),
                            detail: buttonDelete.getAttribute("data-detail"),
                            locale: document
                                .getElementsByTagName("html")[0]
                                .getAttribute("lang"),
                            isDeleted: true,
                            region: "id",
                        }),
                    })
                    .then((response) => response.json())
                    .then((result) => {
                            const totallist = document.querySelector('#totallist')
                            const accordionlist = document.querySelector('#your-list');
                            const cartList = document.querySelector('.cart');
                            const totalCount = document.querySelector(`#total-${name}`);
                            const lists = document.querySelectorAll(`.card-list.${name}`).length;
                            const cartlist = document.querySelectorAll('.seos-lists').length;
                            const carttitle = document.querySelector('.cart-title');
                            const cardLists = document.querySelectorAll('.card-list').length;
                            const logincart = document.querySelector('.logins');
                            const totallists = document.querySelector('#total-lists');
                            const yourListContainer = document.querySelector(".your-list-container-writing");
                            const dividerContainer = document.querySelector(`.${name}-cart`);
                            const dividerContainerLength = document.querySelectorAll(`.${name}-cart`).length;
                            const cartTotal = document.querySelector(`.counter-${name}`);
                            const totalPricingCart = document.querySelector(".totalPricingCart");
                            let inputCheckedss = document.querySelectorAll(".form-check-input:checked");
                            const summaryList = document.querySelectorAll(".summary-container");
                            let btnSubmitList = document.getElementById("btn-submit-list");
                            const totalEstimation = document.querySelector("#total-estimation");
                            let emptyState = document.querySelector(".title-empty-state");
                            let summaryForm = document.getElementById('summary-form');
                            if (lists <= 1 && cardLists <= 1) {
                                cartList.classList.remove('d-none');
                                accordionlist.classList.add('d-none');
                                carttitle.classList.add('d-none');
                                logincart.classList.add('d-none');
                                totallist.classList.add('d-none');
                                totallists.classList.remove('d-lg-block');

                                                                $("#navbar-cart").hide()
                                $("#navbar-cart").removeClass("d-lg-flex")
                                                    }
                        totallist.innerHTML = '(' + (cardLists - 1) + ')'; totallists.innerHTML = (cardLists -
                            1); totalCount.innerHTML = "(" + (lists - 1) + ")"; buttonDelete.removeAttribute("disabled");
                        if (result.status == true) {
                            elmToastSuccess.querySelector(
                                ".message"
                            ).innerHTML = result.message;
                            elmToastSuccess.style.display = "block";
                            setTimeout(function() {
                                elmToastSuccess.style.display = "none";
                            }, 3000);

                            const buttonType = buttonDelete.dataset.type;
                            cardlist.forEach(cardList => {
                                if (cardList.classList.contains(buttonType)) {
                                    let parentCardList = cardList.parentElement;
                                    cardList.remove();
                                    if (parentCardList.innerHTML.trim() == '') {
                                        parentCardList.innerHTML =
                                            `<p class="no-list p-400 p-m-400 text-center text-dark-70 px-4">You don’t have any item order on your cart. Explore package <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/pricing">here</a></p>`
                                    }
                                }
                            })
                            if (dividerContainerLength > 0) {
                                if (inputCheckedss.length <= 1) {
                                    summaryForm.style.display = "none";
                                    btnSubmitList.setAttribute("disabled", "");
                                    emptyState.style.display = "block";
                                }
                                const buttonType = buttonDelete.dataset.type;
                                summaryList.forEach(summary => {
                                    if (summary.classList.contains(buttonType)) {
                                        // const summaryParent = summary.parentElement;
                                        summary.remove();
                                        // summaryParent.remove();
                                    }
                                })
                                const writingDivider = dividerContainer.querySelectorAll(".list-divider");
                                const navCartDivider = yourListContainer.querySelectorAll(".list-divider");
                                if (writingDivider.length == 1) {
                                    dividerContainer.innerHTML =
                                        `<p class="text-center s-400 s-m-400 text-dark-40 px-4 no-list">You don’t have any item order on your cart. Explore package <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/pricing">here</a></p>`
                                }
                                let totalArr = [];
                                let deletedArr = [];
                                inputCheckedss.forEach(input => {
                                    let costSelect = input.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement;
                                    let totalSelect = costSelect.querySelector('input[name=cost]').value;
                                    totalArr.push(totalSelect);
                                    const buttonType = buttonDelete.dataset.type;
                                    const inputValue = (input).value;
                                    if (inputValue.includes(buttonType)) {
                                        if (input.classList.contains("check-seo")) {
                                            const deletedCheckbox = input.parentElement.parentElement
                                                .parentElement;
                                            let costDeleted = deletedCheckbox.querySelector('input[name=cost]')
                                                .value;
                                            deletedArr.push(costDeleted)
                                        } else {
                                            const deletedCheckbox = input.parentElement.parentElement
                                                .parentElement;
                                            let costDeleted = deletedCheckbox.querySelector('input[name=cost]')
                                                .value;
                                            deletedArr.push(costDeleted)
                                        }
                                    }
                                })
                                const deletedNum = parseInt(deletedArr[0]);
                                const sum1 = parseInt(totalArr[0]);
                                const sum2 = parseInt(totalArr[1]);
                                const totalSum = sum1 + sum2;
                                const changeTotal = totalSum - deletedNum;
                                let estCosts = 0;

                                estCosts = parseInt(estCosts) + parseInt(changeTotal);
                                estCostLabel = changeTotal === 'Rp' ? estCosts.toString().replace(
                                    /\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, ".") : estCosts.toString().replace(
                                    /\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, ".");
                                totalEstimation.innerHTML = `Rp ${estCostLabel}`

                                writingDivider.forEach(devider => {
                                    if (writingDivider.length <= 4) {
                                        devider.remove();
                                    }
                                })
                                navCartDivider.forEach(divider => {
                                    if (navCartDivider.length <= 2) {
                                        divider.remove();
                                    }
                                })
                                cartTotal.innerHTML = "(" + (lists - 1) + ")";
                                totallist.innerHTML = "(" + ((cartlist / 2) - 1 + (lists / 2)) + ")";
                                totalCount.innerHTML = "(" + ((lists / 2) - 1) + ")";
                                totalPricingCart.innerHTML = ((cartlist / 2) - 1 + (lists / 2));
                                totallists.innerHTML = ((cartlist / 2) - 1 + (lists / 2));

                                if (((cartlist / 2) - 1 + (lists / 2)) == 0) {
                                    totallists.classList.remove("d-lg-block");
                                    cartList.classList.remove('d-none');
                                    accordionlist.classList.add('d-none');
                                    carttitle.classList.add('d-none');
                                    logincart.classList.add('d-none');
                                    totallist.classList.add('d-none');
                                    totallists.classList.remove('d-lg-block');
                                }
                            }

                            if (divider != null) {
                                divider.remove();
                            }

                            if (dividerContainerLength == 0) {
                                let parentCardList = cardList.parentElement;
                                cardList.remove();

                                if (divider != null) {
                                    divider.remove();
                                }
                                if (parentCardList.innerHTML.trim() == '') {
                                    parentCardList.parentElement.innerHTML =
                                        `<p class="text-center s-400 s-m-400 text-dark-40 px-4 no-list">You don’t have any item order on your cart. Explore package <a href="https://cmlabs.co/en-id/pricing/seo-services">here</a></p>`
                                }
                            }

                            let btnAddToList = document.querySelectorAll(
                                `.btn-add-to-list[data-category='${buttonDelete.getAttribute("data-category")}'][data-type='${buttonDelete.getAttribute("data-type")}']`
                            );

                            btnAddToList.forEach((btn) => {
                                btn.disabled = false;
                                btn.innerHTML = 'Add to cart';
                            })
                        } else {
                            elmToastError.querySelector(
                                ".message"
                            ).innerHTML = result.message;
                            elmToastError.style.display = "block";
                            setTimeout(function() {
                                elmToastError.style.display = "none";
                            }, 3000);
                        }
                    })
            .catch(function(error) {
                buttonDelete.removeAttribute("disabled");
                console.log(error);
            });
        }
    </script>

    <script>
        setTimeout(() => {
            let elsCardList = document.querySelectorAll(".seos-lists");
            elsCardList.forEach(cardList => {
                const buttonDelete = cardList.querySelector('.btn-delete');
                let divider = cardList.nextElementSibling;
                buttonDelete?.addEventListener('click', (e) => onDeleteListener(e, buttonDelete,
                    elsCardList,
                    divider, cardList, 'seo'));
            });

            let writingcardlist = document.querySelectorAll(".writing");
            writingcardlist.forEach(cardList => {
                const buttonDelete = cardList.querySelector('.btn-deletes');
                let divider = cardList.nextElementSibling;
                buttonDelete?.addEventListener('click', (e) => onDeleteListener(e, buttonDelete,
                    writingcardlist, divider, cardList, 'writing'));
            });

            let expertcardlist = document.querySelectorAll(".card-list.expert");
            expertcardlist.forEach(cardList => {
                const buttonDelete = cardList.querySelector('.btn-deletes');
                let divider = cardList.nextElementSibling;
                buttonDelete?.addEventListener('click', (e) => onDeleteListener(e, buttonDelete,
                    expertcardlist, divider, cardList, 'expert'));
            });
        }, 1500)
    </script>

    
    <script>
        const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link.menu-item');

        // function to update icon class based on presence of .show class
        function updateIconClass(navLink) {
            const icon = navLink.querySelector('i[class*="bx"]');
            if (icon) {
                if (navLink.classList.contains('show')) {
                    const newClassNames = Array.from(icon.classList).map(className =>
                        className.startsWith('bx-') ? className.replace('bx-', 'bxs-') : className
                    );
                    icon.className = newClassNames.join(' ');
                } else {
                    const originalClassNames = Array.from(icon.classList).map(className =>
                        className.startsWith('bxs-') ? className.replace('bxs-', 'bx-') : className
                    );
                    icon.className = originalClassNames.join(' ');
                }
            }
        }

        navLinks.forEach(navLink => {
            const icon = navLink.querySelector('i[class*="bx-"]');

            if (icon) {
                navLink.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
                    const newClassNames = Array.from(icon.classList).map(className =>
                        className.startsWith('bx-') ? className.replace('bx-', 'bxs-') : className
                    );
                    icon.className = newClassNames.join(' ');
                });

                navLink.addEventListener('mouseout', () => {
                    updateIconClass(navLink);
                });

                updateIconClass(navLink);

                const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
                    mutations.forEach(mutation => {
                        if (mutation.attributeName === 'class') {
                            updateIconClass(navLink);
                        }
                    });
                });

                observer.observe(navLink, {
                    attributes: true,
                    attributeFilter: ['class']
                });
            }
        });
    </script>
    <script src="https://cmlabs.co/splidejs/dist/js/splide.min.js"></script>
    <script src="/assets/scripts/promo-slider.js?id=df574ccfbb38858d874e5c170c156993"></script>
    <script src="/assets/scripts/bookmark.js?id=1e5d1af724f0aebeadf1acb369adc5aa"></script>
    <script>
        const uxProjectModal = document.querySelector("#modalUXProject");
        if (uxProjectModal) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                const showModal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById("modalUXProject"));
                showModal.show();
            }, 5000);
        }
    </script>
    <script>
        var tooltipTriggerList = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]'))
        var tooltipList = tooltipTriggerList.map(function(tooltipTriggerEl) {
            return new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl)
        })
    </script>
    <script>
        let brandingFade = document.querySelector(".branding-fade");
        let backlinkFade = document.querySelector(".backlink-fade");
        let backlinkWorkflow = document.querySelector(".workflow-backlink");
        let brandingWorkflow = document.querySelector(".workflow-branding");
        let backlinkTab = document.querySelector(".backlink-tab");
        let brandingTab = document.querySelector(".branding-tab");
        let backlinkTitle = document.querySelector(".backlinkTitle")
        let brandingTitle = document.querySelector(".brandingTitle")
        let learnMoreFirst = document.querySelector(".learn-more-first");
        let learnMoreSecond = document.querySelector(".learn-more-second");
        let tableWrapper = document.querySelector(".table-pricing-cover");
        let buttonBacklink = document.querySelector(".backlink-tab");
        let buttonBranding = document.querySelector(".branding-tab");
        let ourStrategy = document.querySelector(".our-strategy-cover");
        learnMoreFirst.addEventListener("click", function() {
            tableWrapper.scrollIntoView();
            buttonBacklink.click();
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkFade.classList.add("active");
                backlinkFade.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingFade.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            brandingFade.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingWorkflow.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            brandingWorkflow.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkWorkflow.classList.add("active");
                backlinkWorkflow.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            ourStrategy.classList.add("d-flex");
            ourStrategy.classList.remove("d-none");
        })
        learnMoreSecond.addEventListener("click", function() {
            tableWrapper.scrollIntoView();
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingFade.classList.add("active");
                brandingFade.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            buttonBranding.click();
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkFade.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            backlinkFade.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkWorkflow.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            backlinkWorkflow.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingWorkflow.classList.add("active");
                brandingWorkflow.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            ourStrategy.classList.add("d-none");
            ourStrategy.classList.remove("d-flex");
        })
        backlinkTab.addEventListener("click", function() {
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkFade.classList.add("active");
                backlinkFade.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingFade.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            brandingFade.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingWorkflow.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            brandingWorkflow.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkWorkflow.classList.add("active");
                backlinkWorkflow.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            ourStrategy.classList.add("d-flex");
            ourStrategy.classList.remove("d-none");
            backlinkTitle.classList.remove("d-none")
            brandingTitle.classList.remove("d-block")
            backlinkTitle.classList.add("d-block")
            brandingTitle.classList.add("d-none")
            // console.log(backlinkTitle)
            // console.log(brandingTitle)
        })
        brandingTab.addEventListener("click", function() {
            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingFade.classList.add("active");
                brandingFade.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkFade.classList.remove("active");
            }, 250);
            backlinkFade.classList.remove("show");
            setTimeout(function() {
                backlinkWorkflow.classList.remove("active");
            }, 150);
            backlinkWorkflow.classList.remove("show");

            setTimeout(function() {
                brandingWorkflow.classList.add("active");
                brandingWorkflow.classList.add("show");
            }, 151);
            ourStrategy.classList.add("d-none");
            ourStrategy.classList.remove("d-flex");
            backlinkTitle.classList.remove("d-block")
            brandingTitle.classList.remove("d-none")
            backlinkTitle.classList.add("d-none")
            brandingTitle.classList.add("d-block")
            console.log(backlinkTitle)
            console.log(brandingTitle)
        })
    </script>
    <script>
        // let elmToastError = document.getElementById("toast-error");
        // let elmToastSuccess = document.getElementById("toast-success");

        // const onDeleteListener = (e, buttonDelete, cardList, divider) => {

        //                 })
        //             } else {
        //                 elmToastError.querySelector(
        //                     ".message"
        //                 ).innerHTML = result.message;
        //                 elmToastError.style.display = "block";
        //                 setTimeout(function() {
        //                     elmToastError.style.display = "none";
        //                 }, 3000);
        //             }
        //         })
        //         .catch(function(error) {
        //             buttonDelete.removeAttribute("disabled");
        //             console.log(error);
        //         });
        // }

        // let elsCardList = document.querySelectorAll(".card-list");
        // elsCardList.forEach(cardList => {
        //     const buttonDelete = cardList.querySelector('.btn-delete');
        //     let divider = cardList.nextElementSibling;
        //     buttonDelete.addEventListener('click', (e) => onDeleteListener(e, buttonDelete, cardList, divider));
        // });
    </script>

    <script>
        const region = 'id';
        const fetchListData = (category = 'writing') => {
            fetch("/data/your-list", {
                    headers: {
                        "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document
                            .querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                            .getAttribute("content"),
                    },
                    method: "get",
                })
                .then((response) => response.json())
                .then((result) => {
                    let yourListKrt = document.querySelectorAll('#your-list-krt .accordion-body');
                    let yourListSeo = document.querySelectorAll("#your-list-seo-consultant .accordion-body");
                    let yourListWriting = document.querySelectorAll("#your-list-writing .accordion-body");
                    let yourListMarketing = document.querySelectorAll("#your-list-marketing .accordion-body");

                    let yourListEl = category == 'keyword_rank_tracker' ? yourListKrt : category == 'seo-services' ?
                        yourListSeo : category == 'content-writing' ? yourListWriting : yourListMarketing;
                    let listCardResult = category == 'keyword_rank_tracker' ? result.data.list_serp : category ==
                        'seo-services' ? result.data.list_seo : category == 'content-writing' ? result.data
                        .list_writing : result.data.list_marketing;
                    let isAuth = Object.prototype.toString.call(listCardResult) === '[object Array]';

                    yourListEl.forEach(elContainer => {
                        elContainer.innerHTML = `
                            <div class="card-list-group">
                                <div class="your-list-container">
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `
                        let yourListContainer = elContainer.querySelector(".your-list-container");

                        listData = isAuth ? listCardResult : Object.entries(listCardResult);
                        listData.forEach((detail, idx) => {
                            let data = JSON.parse(isAuth ? detail['detail'] : detail[1]);
                            let cardList = document.createElement("div");
                            cardList.className = "d-flex align-items-center card-list"
                            cardList.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                                <h5 class="list-subtitle">${data['label']}</h5>
                                </div>
                                <div class="d-flex flex-column mt-2">
                                    <p class="list-text smaller">${'Estimated Price'}</p>
                                    <p class="list-text primary">${region == 'id' ? data['cost']['id_label'] : data['cost']['en_label']}</p>
                                </div>
                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-w-icon btn-delete" data-category="${category}" data-type="${isAuth ? detail['type'] : detail[0]}" data-detail="${isAuth ? detail['detail'] : detail[1]}">
                                    <i class="bx bxs-x-circle btn-icon txt-dark-50"></i>
                                </button>
                            `
                            let divider = document.createElement("div");
                            divider.className = 'list-divider';
                            const buttonDelete = cardList.querySelector("button");

                            yourListContainer.appendChild(cardList);

                            if (idx !== listData.length - 1)
                                yourListContainer.appendChild(divider);
                            else
                                divider = null;

                            buttonDelete.addEventListener("click", (e) => onDeleteListener(e,
                                buttonDelete, cardList, divider));
                        });
                    })
                });
        }
    </script>


    
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", (event) => {
            const cmlabsSwal = swal?.mixin({
                customClass: {
                    confirmButton: 'btn button-primary-70',
                    cancelButton: 'btn button-gray-50'
                },
                buttonsStyling: false
            })
        })
    </script>

    
    
            <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            // Check if the event is related to sessionStorage
            const isCloseVanguard = sessionStorage.getItem("close-vanguard") ?? null;
            const tabCoverElement = document.querySelector(".cover-tab-container")
            if (isCloseVanguard) {
                tabCoverElement.style.top = "70px"
            } else {
                if(window.innerWidth >= 768 && window.innerWidth <= 991){
                    tabCoverElement.style.top = "136px"
                } else {
                    tabCoverElement.style.top = "136px"
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            let menuSection = document.querySelectorAll('.cover-tab');
            let link = document.querySelectorAll('.cover-tab-link');

            // for clickable event
            menuSection.forEach(v => {
                v.onclick = (() => {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        menuSection.forEach(j => j.classList.remove('active'))
                        v.classList.add('active')
                    }, 300)
                })
            })

            link.forEach(v => {
                v.onclick = (() => {
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        link.forEach(j => j.classList.remove('active'))
                        v.classList.add('active')
                    }, 300)
                })
            })

            // for window scrolldown event
            window.onscroll = function() {
                let mainSection = document.querySelectorAll('section');
                let link = document.querySelectorAll('.cover-tab-link');

                mainSection.forEach((v, i) => {
                    let rect = v.getBoundingClientRect().y
                    if (rect < window.innerHeight - 500) {
                        menuSection.forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active'))
                        menuSection[i].classList.add('active')
                        link.forEach(v => v.classList.remove('active'))
                        link[i].classList.add('active')
                    }
                })
            }
        })
    </script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://cmlabs.co/js/daterangepicker/daterangepicker.js"></script>
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/moment.js/2.30.1/moment.min.js"></script>

    <script>
         $(document).ready(function() {
            let requiredLogin = null;
                            requiredLogin =
                    "https://cmlabs.co/en-id/login?logged_target=https%3A%2F%2Fcmlabs.co%2Fen-id%2Fpricing%2Fmedia-buying%3Fns%3Dtrue"
            
            const domain = $('#domain-url').val()
            if (domain == '') {
                $('#who-is-check').prop('disabled', true);
                $('#button-submit-domain').prop('disabled', true);
            } else {
                $('#who-is-check').prop('disabled', false);
            }

            $('#openModal').on('click', function(event){
                event.preventDefault();
                if (requiredLogin != null) {
                window.location.href = requiredLogin;
                return;
                }else{
                    $('#submit-domain-modal').modal('show');
                }
            });

        });
         $(document).on('change', '#domain-name', function() {
            var domainName = $('#domain-name').val().toLowerCase();
            var forbiddenWords = ["porn","gambling", "judi","sex","pijat","thresom","slot","udi","judol","pasutri","pijet","togel","blackjack","poker","mlm","ganja","narkoba","sakau","primbon","khodam","pinjol","judol","khodam","kasino","casino","taruhan","cabul","cuci uang","prostitusi"];
            var isForbidden = forbiddenWords.some(word => domainName.includes(word));
            console.log(isForbidden);
        if (isForbidden) {
             $(function() {
                swal.fire({
                    text: "Domain names must not contain prohibited words.",
                    icon: "warning",
                    buttonsStyling: false,
                    confirmButtonText: "Ok",
                    customClass: {
                        confirmButton: "btn button-primary-70 w-fit"
                    }
                }).then(function() {
                     $('#domain-name').val('');
                });
            });
            return false;
        }
       })
         $(document).on('change', '#domain-url', function() {
            const domain = $('#domain-url').val()
            var domainUrl = $('#domain-url').val().toLowerCase();
            var domainPattern = /^www\.[a-z0-9-]+\.[a-z]+$/;

            var domainNameUrl = $('#domain-url').val().toLowerCase();
            var forbiddenWords = ["porn","gambling", "judi","sex","pijat","thresom","slot","udi","judol","pasutri","pijet","togel","blackjack","poker","mlm","ganja","narkoba","sakau","primbon","khodam","pinjol","judol","khodam","kasino","casino","taruhan","cabul","cuci uang","prostitusi","janda binal"];
            var isForbidden = forbiddenWords.some(word => domainNameUrl.includes(word));

        if (!domainPattern.test(domainUrl) || isForbidden) {
            $(function() {
                swal.fire({
                    text: "Invalid URL domain. Must be in the format www.example.com without additional paths.",
                    icon: "warning",
                    buttonsStyling: false,
                    confirmButtonText: "Ok",
                    customClass: {
                        confirmButton: "btn button-primary-70 w-fit"
                    }
                }).then(function() {
                     $('#domain-url').val('');
                });
            });
            return false;
        }
            if (domain == '') {
                $('#who-is-check').prop('disabled', true);
            } else {
                $('#who-is-check').prop('disabled', false);
            }
        })
        $(document).on('click', '#who-is-check', function() {
            $.ajax({
                url: 'https://whois.sequence.day/',
                type: 'POST',
                data: {
                    url: $('#domain-url').val()
                },
                success: function(response) {
                    if (response == true) {
                        $('#button-submit-domain').prop('disabled', false)
                        $('#who-is-check').prop('disabled', false)
                        $('#whois-true').removeClass("d-none")
                        $('#whois-false').addClass("d-none")
                    }else{
                        $('#button-submit-domain').prop('disabled', true)
                        $('#whois-true').addClass("d-none")
                        $('#whois-false').removeClass("d-none")
                    }
                },
                error: function(xhr, status, error) {
                    $('#button-submit-domain').prop('disabled', true)
                    $('#whois-true').addClass("d-none")
                    $('#whois-false').removeClass("d-none")
                }
            });
        })

        const changeType = (id) => {
            $(".backlink-type-container").hide()
            $("#" + id).show()
        }
    </script>
    <script>
        // Interactions for backlink form
        const stepHeader = document.querySelectorAll(".placement-header .row .col-12")
        const steps = document.querySelectorAll(".placement-content .steps.backlink-step")
        const stepDesc = document.querySelector(".step-desc")
        const medias = document.querySelectorAll(".media-single .media")
        const mediaSingleChoice = document.querySelectorAll(".media-single .media.single-choice")
        const placementHeader = document.querySelector(".backlink-placement-header")
        const placementContent = document.querySelector(".backlink-placement-content")

        medias.forEach((media) => {
            media.addEventListener("click", () => {
                const input = media.nextSibling.nextSibling
                input.checked = !input.checked

                media.classList.toggle("active")
            })
        })

        mediaSingleChoice.forEach((media) => {
            media.addEventListener("click", () => {
                const input = media.nextSibling.nextSibling
                input.click()

                mediaSingleChoice.forEach((item) => {
                    item.classList.remove("active")
                })
                media.classList.toggle("active")
            })
        })

        let requiredLogin = null;
                    requiredLogin =
                "https://cmlabs.co/en-id/login?logged_target=https%3A%2F%2Fcmlabs.co%2Fen-id%2Fpricing%2Fmedia-buying%3Fns%3Dtrue"
        
        function nextStep(step) {
            const step1ReadTnc = $(".read-tnc.step-1");
            const step3ReadTnc = $(".read-tnc.step-3");

            if (step === 1) {
                if (!step1ReadTnc.prop("checked")) {
                    step1ReadTnc.addClass("error")
                    $("#errorTnc").show()
                    $("#selectedStatus").hide()
                    return
                } else {
                    step1ReadTnc.removeClass("error")
                    $("#selectedStatus").show()
                    $("#errorTnc").hide()
                }

            }

            if (step === 2) {
                step3ReadTnc.prop("checked", false);
                $(".checkout-btn").prop("disabled", true);
            }

            if (requiredLogin != null) {
                window.location.href = requiredLogin;
                return;
            }

            steps[step - 1].classList.add("d-none")
            steps[step].classList.remove("d-none")

            document.querySelector('.backlink-placement-container').scrollIntoView();
            switch (step) {
                case 1:
                    fetchingDataStep2();
                    break;
                case 2:
                    fetchingDataStep3();
                    break;
                case 3:
                    break;
                default:
                    return null
            }
        }

        function prevStep(step) {
            steps[step].classList.add("d-none")
            steps[step - 1].classList.remove("d-none")

            switch (step) {
                case 1:
                    fetchingData();
                    break;
                case 2:
                    fetchingDataStep2();
                    break;
                case 3:
                    fetchingDataStep3();
                    break;
                default:
                    return null
            }
        }

            </script>

    
    
    <script>
    const brandingReadmore = document.querySelector(".branding-readmore");
    const brandingClose = document.querySelector(".close-branding");

    brandingReadmore.addEventListener("click", function(){
        if(brandingReadmore.classList.contains("invisible")){
            brandingReadmore.classList.remove("invisible");
            brandingReadmore.classList.add("visible");
        }else{
            brandingReadmore.classList.add("invisible");
            brandingReadmore.classList.remove("visible");
        }
    })

    brandingClose.addEventListener("click", function(){
        brandingReadmore.classList.remove("invisible");
        brandingReadmore.classList.add("visible");
    })
</script>
<script>
    let readWorkflow = document.querySelector(".read-more-workflow");
    let closeWorkflow = document.querySelector(".close-workflow");
    let collapseWorkflow = document.querySelector(".collapse-workflow")

    readWorkflow.addEventListener("click", function(){
        if(collapseWorkflow.classList.contains("closed")){
            collapseWorkflow.classList.remove("closed")
        }else{
            collapseWorkflow.classList.add("closed")
        }

        if(readWorkflow.parentElement.classList.contains("active")){
            readWorkflow.parentElement.classList.remove("active");
        }else{
            readWorkflow.parentElement.classList.add("active");
        }
    })

    closeWorkflow.addEventListener("click", function(){
        readWorkflow.parentElement.classList.remove("active");
        setTimeout(function() {
            collapseWorkflow.classList.add("closed");
            }, 349);
    })
</script>
<script>
    let navItem = document.querySelectorAll(".our-strategy-media");
    navItem.forEach(item => {
        item.addEventListener("click", function(){
            navItem.forEach(li => {
                li.parentElement.classList.add("not-circled");
                li.parentElement.classList.remove("active");
            })
            this.parentElement.classList.remove("not-circled");
            this.parentElement.classList.add("active");
        })
    });
</script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
            const formInputs = document.querySelectorAll(".form-required-desktop");
            const submitButtons = document.querySelectorAll("#submitBtn");

            const formInputsMobile = document.querySelectorAll(".form-required-mobile");
            const submitButtonMobile = document.querySelectorAll("#submitBtnMobile");

            formInputs.forEach(function(input) {
                input.addEventListener("input", () => checkInputs(formInputs, submitButtons));
            });

            formInputsMobile.forEach(function(input) {
                input.addEventListener("input", () => checkInputs(formInputsMobile, submitButtonMobile));
            });

            function checkInputs(formInputs, submitButtons) {
                let empty = false;
                formInputs.forEach(function(input) {
                    if (input.value === '') {
                        empty = true;
                    }
                });

                if (empty) {
                    submitButtons.forEach((btn) => {
                        btn.disabled = true;
                    })
                } else {
                    submitButtons.forEach((btn) => {
                        btn.disabled = false;
                    })
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        let mediaForm = document.querySelector("div.accordion-item#accordion_item_media")
        let mediaFormMobile = document.querySelector("div.accordion-item#accordion_item_media_mobile")
        let bloggerForm = document.querySelector("div.accordion-item#accordion_item_blogger")
        let bloggerFormMobile = document.querySelector("div.accordion-item#accordion_item_blogger_mobile")
        let checkOnlinePublisher = document.querySelector("input[type=checkbox]#check_online_publisher")
        let checkBlogger = document.querySelector("input[type=checkbox]#check_blogger")
        let checkOnlinePublisherMobile = document.querySelector("input[type=checkbox]#check_online_publisher_mobile")
        let checkBloggerMobile = document.querySelector("input[type=checkbox]#check_blogger_mobile")

        var tooltipTriggerList = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]'))
        var tooltipList = tooltipTriggerList.map(function(tooltipTriggerEl) {
            return new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl)
        })

        checkOnlinePublisher.addEventListener("change", function() {
            if (this.checked) {
                mediaForm.classList.remove("d-none")
            } else {
                mediaForm.classList.add("d-none")
            }
        });

        checkBlogger.addEventListener("change", function() {
            if (this.checked) {
                bloggerForm.classList.remove("d-none")
            } else {
                bloggerForm.classList.add("d-none")
            }
        });

        checkOnlinePublisherMobile.addEventListener("change", function() {
            if (this.checked) {
                mediaFormMobile.classList.remove("d-none")
            } else {
                mediaFormMobile.classList.add("d-none")
            }
        });

        checkBloggerMobile.addEventListener("change", function() {
            if (this.checked) {
                bloggerFormMobile.classList.remove("d-none")
            } else {
                bloggerFormMobile.classList.add("d-none")
            }
        });
    </script>
    <script src="/assets/scripts/addtolist.js?id=65719259ac607e295f0d6906645ec857"></script>
    <script src="https://cmlabs.co/js/sweetalert2-11.10.8.all.min.js"></script>
    <script>
        let mediaModal = document.getElementById('mediaModal');
        let content = document.querySelector(".modal-body-content");
        let button_container = document.querySelector(".open-more-stats-container");
        let button_open_stats = document.querySelector(".open-more-stats-btn");
        let title = document.getElementById("mediaModalLabel")
        const closeButton = document.querySelector('.btn-close-media-buying');
        const alert_stats = document.querySelector(".alert-stats");
        let is_form = false;

        const validate_email = (email) => {
            const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
            return emailRegex.test(email);
        }

        const form = () => {
            return `
            <form id="form-open-stats">
                <table class="form-stats-table">
                    <tbody>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="form-stats-first-col">
                                <label>Full Name</label>
                            </td>
                            <td class="form-stats-second-col">
                                <input type="text" placeholder="eg. Ruono Putra" id="full-name-input-stats"/>
                            </td>
                            <td class="form-stats-third-col">
                                <div>
                                    <i class='bx bxs-toggle-right'></i>
                                    <span>Required</span>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="form-stats-first-col">
                                <label>Whatsapp</label>
                            </td>
                            <td class="form-stats-second-col">
                                <input type="text" placeholder="eg. 0821 3900 8050" id="whatsapp-input-stats"/>
                            </td>
                            <td class="form-stats-third-col">
                                <div>
                                    <i class='bx bxs-toggle-right'></i>
                                    <span>Required</span>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="form-stats-first-col">
                                <label>Company Email</label>
                            </td>
                            <td class="form-stats-second-col">
                                <input type="email" placeholder="eg. business@cmlabs.co" id="email-input-stats"/>
                            </td>
                            <td class="form-stats-third-col">
                                <div>
                                    <i class='bx bx-toggle-left'></i>
                                    <span>Additional</span>
                                </div>
                            </td>
                        </tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
            </form>
            `
        }

        const stats = () => {
            return `
            <table class="table-open-stats">
                <tbody>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_da_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.moz_da}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Spam Score</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_score}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Linking Root Domain</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_root_domain !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_root_domain : "-"}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>ahrefs</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da : "-"}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da : "-"}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Total Visits (Projection)</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Similarweb</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_projection !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_projection : "-"}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Captured Keyword</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_keywords !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_keywords : "-"}</td>
                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td class="open-stats-first-column">Keyword on Pageone</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                        <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_updates}</td>
                        <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_pageone !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_pageone : "-"}</td>
                    </tr>
                </tbody>
            </table>
            `
        }

        const handle_button_form = async (e) => {
            if (!is_form) {
                is_form = true;
                content.innerHTML = form();
                button_open_stats.innerHTML = `<i class='bx bxs-lock-open'></i> Open Stats Now!`;
                alert_stats.style.display = "none";
            } else {
                // Disable button to prevent spam
                button_open_stats.disabled = true;
                closeButton.disabled = true;
                button_open_stats.innerHTML = `Loading...`;

                // Submit form
                await submit_form(e);

                // Enable button
                button_open_stats.disabled = false;
                closeButton.disabled = false;
                button_open_stats.innerHTML = `<i class='bx bxs-lock-open'></i> Open Stats Now!`;
            }
        }

        const convertToYearMonthFormat = (dateString) => {
            // Date not available
            if (dateString == undefined || dateString == "") return "-";

            // Date available
            const inputDate = new Date(dateString);
            const options = {
                year: 'numeric',
                month: 'long'
            };
            const lang = "by"
            if (lang == "oleh") {
                return inputDate.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', options);
            } else {
                return inputDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options);
            }
        };

        const formatNumberWithSuffix = (number) => {
            // Return if undefined
            if (number == undefined) {
                return number;
            }

            // Return if it's a percentage
            if (number.includes("%")) {
                return number;
            }

            // Parsing numbers
            const suffixes = ["", "K", "M", "B", "T"];
            let suffixIndex = 0;
            number = Number(number);

            while (number >= 1000 && suffixIndex < suffixes.length - 1) {
                number /= 1000;
                suffixIndex++;
            }

            if (Number.isInteger(number)) {
                return number.toFixed(0) + suffixes[suffixIndex];
            } else {
                return number.toFixed(2) + suffixes[suffixIndex];
            }
        };

        const submit_form = async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            let name = document.getElementById("full-name-input-stats").value;
            let email = document.getElementById("email-input-stats").value;
            let phone = document.getElementById("whatsapp-input-stats").value;

            if (name !== "" && phone !== "") {
                // Check if phone number valid or not
                if (/^\d+$/.test(phone) && (email == "" || validate_email(email))) {
                    // Submit Form
                    const formDataStat = new FormData();

                    formDataStat.append('locale', "en");
                    formDataStat.append('name', name);
                    formDataStat.append('email', email);
                    formDataStat.append('phone_number', phone);

                    try {
                        const response = await fetch("/data/input-media-buying-stat", {
                            headers: {
                                "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document
                                    .querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                    .getAttribute("content"),
                            },
                            method: "post",
                            body: formDataStat,
                        })
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.log(error)
                    }

                    // Fetch data stats
                    let mediaId = mediaModal.dataset.mediaId;
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch(`/page/api/media?id=${mediaId}`, {
                            headers: {
                                "Content-Type": "application/json",
                                "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                                "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                    .getAttribute('content')
                            },
                            method: 'GET',
                        });

                        if (response.ok) {
                            // Get data
                            const data = await response.json();

                            // Set title modal
                            title.innerHTML = "Stats for " + data.data.media.base +
                                "<span style='font-weight: normal'>  / " + data.data.media.group + "</span>";

                            // Set score for each scoring
                            mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media.ahrefs_da);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_da = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media.moz_da);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_root_domain = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .moz_links_root_domain);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_score = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .moz_spam_score);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_keywords = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .semrush_captured_keywords);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media.semrush_da);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_pageone = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .semrush_keyword_pageone);
                            mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_projection = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data
                                .media.simillarweb_visits_projection);

                            // Set date for each scoring
                            mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .ahrefs_da_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_da_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .moz_da_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .moz_links_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .moz_spam_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .semrush_captured_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .semrush_da_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .semrush_keyword_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .simillarweb_visits_updates);

                            // Check if alert needs to be shown
                            if (data.data.media.ahrefs_da_updates == "" || data.data.media.moz_da_updates == "" ||
                                data.data.media.moz_links_updates == "" || data.data.media.moz_spam_updates == "" ||
                                data.data.media.semrush_captured_updates == "" || data.data.media
                                .semrush_da_updates == "" ||
                                data.data.media.semrush_keyword_updates == "" || data.data.media
                                .simillarweb_visits_updates == "") {
                                alert_stats.style.display = "flex";
                            } else {
                                alert_stats.style.display = "none";
                            }
                        } else {
                            throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error:', error);
                    }

                    sessionStorage.setItem("open-stats-success", true);
                    close_form();
                    button_container.style.display = "none";
                    content.innerHTML = stats();
                } else if (email != "" && !validate_email(email)) {
                    // Email is invalid
                    Swal.fire({
                        text: "Email is invalid.",
                        icon: "error",
                        buttonsStyling: false,
                        confirmButtonText: "Ok, got it!",
                        customClass: {
                            confirmButton: "btn font-weight-bold btn-light"
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // Phone number is invalid (contains non-digit characters)
                    Swal.fire({
                        text: "Phone number must be digits only.",
                        icon: "error",
                        buttonsStyling: false,
                        confirmButtonText: "Ok, got it!",
                        customClass: {
                            confirmButton: "btn font-weight-bold btn-light"
                        }
                    });
                }
            } else {
                // Form is incomplete
                Swal.fire({
                    text: "Please insert your full name, phone number, and email first.",
                    icon: "error",
                    buttonsStyling: false,
                    confirmButtonText: "Ok, got it!",
                    customClass: {
                        confirmButton: "btn font-weight-bold btn-light"
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        const close_form = (e) => {
            is_form = false;
        }

        // Lock stats
        button_open_stats.addEventListener('click', handle_button_form);
