        closeButton.addEventListener('click', close_form);
    </script>
    <script>
        let mediaLists = [];
        let mediaGroups = [];
        const groupContainer = document.getElementById("mediaGroupContainer");
        const container = document.getElementById("mediaContainer");
        const searchInput = document.getElementById("searchInput");

        const mediaGroup = (group) => {
            return `
            <div class="form-check">
                <input name="media-group" class="form-check-input"
                    type="checkbox" value="${group}"
                    id="${group}" checked>
                <label class="form-check-label b1-400 b1-m-400" for="${group}">
                    ${group}
                </label>
            </div>`;
        };

        const mediaCard = (base, name, id) => {
            return `
            <div class="col-6 col-md-3" style="cursor: pointer;">
                <div id="media-${id}" class="rounded-2 bg-white px-2 py-3 b2-700 text-center media-card" data-media-id="${id}">
                ${base}
                </div>
                <p class="text-center s-400 mt-1 cursor-pointer">${name}</p>
            </div>`;
        };

        const updateMediaGroupDisplay = () => {
            mediaGroups.forEach(group => {
                groupContainer.innerHTML += mediaGroup(group);
            });
        };

        const updateMediaDisplay = () => {
            container.innerHTML = "";

            const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="media-group"]:checked');
            const selectedGroups = Array.from(checkboxes).map(checkbox => checkbox.value);

            const isAllSelected = selectedGroups.includes("all");
            const searchQuery = searchInput.value.toLowerCase().trim();

            const filteredMedia = mediaLists.filter(media => {
                const groupMatch = selectedGroups.includes(media.group);
                const nameMatch = media.url.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery);
                return (isAllSelected || groupMatch) && nameMatch;
            });

            filteredMedia.forEach(media => {
                container.innerHTML += mediaCard(media.base, media.name, media.id);
            });

            document.querySelector(".domainCount").innerHTML = filteredMedia.length

            // Add event listener to each media card
            const mediaCards = document.querySelectorAll('.media-card');
            const mediaModal = document.getElementById('mediaModal');
            const button_container = document.querySelector(".open-more-stats-container");
            const modalDialog = document.querySelector(".modal-dialog");
            const spinner = document.querySelector(".spinner");
            const button_open_stats = document.querySelector(".open-more-stats-btn");
            const alert_stats = document.querySelector(".alert-stats");

            // Close the modal when the overlay is clicked
            const closeModal = function() {
                mediaModal.classList.remove('show');
                mediaModal.style.display = 'none';
                document.body.classList.remove('modal-open');
            };

            const locked_stats = () => {
                return `
                <table class="table-open-stats">
                    <tbody>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_da_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>${mediaModal.dataset.moz_da}</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Spam Score</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>${mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_score}</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Linking Root Domain</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> Dummy Date</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>-</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>ahrefs</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> Dummy Date</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>-</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> Dummy Date</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>-</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Total Visits (Projection)</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Similarweb</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> Dummy Date</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>-</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Captured Keyword</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> Dummy Date</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>-</div></td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Keyword on Pageone</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> Dummy Date</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column"><div>-</div></td>
                        </tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                `
            }

            const unlocked_stats = () => {
                return `
                <table class="table-open-stats">
                    <tbody>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_da_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.moz_da}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Spam Score</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_score}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Linking Root Domain</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>MOZ</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_root_domain !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_root_domain : "-"}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>ahrefs</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da : "-"}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Domain Authority</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da : "-"}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Total Visits (Projection)</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Similarweb</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_projection !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_projection : "-"}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Captured Keyword</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_keywords !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_keywords : "-"}</td>
                        </tr>
                        <tr>
                            <td class="open-stats-first-column">Keyword on Pageone</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-second-column"><span>by <strong>Semrush</strong></span></td>
                            <td class="open-stats-third-column-open"><i class='bx bx-calendar-exclamation'></i> ${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_updates}</td>
                            <td class="open-stats-fourth-column-open">${mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_pageone !== "undefined" ? mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_pageone : "-"}</td>
                        </tr>
                    </tbody>
                </table>
                `
            }

            const convertToYearMonthFormat = (dateString) => {
                // Date not available
                if (dateString == undefined || dateString == "") return "-";

                // Date available
                const inputDate = new Date(dateString);
                const options = {
                    year: 'numeric',
                    month: 'long'
                };
                const lang = "by"
                if (lang == "oleh") {
                    return inputDate.toLocaleDateString('id-ID', options);
                } else {
                    return inputDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options);
                }
            };

            const formatNumberWithSuffix = (number) => {
                // Return if undefined
                if (number == undefined) {
                    return number;
                }

                // Return if it's a percentage
                if (number.includes("%")) {
                    return number;
                }

                // Parsing numbers
                const suffixes = ["", "K", "M", "B", "T"];
                let suffixIndex = 0;
                number = Number(number);

                while (number >= 1000 && suffixIndex < suffixes.length - 1) {
                    number /= 1000;
                    suffixIndex++;
                }

                if (Number.isInteger(number)) {
                    return number.toFixed(0) + suffixes[suffixIndex];
                } else {
                    return number.toFixed(2) + suffixes[suffixIndex];
                }
            };

            let content = document.querySelector(".modal-body-content");

            mediaCards.forEach(function(mediaCard) {
                mediaCard.addEventListener('click', async function() {
                    const mediaId = this.dataset.mediaId;
                    mediaModal.dataset.mediaId = mediaId;

                    // Show modal
                    modalDialog.style.display = 'none';
                    mediaModal.classList.add('show');
                    mediaModal.style.display = 'block';
                    spinner.style.display = 'block';
                    document.body.classList.add('modal-open');

                    let title = document.getElementById("mediaModalLabel")
                    let apiUrl = "production" === "production" ? "https://cmlabs.co" :
                        "https://staging.cmlabs.dev"

                    // Fetch data
                    try {
                        const response = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/page/api/media?id=${mediaId}`, {
                            headers: {
                                "Content-Type": "application/json",
                                "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                                "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector(
                                    'meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content'),
                                "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
                                "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "*",
                            },
                            method: 'GET',
                        });

                        if (response.ok) {
                            // Get data
                            const data = await response.json();

                            // Set title modal
                            title.innerHTML = "Stats for " + data.data.media.base +
                                "<span style='font-weight: normal'> / " + data.data.media.group +
                                "</span>";

                            // Set button text
                            button_open_stats.innerHTML = "<i class='bx bxs-lock-open'></i> " +
                                "Want to open more Stats?";

                            // Set score for each scoring
                            mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .ahrefs_da);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_da = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .moz_da);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_root_domain = formatNumberWithSuffix(data
                                .data.media.moz_links_root_domain);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_score = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data
                                .media.moz_spam_score);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_keywords = formatNumberWithSuffix(
                                data.data.media.semrush_captured_keywords);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da = formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                .semrush_da);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_pageone = formatNumberWithSuffix(data
                                .data.media.semrush_keyword_pageone);
                            mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_projection =
                                formatNumberWithSuffix(data.data.media
                                    .simillarweb_visits_projection);

                            // Set date for each scoring
                            mediaModal.dataset.ahrefs_da_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data
                                .data.media.ahrefs_da_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_da_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data
                                .media.moz_da_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_links_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data
                                .data.media.moz_links_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.moz_spam_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data
                                .media.moz_spam_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_captured_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(
                                data.data.media.semrush_captured_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_da_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(data
                                .data.media.semrush_da_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.semrush_keyword_updates = convertToYearMonthFormat(
                                data.data.media.semrush_keyword_updates);
                            mediaModal.dataset.simillarweb_visits_updates =
                                convertToYearMonthFormat(data.data.media
                                .simillarweb_visits_updates);

                            // Check if alert needs to be shown
                            if (data.data.media.ahrefs_da_updates == "" || data.data.media
                                .moz_da_updates == "" ||
                                data.data.media.moz_links_updates == "" || data.data.media
                                .moz_spam_updates == "" ||
                                data.data.media.semrush_captured_updates == "" || data.data.media
                                .semrush_da_updates == "" ||
                                data.data.media.semrush_keyword_updates == "" || data.data.media
                                .simillarweb_visits_updates == "") {
                                alert_stats.style.display = "flex";
                            } else {
                                alert_stats.style.display = "none";
                            }

                            // Check session
                            if (data.data.media.simillarweb_visits_updates == undefined) {
                                sessionStorage.removeItem("open-stats-success");
                            }
                        } else {
                            throw new Error('Network response was not ok');
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        console.error('Error:', error);
                    }

                    // Check if locked or unlocked
                    if (sessionStorage.getItem("open-stats-success")) {
                        button_container.style.display = "none";
                        content.innerHTML = unlocked_stats();
                    } else {
                        button_container.style.display = "block";
                        content.innerHTML = locked_stats();
                    }

                    // Show popup
                    spinner.style.display = 'none';
                    modalDialog.style.display = 'block';
                });
            });

            const closeButton = document.querySelector('.btn-close-media-buying');
            closeButton.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
        };

        const handleCheckboxChange = (checkbox) => {
            const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="media-group"]');
            if (checkbox.value === "all") {
                checkboxes.forEach(otherCheckbox => {
                    if (otherCheckbox !== checkbox) {
                        otherCheckbox.checked = checkbox.checked;
                    }
                });
            } else if (!checkbox.checked) {
                document.querySelector('input[value="all"]').checked = false;
            }
            updateMediaDisplay();
        }

        const addCheckboxListeners = () => {
            const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="media-group"]');
            checkboxes.forEach(checkbox => {
                checkbox.addEventListener('change', () => {
                    handleCheckboxChange(checkbox);
                });
            });
        }

        const apiUrl = "production" === "production" ? "https://cmlabs.co" : "https://staging.cmlabs.dev"

        fetch(apiUrl + '/page/api/media-list?lang=en', {
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json",
                    "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                    "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content'),
                    "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
                    "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "*",
                },
                method: 'GET',
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(response => {
                mediaGroups = response.data.mediaGroups;
                updateMediaGroupDisplay();
                mediaLists = response.data.medias;
                updateMediaDisplay();
                addCheckboxListeners();
                // document.querySelector(".last_update").innerHTML = response.data.lastUpdate
            })
            .catch(error => {
                console.error('Error:', error);
            });


        // event listener for search
        searchInput.addEventListener('input', updateMediaDisplay);
    </script>
    <script>
        const MIN_BACKLINK_DOMAIN = 2
        let selectedDomains = [];

        if (localStorage.getItem('selectedDomains') != null) {
            selectedDomains = localStorage.getItem('selectedDomains').split(',');
        }

        const buttonStep1 = document.querySelector('#button-step-1');
        const selectedDomainsText = document.querySelector("#total-selected-domains")
        const qualifiedText = document.querySelector("#qualified")
        const clearSelected = document.querySelector("#clear-selected-domains");

        const showEmptyDomain = () => {
            let divDomain = document.querySelector("#domain-list");
            divDomain.innerHTML =
                `<p class='b1-400 b1-m-400 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center text-center'>No domains are currently available. We will update soon...</p>`
        }

        const removeSelected = () => {
            const domains = document.querySelectorAll(".media-single")
            domains.forEach(media => {
                media.querySelector("input").checked = false
                media.querySelector(".media").classList.remove("active")
            });

            localStorage.removeItem('selectedDomains');

            selectedDomainsText.innerHTML = "No domain(s) selected"
            clearSelected.classList.add("d-none")
            qualifiedText.classList.add("d-none")
            buttonStep1.disabled = true
            selectedDomains = []
        }

        let searchDomainText = "";
        const searchDomainInput = document.querySelector("#search-domain");

        searchDomainInput.addEventListener("keyup", function() {
            searchDomainText = searchDomainInput.value;
            fetchingData();
        })

        let scoreFilters = "";

        const fetchingData = () => {
            const isAllCategory = document.querySelector(`input[name="domain-category"][value="all"]`).checked
            const isAllTopics = document.querySelector(`input[name="domain-topic"][value="all"]`).checked

            fetch(`/page/api/backlink-domains?categories=${!isAllCategory ? categoryIds : ''}&topics=${!isAllTopics ? topicIds : ''}&search=${searchDomainText}${scoreFilters}`, {
                    headers: {
                        "Content-Type": "application/json",
                        "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                        "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content')
                    },
                    method: 'get',
                })
                .then((response) => response.json())
                .then((result) => {
                    if (categoryIds.length !== 0 && topicIds.length !== 0) {
                        domainData = result.data
                        loadData(result.data)
                    } else {
                        loadData(result.data)
                        // showEmptyDomain()
                    }
                })
                .catch((error) => console.error(error));
        }

        fetchingData();

        const loadData = (data) => {
            let divDomain = document.querySelector("#domain-list");
            divDomain.innerHTML = '';

            if (data.totalDomains == 0) {
                showEmptyDomain()
            }

            if (data.totalDomains > 0) {
                data.domains.forEach(domain => {
                    let item = document.createElement('div');
                    item.classList.add("col-6")
                    item.classList.add("col-sm-3")
                    item.classList.add("col-lg-3")

                    if (selectedDomains.includes(domain.id.toString())) {
                        if (domain.icon != "") {
                            item.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media active">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/${domain.icon}" alt="${domain.name}" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="${domain.name}" id="${domain.name}" value=${domain.id} hidden checked>
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">${domain.name}</p>
                                </div>`;
                        } else {
                            item.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media active">
                                        <b>${domain.name}</b>
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="${domain.name}" id="${domain.name}" value=${domain.id} hidden checked>
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">${domain.name}</p>
                                </div>`;
                        }
                    } else {
                        if (domain.icon != "") {
                            item.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/${domain.icon}" alt="${domain.name}" class="img-fluid">
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="${domain.name}" id="${domain.name}" value=${domain.id} hidden>
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">${domain.name}</p>
                                </div>`;
                        } else {
                            item.innerHTML = `
                                <div class="media-single">
                                    <div class="media">
                                        <b>${domain.name}</b>
                                    </div>
                                    <input type="checkbox" name="${domain.name}" id="${domain.name}" value=${domain.id} hidden checked>
                                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">${domain.name}</p>
                                </div>`;
                        }
                    }
                    divDomain.appendChild(item);
                });

                if (selectedDomains.length > 0) {
                    selectedDomainsText.innerHTML = `${selectedDomains.length} domain(s) selected`;
                    clearSelected.classList.remove("d-none")

                    if (selectedDomains.length >= MIN_BACKLINK_DOMAIN) {
                        buttonStep1.disabled = false;
                    }
                } else {
                    selectedDomainsText.innerHTML = `No domain(s) selected`;
                }

                const totalDomain = document.querySelector("#total-domains");
                totalDomain.innerHTML =
                    `Showing ${data.totalDomains} domain(s)`

                // Medias
                const medias = document.querySelectorAll(".media-single .media")
                medias.forEach((media) => {
                    media.addEventListener("click", () => {
                        const input = media.nextSibling.nextSibling
                        input.checked = !input.checked

                        if (input.checked) {
                            if (!(selectedDomains.includes(input.value))) {
                                selectedDomains.push(input.value)
                            }
                            selectedDomainsText.innerHTML =
                                `${selectedDomains.length} domain(s) selected`;
                            clearSelected.classList.remove("d-none")

                            if (selectedDomains.length >= MIN_BACKLINK_DOMAIN) {
                                buttonStep1.disabled = false;
                                qualifiedText.classList.remove("d-none")
                            } else {
                                qualifiedText.classList.add("d-none")
                            }
                        } else {
                            selectedDomains.splice(selectedDomains.indexOf(input.value), 1);
                            if (selectedDomains.length > 0) {
                                selectedDomainsText.innerHTML =
                                    `${selectedDomains.length} domain(s) selected`;
                            } else {
                                selectedDomainsText.innerHTML = `No domain(s) selected`;
                            }

                            if (selectedDomains.length < MIN_BACKLINK_DOMAIN) {
                                buttonStep1.disabled = true;
                                qualifiedText.classList.add("d-none")
                            }
                        }

                        localStorage.setItem('selectedDomains', selectedDomains);
                        media.classList.toggle("active")
                    })
                })
            }
        }

        fetchingData();
    </script>
    <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-throttle-debounce/1.1/jquery.ba-throttle-debounce.min.js">
    </script>
    <script>
        const CHECK_BANNED_DOMAIN_API = '/api/backlink/check-domain'
        let domain
        const selectedDomainOrder = document.querySelector("#selected-domain-order");

        function isJsonEmpty(json) {
            for (var key in json) {
                if (json.hasOwnProperty(key) && json[key] === '') {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        function getCheckedRadioValue(input) {
            const radios = document.querySelectorAll('input[type="radio"][name="' + input.name + '"]');
            for (const radio of radios) {
                if (radio.checked) {
                    return radio.value;
                }
            }

            return '';
        }

        function isValueNotEmpty(value) {
            if (Array.isArray(value)) {
                return value.every(item => item !== '');
            } else {
                return value !== '';
            }
        }

        function checkObjectValuesNotDraft(obj) {
            for (const key in obj) {
                if (obj.hasOwnProperty(key) && !key.includes('Option')) {
                    if (!isValueNotEmpty(obj[key])) {
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            }
            return true;
        }

        function checkObjectValuesNotEmpty(obj) {
            for (const key in obj) {
                if (key != 'isError')
                    if (obj.hasOwnProperty(key) && !key.includes('Option') && !key.includes('variation') && !key.includes(
                            'demand') && !key.includes('specs-follow')) {
                        if (isValueNotEmpty(obj[key])) {
                            return false;
                        }
                    }
            }
            return true;
        }

        function extractBaseDomain(url) {
            var domain;
            // find & remove protocol (http, ftp, etc.) and get the domain
            if (url.indexOf("://") > -1) {
                domain = url.split('/')[2];
            } else {
                domain = url.split('/')[0];
            }

            // find & remove port number
            domain = domain.split(':')[0];

            return domain;
        }

        const saveDetailData = (domain, isError = false) => {
            const formDomainDetail = document.querySelector(`#form-step-2-domain`);

            $('input[data-type="suggest"][value="suggest"]:checked').each((index, el) => {
                const cardElement = $(el).closest('.detail-card');
                const inputNoSuggest = cardElement.find('.input-no-suggest input');

                inputNoSuggest.slice(2).parent().remove();
                inputNoSuggest.val('Suggest me!');
            });


            if (formDomainDetail) {
                let formDomainInputs = formDomainDetail.querySelectorAll(`.form-input-domain`);
                let cleanFormDomainInputs = [];
                let ktVariations = [];
                let anchorVariations = [];
                let arrayFormInput = [];

                formDomainInputs.forEach(input => {
                    const nameValue = $(input).attr('name');
                    const keywordMatch = /variation_keyword\[\d+\]/.test(nameValue);
                    const anchorMatch = /variation_anchor\[\d+\]/.test(nameValue);
                    const isArrayInput = /^.+\[\d+\]$/.test(nameValue)

                    if (!keywordMatch && !anchorMatch && !isArrayInput) {
                        cleanFormDomainInputs.push(input);
                    }

                    if (isArrayInput && !keywordMatch && !anchorMatch) {
                        arrayFormInput.push(input);
                    }

                    if (keywordMatch) {
                        const matches = nameValue.match(/\[(\d+)\]\[(\d+)\]/);
                        const i = parseInt(matches[1]);
                        const j = parseInt(matches[2]);

                        if (!ktVariations[i]) {
                            ktVariations[i] = [];
                        }

                        if (!ktVariations[i][j]) {
                            ktVariations[i][j] = $(input).val().trim();
                        }
                    }

                    if (anchorMatch) {
                        const matches = nameValue.match(/\[(\d+)\]\[(\d+)\]/);
                        const i = parseInt(matches[1]);
                        const j = parseInt(matches[2]);

                        if (!anchorVariations[i]) {
                            anchorVariations[i] = [];
                        }

                        if (!anchorVariations[i][j]) {
                            anchorVariations[i][j] = $(input).val().trim();
                        }
                    }
                });

                let mergedArray = {}
                arrayFormInput.forEach(input => {
                    const name = input.name
                    const baseKey = name.replace(/\[\d+\]$/, '');
                    if (!mergedArray[baseKey]) {
                        mergedArray[baseKey] = [];
                    }

                    const index = name.match(/\d+/)[0];
                    mergedArray[baseKey][index] = input.type === 'radio' ? getCheckedRadioValue(input) : input
                        .value.trim();
                })

                let domainDetail = JSON.parse(localStorage.domainDetail || '{}');

                cleanFormDomainInputs.forEach(input => {
                    domainDetail[domain.id] = {
                        ...domainDetail[domain.id],
                        ...mergedArray,
                        [input.name]: input.type === 'radio' ? getCheckedRadioValue(input) : input.value,
                        'specs-variation_keyword': ktVariations.length > 0 ? ktVariations : domainDetail[
                            domain.id]['specs-variation_keyword'],
                        'specs-variation_anchor': anchorVariations.length > 0 ? anchorVariations :
                            domainDetail[domain.id]['specs-variation_anchor'],
                        'isError': isError,
                    };
                });

                localStorage.domainDetail = JSON.stringify(domainDetail);
            }
        }

        const fetchingDataStep2 = (media = null) => {
            fetch(`/page/api/backlink-domains?selectedDomains=${selectedDomains}`, {
                    headers: {
                        "Content-Type": "application/json",
                        "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                        "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content')
                    },
                    method: 'get',
                })
                .then((response) => response.json())
                .then((result) => loadDataStep2(result.data))
                .then(() => {
                    if (media) {
                        $(`#${media.id}`).addClass("active")
                    }
                })
                .catch((error) => console.error(error));
        }

        const loadDataStep2 = (data) => {
            let divDomainSaved = document.querySelector("#saved-selected-domain-list");
            divDomainSaved.innerHTML = '';

            let divDomainEmpty = document.querySelector("#empty-selected-domain-list");
            divDomainEmpty.innerHTML = '';

            let divDomainDraft = document.querySelector("#draft-selected-domain-list");
            divDomainDraft.innerHTML = '';

            let countSavedDomains = 0;
            let countEmptyDomains = 0;
            let countDraftDomains = 0;

            let updatedData = {}
            data.domains.forEach(domain => {
                let item = document.createElement('div');
                item.classList.add("col-6")
                item.classList.add("col-sm-3")
                item.classList.add("col-lg-3")

                item.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="media-single">
                        <div class="media single-choice" id="selected-media-${domain.id}">
                        <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/${domain.icon}" alt="${domain.name} icon" class="img-fluid">
                        </div>
                        <input type="checkbox" name="${domain.name}" id="${domain.name}" value=${domain.id} hidden checked>
                        <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">${domain.name}</p>
                    </div>`

                let getDomainStorage = null;
                if (localStorage.domainDetail != null) {
                    getDomainStorage = JSON.parse(localStorage.domainDetail)[domain.id]
                }

                const demand = getDomainStorage?.demand

                if (demand && demand != 2) {
                    if (typeof getDomainStorage == 'object') {
                        for (const key in getDomainStorage) {
                            if (Array.isArray(getDomainStorage[key])) {
                                getDomainStorage[key].splice(1, 1);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    getDomainStorage.demand = '1'
                }

                const isError = getDomainStorage?.isError ?? false

                updatedData[domain.id] = getDomainStorage ?? {}

                if (getDomainStorage == null || checkObjectValuesNotEmpty(getDomainStorage)) {
                    divDomainEmpty.appendChild(item);
                    countEmptyDomains++;
                } else if (
                    checkObjectValuesNotDraft(getDomainStorage) && !isError
                ) {
                    divDomainSaved.appendChild(item);
                    countSavedDomains++;
                } else {
                    divDomainDraft.appendChild(item);
                    countDraftDomains++;
                }
            });

            if (countDraftDomains == 0 && countEmptyDomains == 0) {
                $('.button-step-2').prop('disabled', false);
                $('#qualified-step-2').removeClass('d-none');
            } else {
                $('#qualified-step-2').addClass('d-none');
                $('.button-step-2').prop('disabled', true);
            }

            $('.count-saved').html(`Saved (${countSavedDomains})`);
            $('.count-empty').html(`Empty (${countEmptyDomains})`);
            $('.count-draft').html(`Draft (${countDraftDomains})`);

            const totalSelectedDomainText = document.querySelector("#selected-domain-total");
            totalSelectedDomainText.innerHTML = `${selectedDomains.length} domain(s) selected`;

            const mediaSingleChoice = document.querySelectorAll(".media-single .media.single-choice")
            mediaSingleChoice.forEach((media) => {
                media.addEventListener("click", () => {
                    if (typeof domain != 'undefined') {
                        const isErrorExist = $('.input-url.error-input')
                        saveDetailData(domain, isErrorExist.length > 0)

                        selectedDomainOrder.innerHTML = `Please select a domain`
                        fetchingDataStep2(media);
                    }

                    const input = media.nextSibling.nextSibling
                    input.click()

                    mediaSingleChoice.forEach((item) => {
                        item.classList.remove("active")
                    });

                    media.classList.add("active")
                    selectedDomainOrder.innerHTML = "";

                    let order = document.createElement('div');
                    order.classList.add("selected-domain-detail")
                    order.classList.add("position-sticky")
                    order.classList.add("top-0")

                    const mediaId = media.id.split('-')[2];

                    fetch(`/page/api/backlink-domain?selectedDomain=${mediaId}`, {
                            headers: {
                                "Content-Type": "application/json",
                                "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                                "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                    .getAttribute('content')
                            },
                            method: 'get',
                        })
                        .then((response) => response.json())
                        .then(function(result) {
                            domain = result.data.domain
                            const updatedAt = new Date(domain.updated_at)
                            let getLocalStorage = null
                            let domainStorage = {};

                            const newInputRow = (variationType, currentCounter, value, isFirst =
                                false) => {
                                return `
                                    <div class='d-flex gap-2 position-relative'>
                                        <input type="text" value='${value}' class="form-control ${variationType} b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" placeholder="e.g. best seo services" name="specs-${variationType}[${currentCounter}]">
                                        ${!isFirst ? `<button type='button' class='btn p-1 position-absolute ${variationType} delete-row' data-name="${variationType}" style="right: 0; top: 2px;"><i class='bx bx-x text-gray-100'></i></button>` : ''}
                                    </div>
                                `;
                            }

                            // Function to add a new variation row
                            function addVariation(container, currentCounter, variationType, value =
                                '') {
                                if (container.children().length < 5) {
                                    const deleteBtn = container.parent().find('.btn-add')
                                    const newInput = $(newInputRow(variationType, currentCounter,
                                        value));

                                    newInput.find('.delete-row').on("click", function() {
                                        if (container.children().length <= 5) {
                                            deleteBtn.css('opacity', 1);
                                            deleteBtn.prop('disabled', false);
                                        }
                                        $(this).closest("div").remove();
                                        updateIndices(container, variationType);
                                    });

                                    container.append(newInput);
                                    currentCounter++;
                                    updateIndices(container, variationType);

                                    if (container.children().length >= 5) {
                                        deleteBtn.css('opacity', 0);
                                        deleteBtn.prop('disabled', true);
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            // Function to update the indices
                            function updateIndices(container, variationType) {
                                container.find('.form-input-domain').each(function(index) {
                                    $(this).attr('name',
                                        `specs-${variationType}[${index}]`);
                                });
                            }

                            if (localStorage.domainDetail) {
                                getLocalStorage = JSON.parse(localStorage.domainDetail)
                                if (getLocalStorage[domain.id] != null) {
                                    domainStorage = getLocalStorage[domain.id];
                                } else {
                                    domainStorage['specs-url'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['specs-follow'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['specs-main_keyword'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['specs-main_anchor'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['specs-word_count'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['keywordTargetOption'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['anchorTextOption'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['specs-key_message'] = ['', '']
                                    domainStorage['main_anchor'] = ['', '']
                                }
                            } else {
                                domainStorage['specs-url'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['specs-follow'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['specs-main_keyword'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['specs-main_anchor'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['specs-word_count'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['keywordTargetOption'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['anchorTextOption'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['specs-key_message'] = ['', '']
                                domainStorage['main_anchor'] = ['', '']
                            }

                            // VARIATION
                            let variationKeywordsLength, variationAnchorsLength;
                            if (domainStorage['specs-variation_keyword'] != undefined) {
                                variationKeywordsLength = [domainStorage['specs-variation_keyword'][
                                        0
                                    ].length, domainStorage['specs-variation_keyword'][1]
                                    .length
                                ];
                            } else {
                                variationKeywordsLength = [0, 0]
                            }

                            if (domainStorage['specs-variation_anchor'] != undefined) {
                                variationAnchorsLength = [domainStorage['specs-variation_anchor'][0]
                                    .length, domainStorage['specs-variation_anchor'][1].length
                                ];
                            } else {
                                variationAnchorsLength = [0, 0]
                            }

                            let variationKeywordsInput = ["", ""],
                                variationAnchorsInput = ["", ""];

                            for (let i = 0; i < 2; i++) {
                                if (variationKeywordsLength[i] > 0) {
                                    for (let j = 0; j < variationKeywordsLength[i]; j++) {
                                        variationKeywordsInput[i] += newInputRow(
                                            `variation_keyword[${i}]`, j, domainStorage[
                                                'specs-variation_keyword'][i][j], j === 0)
                                    }
                                }

                                if (variationAnchorsLength[i] > 0) {
                                    for (let j = 0; j < variationAnchorsLength[i]; j++) {
                                        variationAnchorsInput[i] += newInputRow(
                                            `variation_anchor[${i}]`, j, domainStorage[
                                                'specs-variation_anchor'][i][j], j === 0)
                                    }
                                }

                                // zero / nothing / new input
                                if (variationKeywordsLength[i] == 0 || variationKeywordsLength[i] ==
                                    undefined) {
                                    variationKeywordsInput[i] += `
                                      <input type="text" class="form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" id="kw_variation" placeholder="e.g. best seo services" name="specs-variation_keyword[${i}][0]">
                                    `;
                                }

                                if (variationAnchorsLength[i] == 0 || variationAnchorsLength[i] ==
                                    undefined) {
                                    variationAnchorsInput[i] += `
                                    <input type="text" class="form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" id="anchor_variation" placeholder="e.g. best seo services" name="specs-variation_anchor[${i}][0]">
                                  `;
                                }
                            }

                            const suggestWarning = () => `
                                <div class="warning-card yellow suggest-me-warning d-none">
                                    <div class="warning-card-icon">
                                        <i class="bx bx-error-circle"></i>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="warning-card-text">
                                        <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0">The suggestion from our writer will be informed to you once you process this order</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `

                            const backlinkForm = (i, variationAnchorsInput, domainStorage,
                                domain) => `
                                <div>
                                    <div class="detail-card with-copy backlink-${i} section-to-copy-url">
                                        <div class="detail-card-header flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-lg-center gap-2">
                                            <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Overview<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                        </div>

                                        <div class='form-group'>
                                            <label for="url" class="form-label">URL</label>
                                            <input type="text" class="input-url form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" id="url"
                                                placeholder="e.g. www.cmlabs.co" name="specs-url[${i-1}]" value=${domainStorage['specs-url'][i-1] || "" }>                                        
                                            <div class='error same s-400 s-m-400 text-danger-70' style="display: none">Base domain must be same with backlink ${i === 1 ? 2 : 1}</div>
                                            <div class='error banned s-400 s-m-400 text-danger-70' style="display: none">Domain has been detected as a banned domain.</div>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="d-flex gap-3 mt-2">
                                            <div class="form-check form-check-inline">
                                                <input class="form-check-input form-input-domain" type="radio" id="dofollow[${i-1}]" value="follow"
                                                    name="specs-follow[${i-1}]" ${domainStorage['specs-follow'][i-1]=='follow' ? 'checked' : '' } checked>
                                                <label class="form-check-label" for="dofollow[${i-1}]">Dofollow</label>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="form-check form-check-inline">
                                                <input class="form-check-input form-input-domain" type="radio" id="nofollow[${i-1}]" value="nofollow"
                                                    name="specs-follow[${i-1}]" ${domainStorage['specs-follow'][i-1]=='nofollow' ? 'checked' : '' }>
                                                <label class="form-check-label" for="nofollow[${i-1}]">Nofollow</label>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    
                                    <div class='copy-button copy-url'>
                                        <span class='b2-400 b2-m-400'>Apply to All</span>
                                        <button type='button' data-backlink-index='${i}' data-section="url" class='copy-section copy-url b2-400 b2-m-400 btn button-outline button-primary-70 px-2'>Apply & Change Value</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="detail-card with-copy backlink-${i} section-to-copy-main_keyword">
                                        <div class="detail-card-header flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-lg-center gap-2">
                                            <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Keyword Target<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                            <div>
                                                <label for="keywordTargetManual[${i-1}]">
                                                    <input type="radio" data-type='suggest' checked id="keywordTargetManual[${i-1}]" name="keywordTargetOption[${i-1}]" value="manual"
                                                        class="d-none form-input-domain" ${domainStorage['keywordTargetOption'][i-1]=='manual' ? 'checked'
                                                        : '' }></input>
                                                    <div class="btn button-radio-backlink b2-400 b1-m-400">Manual</div>
                                                </label>
                                                <label for="keywordTargetSuggest[${i-1}]">
                                                    <input type="radio" data-type='suggest' id="keywordTargetSuggest[${i-1}]" name="keywordTargetOption[${i-1}]" value="suggest"
                                                        class="d-none form-input-domain" ${domainStorage['keywordTargetOption'][i-1]=='suggest' ? 'checked'
                                                        : '' }></input>
                                                    <div class="btn button-radio-backlink b2-400 b1-m-400">Suggest me!</div>
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>

                                        ${suggestWarning()}

                                        <div class='input-no-suggest'>
                                            <label for="main_keyword" class="form-label">Main Keyword</label>
                                            <input type="text" class="form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" id="main_keyword"
                                                placeholder="e.g. seo sevices" name="specs-main_keyword[${i-1}]"
                                                value="${domainStorage['specs-main_keyword'][i-1] || ""}">
                                        </div>

                                        <div class='input-no-suggest'>
                                            <label for="kw_variation" class="form-label">Variation</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-end">
                                                <div class="d-flex flex-column gap-2 w-100" id="KTvariations${i-1}">
                                                    ${variationKeywordsInput[i-1]}
                                                </div>
                                                <button id="addVariationKT${i-1}" type="button" class="btn btn-add button-primary-70"><i
                                                        class='bx bx-plus'></i></button>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class='copy-button copy-main-keyword'>
                                        <span class='b2-400 b2-m-400'>Apply to All</span>
                                        <button type='button' data-backlink-index='${i}' data-section="main_keyword" class='copy-section copy-url b2-400 b2-m-400 btn button-outline button-primary-70 px-2'>Apply & Change Value</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div>                                    
                                    <div class="detail-card with-copy backlink-${i} section-to-copy-main_anchor">
                                        <div class="detail-card-header flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-lg-center gap-2">
                                            <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Anchor Text<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                            <div>
                                                <label for="anchorTextManual[${i-1}]">
                                                    <input type="radio" data-type='suggest' checked id="anchorTextManual[${i-1}]" name="anchorTextOption[${i-1}]" value="manual"
                                                        class="d-none form-input-domain" ${domainStorage['anchorTextOption'][i-1]=='manual' ? 'checked' : ''
                                                        }></input>
                                                    <div class="btn button-radio-backlink b2-400 b1-m-400">Manual</div>
                                                </label>
                                                <label for="anchorTextSuggest[${i-1}]">
                                                    <input type="radio" data-type='suggest' id="anchorTextSuggest[${i-1}]" name="anchorTextOption[${i-1}]" value="suggest"
                                                        class="d-none form-input-domain" ${domainStorage['anchorTextOption'][i-1]=='suggest' ? 'checked' : ''
                                                        }></input>
                                                    <div class="btn button-radio-backlink b2-400 b1-m-400">Suggest me!</div>
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>

                                        ${suggestWarning()}

                                        <div class='input-no-suggest'>
                                            <label for="main_anchor" class="form-label">Main Anchor Text</label>
                                            <input type="text" class="form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" id="main_anchor"
                                                placeholder="e.g. seo sevices" name="specs-main_anchor[${i-1}]"
                                                value="${domainStorage['specs-main_anchor'][i-1] || ""}">
                                        </div>

                                        <div class='input-no-suggest'>
                                            <label for="anchor_variation" class="form-label">Variation</label>
                                            <div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-end">
                                                <div class="d-flex flex-column gap-2 w-100" id="Anchorvariations${i-1}">
                                                    ${variationAnchorsInput[i-1]}
                                                </div>
                                                <button id="addVariationAnchor${i-1}" type="button" class="btn btn-add button-primary-70"><i
                                                        class='bx bx-plus'></i></button>
                                            </div </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class='copy-button copy-main-anchor'>
                                        <span class='b2-400 b2-m-400'>Apply to All</span>
                                        <button type='button' data-backlink-index='${i}' data-section="main_anchor" class='copy-section copy-url b2-400 b2-m-400 btn button-outline button-primary-70 px-2'>Apply & Change Value</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div>
                                    <div class="detail-card with-copy backlink-${i} section-to-copy-key_message">
                                        <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Key Message<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                        <div class="">
                                            <textarea class="form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" id="message" name="specs-key_message[${i-1}]"
                                                placeholder='e.g: emphasize that our SEO services are premium and strictly maintain quality'>${domainStorage['specs-key_message'][i-1] ?? ""}</textarea>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class='copy-button copy-key-message'>
                                        <span class='b2-400 b2-m-400'>Apply to All</span>
                                        <button type='button' data-backlink-index='${i}' data-section="key_message" class='copy-section copy-url b2-400 b2-m-400 btn button-outline button-primary-70 px-2'>Apply & Change Value</button>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `

                            order.innerHTML =
                                `
                            <div class="detail-header flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-start align-items-lg-center gap-2">
                            <div class="detail-media">
                                <div class="image-container bg-white">
                                    <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/${domain.icon}" alt="${domain.name}" class="img-fluid">
                                </div>
                                <p class="p-700 p-m-700 m-0 text-dark-70">${domain.name}</p>
                            </div>
                            <p class="s-400 s-m-400 m-0 text-dark-30">Last updated at ${('0' + updatedAt.getDate()).slice(-2)}/${('0' +
                                (updatedAt.getMonth()+1)).slice(-2)}/${updatedAt.getFullYear()}</p>
                            </div>

                            <form action="#" class="detail-body b2-400 b1-m-400 text-dark-70 text-start" id="form-step-2-domain">
                            <div class="detail-card">
                                <div class="detail-card-header flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-lg-center gap-2">
                                    <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Backlink<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <label for="backlink_qty" class="form-label">Backlink qty</label>
                                    <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between w-100">
                                        <div class="d-flex gap-3">
                                            <div class="form-check">
                                                <input class="form-check-input form-input-domain" type="radio" name="demand" value="1"
                                                    id="backlink_1" checked>
                                                <label class="form-check-label" for="backlink_1">
                                                    1
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                            <div class="form-check ${domain.backlink_max > 1 ? '' : 'd-none'}">
                                                <input class="form-check-input form-input-domain" type="radio" name="demand" value="2"
                                                    id="backlink_2" ${domainStorage['demand']=='2' ? 'checked' : '' }>
                                                <label class="form-check-label" for="backlink_2">
                                                    2
                                                </label>
                                            </div>
                                        </div>
                                        <p class="text-gray-110 text-decoration-underline s-400" data-bs-toggle="tooltip"
                                            data-bs-placement="bottom" title="This restriction is intended to prevent backlinks from being detected as spam.">Why only 1 or 2?</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <nav class='detail-card nav-backlink'>
                                <div class="nav nav-tabs" id="nav-tab" role="tablist">
                                    <button class="flex-1 nav-link active" id="nav-home-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#nav-home" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="nav-home" aria-selected="true">Backlink 1</button>
                                    <button class="flex-1 nav-link" id="nav-profile-tab" data-bs-toggle="tab" data-bs-target="#nav-profile" type="button" role="tab" aria-controls="nav-profile" aria-selected="false">Backlink 2</button>
                                </div>
                            </nav>
                            <div class="tab-content" id="nav-tabContent">
                                <div class="tab-pane fade show active" id="nav-home" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="nav-home-tab">
                                    ${backlinkForm(1, variationAnchorsInput, domainStorage, domain)}    
                                </div>
                                <div class="tab-pane fade" id="nav-profile" role="tabpanel" aria-labelledby="nav-profile-tab">
                                    ${backlinkForm(2, variationAnchorsInput, domainStorage, domain)}    
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="detail-card">
                                <div class="detail-card-header flex-column flex-lg-row align-items-lg-center gap-2">
                                    <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Article Specification<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                    <div>
                                        <label for="articleSpecManual">
                                            <input type="radio" data-type='suggest' checked id="articleSpecManual" name="articleSpecOption" value="manual"
                                                class="d-none form-input-domain" ${domainStorage['articleSpecOption']=='manual' ? 'checked'
                                                : '' }></input>
                                            <div class="btn button-radio-backlink b2-400 b1-m-400">Manual</div>
                                        </label>
                                        <label for="articleSpecSuggest">
                                            <input type="radio" data-type='suggest' id="articleSpecSuggest" name="articleSpecOption" value="suggest"
                                                class="d-none form-input-domain" ${domainStorage['articleSpecOption']=='suggest' ? 'checked'
                                                : '' }></input>
                                            <div class="btn button-radio-backlink b2-400 b1-m-400">Suggest me!</div>
                                        </label>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="warning-card">
                                    <div class="warning-card-icon">
                                        <i class="bx bx-comment-detail"></i>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="warning-card-text">
                                        <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0">In order to maintain the backlink content quality, we still use our internal writing team. <a href='#' class='text-underline text-purple-110' data-bs-toggle='modal' data-bs-target='#submit-email-modal'>Click here</a> to get e-mail when this service available for content from external.</p>
                                    </div>
                                </div>                                
                                ${suggestWarning()}
                                
                                <div class='d-none'>SELECTED ${domainStorage['specs-word_count']}</div>

                                <div class='input-no-suggest'>
                                    <label for="main_words" class="form-label">Words</label>
                                    <select class="form-select b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" aria-label="Words" name="specs-word_count" value="${domainStorage['specs-word_count']}">
                                        <option value="suggest" class='d-none' disabled ${domainStorage['specs-word_count'] == ',' || domainStorage['specs-word_count'] == 'suggest' ? 'selected' : '' }>Suggest me!</option>
                                        <option value="" disabled ${domainStorage['specs-word_count'] == ',' || domainStorage['specs-word_count'] == '' ? 'selected' : '' }>Words</option>
                                        <option class='${domain.max_article_words <= 350 || domain.min_article_words > 450 ? 'd-none' : '' }' value="350 - 450" ${domainStorage['specs-word_count']=='350 - 450' ? 'selected' : '' }>350 - 450</option>
                                        <option class='${domain.max_article_words <= 450 || domain.min_article_words > 550 ? 'd-none' : '' }' value="450 - 550" ${domainStorage['specs-word_count']=='450 - 550' ? 'selected' : '' }>450 - 550</option>
                                        <option class='${domain.max_article_words <= 700 || domain.min_article_words > 800 ? 'd-none' : '' }' value="700 - 800" ${domainStorage['specs-word_count']=='700 - 800' ? 'selected' : '' }>700 - 800</option>
                                        <option class='${domain.max_article_words <= 1100 || domain.min_article_words > 1400 ? 'd-none' : '' }' value="1100 - 1400" ${domainStorage['specs-word_count']=='1100 - 1400' ? 'selected' : '' }>1100 - 1400</option>
                                        <option class='${domain.max_article_words <= 1400 ? 'd-none' : '' }' value="1400 - 1500" ${domainStorage['specs-word_count']=='1400 - 1500' ? 'selected' : '' }>1400 - 1500</option>
                                    </select>
                                </div>
                            </div>                            

                            <div class="detail-card">
                                <p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0">Backlink Schedule<span class='required'>*</span></p>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="d-flex gap-2">
                                        <div class="w-100">
                                            <label for="main_anchor" class="form-label">Date Range</label>
                                            <input type="text" class="form-control b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" name="date_range"
                                                value="${domainStorage['date_range'] || ""}" placeholder="Min. 2 days">
                                        </div>
                                    </div>

                                    <div class='mt-2'>
                                        <label for="acnhor_variation" class="form-label">Time Range</label>
                                        <select class="form-select b2-400 b1-m-400 form-input-domain b2-400" name="time_range">
                                            <option disabled value="" ${domainStorage['time_range'] == "" || !domainStorage['time_range'] ? 'selected' : ''}> Time Range</option>
                                            <option value="03:00 - 08:00" ${domainStorage['time_range'] == '03:00 - 08:00' ? 'selected' : ''}>
                                                03:00 - 08:00</option>
                                            <option value="08:00 - 12:00" ${domainStorage['time_range'] == '08:00 - 12:00' ? 'selected' : ''}>
                                                08:00 - 12:00</option>
                                            <option value="12:00 - 15:00" ${domainStorage['time_range'] == '12:00 - 15:00' ? 'selected' : ''}>
                                                12:00 - 15:00</option>
                                            <option value="15:00 - 21:00" ${domainStorage['time_range'] == '15:00 - 21:00' ? 'selected' : ''}>
                                                15:00 - 21:00</option>
                                        </select>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>

                            <div class="d-flex justify-content-end gap-3">
                                <button type="button" class="btn button-dark-40 b2-400 b1-m-400 button-outline"
                                    id="clearAll">Clear All</button>
                                <button type="button" id="submit-form-step-2"
                                    class="btn button-primary-70 b2-400 b1-m-400 button-outline">Save Changes</button>
                            </div>
                            </form>
                            `
                            selectedDomainOrder.appendChild(order);

                            checkBaseDomainMatch()
                            checkAllBannedDomain()

                            // initialize tooltips
                            var tooltipTriggerList = [].slice.call(document.querySelectorAll(
                                '[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]'))
                            var tooltipList = tooltipTriggerList.map(function(tooltipTriggerEl) {
                                return new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl)
                            })

                            var today = new Date();
                            var fiveDaysLater = new Date(today);
                            fiveDaysLater.setDate(today.getDate() + 5);

                            // initialize input date range
                            $('input[name="date_range"]').daterangepicker({
                                "buttonClasses": "btn btn-sm",
                                "applyButtonClasses": "button-primary-70",
                                "cancelClass": "button-gray-100 text-white",
                                autoUpdateInput: false,
                                defaultDate: null,
                                minDate: fiveDaysLater,
                                minSpan: {
                                    "days": 1
                                },
                                maxSpan: {
