                                    "days": 9
                                },
                            });

                            $('input[name="date_range"]').on('apply.daterangepicker', function(ev,
                                picker) {
                                if (picker.startDate.isSame(picker.endDate, 'day')) {
                                    $(".applyBtn").prop("disabled", true)
                                    return;
                                }
                                $(".applyBtn").prop("disabled", false)
                                $(this).val(picker.startDate.format('MM/DD/YYYY') + ' - ' +
                                    picker.endDate.format('MM/DD/YYYY'));
                            });

                            $('input[name="date_range"]').on('cancel.daterangepicker', function(ev,
                                picker) {
                                $(this).val('');
                            });

                            // initial
                            var $input1 = $('input[name="specs-url[0]"]');
                            var $input2 = $('input[name="specs-url[1]"]');

                            // add input event listeners
                            $input1.on('input', $.debounce(300, function() {
                                checkBaseDomainMatch();
                                checkBannedDomain($input1);
                            }));

                            $input2.on('input', $.debounce(300, function() {
                                checkBaseDomainMatch();
                                checkBannedDomain($input2);
                            }));

                            function checkBaseDomainMatch() {
                                var $errorElementSame = $('.error.same');
                                var $errorElementBanned = $('.error.banned');
                                var $errorInput = $('.error').closest(".input-url");

                                var $input1 = $('input[name="specs-url[0]"]');
                                var $input2 = $('input[name="specs-url[1]"]');

                                var value1 = $input1.val().trim();
                                var value2 = $input2.val().trim();

                                var baseDomain1 = extractBaseDomain(value1);
                                var baseDomain2 = extractBaseDomain(value2);


                                if ($('input[name="demand"]:checked').val() == 2) {
                                    if (baseDomain1 !== baseDomain2 && (value1 != '' || value2 !=
                                            '')) {
                                        $errorElementSame.show();
                                        $('.input-url').addClass('error-input')
                                    } else {
                                        $errorElementSame.hide();
                                        $('.input-url').removeClass('error-input')
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            function checkBannedDomain(input) {
                                var url = input.val()
                                var baseDomain = extractBaseDomain(url)
                                var $error = input.next('.error').next('.error');

                                fetch(`${CHECK_BANNED_DOMAIN_API}?domain=${baseDomain}`, {
                                        method: 'GET',
                                        headers: {
                                            "Content-Type": "application/json",
                                            "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                                            "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector(
                                                'meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute(
                                                'content')
                                        }
                                    })
                                    .then(response => {
                                        if (!response.ok) {
                                            throw new Error(
                                                `Network response was not ok (status: ${response.status})`
                                                );
                                        }
                                        return response.json();
                                    })
                                    .then(result => {
                                        if (result.code === 200) {
                                            $error.show();
                                            input.addClass('error-input');
                                        } else {
                                            $error.hide();
                                            input.removeClass('error-input');
                                        }
                                    })
                                    .catch(error => {
                                        console.log("An error occurred:", error);
                                    });
                            }

                            function checkAllBannedDomain() {
                                var $input1 = $('input[name="specs-url[0]"]');
                                var $input2 = $('input[name="specs-url[1]"]');

                                checkBannedDomain($input1);
                                checkBannedDomain($input2);
                            }

                            // add function to copy section to all backlink
                            $('.copy-section').on('click', function() {
                                const backlinkIndex = $(this).data('backlink-index');
                                const section = $(this).data('section');
                                const newIndex = backlinkIndex === 2 ? backlinkIndex - 1 :
                                    backlinkIndex + 1

                                const $sectionToCopy = $(
                                    `.detail-card.backlink-${backlinkIndex}.section-to-copy-${section}`
                                ).clone();

                                // Replace all attributes containing `[${backlinkIndex - 1}]` with `[${newIndex - 1}]`
                                $sectionToCopy.find('*').each(function() {
                                    const attributes = this.attributes;
                                    for (let i = 0; i < attributes.length; i++) {
                                        const attr = attributes[i];

                                        const regexPattern = new RegExp(
                                            `\\b${backlinkIndex - 1}\\b`, 'g');

                                        attr.value = attr.value.replace(
                                            regexPattern, match => match
                                            .replace(backlinkIndex - 1,
                                                newIndex - 1));

                                        if (attr.value.includes('ariation')) {
                                            attr.value = attr.value.replace(
                                                backlinkIndex - 1,
                                                newIndex - 1)
                                        }
                                    }
                                });

                                $sectionToCopy.removeClass(`backlink-${backlinkIndex}`)
                                $sectionToCopy.addClass(`backlink-${newIndex}`)

                                // Replace the section in other backlink detail cards
                                $(`.backlink-${newIndex}.section-to-copy-${section}`)
                                    .replaceWith($sectionToCopy.clone());

                                addVariationHandler("#addVariationKT0", $("#KTvariations0"),
                                    1, "variation_keyword[0]");
                                addVariationHandler("#addVariationAnchor0", $(
                                    "#Anchorvariations0"), 1, "variation_anchor[0]");
                                addVariationHandler("#addVariationKT1", $("#KTvariations1"),
                                    2, "variation_keyword[1]");
                                addVariationHandler("#addVariationAnchor1", $(
                                    "#Anchorvariations1"), 2, "variation_anchor[1]");
                                handleDeleteRowClick(0);
                                handleDeleteRowClick(1);
                                updateIndices($(`#Anchorvariations${newIndex-1}`),
                                    `variation_anchor[${newIndex-1}]`);
                                updateIndices($(`#KTvariations${newIndex-1}`),
                                    `variation_keyword[${newIndex-1}]`);

                                // Handle suggest me behavior and initial check
                                for (let i = 1; i <= 2; i++) {
                                    const radioSuggest = $(
                                        `input[data-type='suggest']`);

                                    radioSuggest.off('change');

                                    // Bind the change event handler
                                    radioSuggest.on('change', function() {
                                        handleRadioChange(this);
                                    });
                                }

                                checkBaseDomainMatch()
                                checkAllBannedDomain()
                            });


                            // add function to clear all button
                            $("#clearAll").on("click", () => {
                                $(".form-control").val("")
                                $(".form-select").val("")
                            })

                            // handle backlink qty value changes
                            if (domainStorage['demand'] == 2) {
                                $(".backlink-2").show()
                                $(".nav-backlink").show()
                                $(".copy-button").show()
                            } else {
                                $(".nav-backlink").hide()
                                $(".backlink-2").hide();
                                $(".copy-button").hide()
                                $("#nav-home-tab").trigger('click')
                                $(".backlink-2 input:not([type='radio'])").val("");
                            }

                            $("input[name='demand']").on("change", function() {
                                if ($(this).val() == 1) {
                                    $(".backlink-2").hide();
                                    $(".nav-backlink").hide()
                                    $("#nav-home-tab").trigger('click')
                                    $(".backlink-2 input:not([type='radio'])").val("");
                                    $(".copy-button").hide()
                                    $('.error').hide();
                                    $('.input-url').removeClass('error-input')
                                } else {
                                    $(".backlink-2").show()
                                    $(".nav-backlink").show()
                                    $(".copy-button").show()
                                    checkBaseDomainMatch()
                                }
                                checkAllBannedDomain()
                            })

                            // handle delete on multiple value input
                            function handleDeleteRowClick(index) {
                                $(`.delete-row[data-name='variation_anchor[${index}]']`).off(
                                    "click");
                                $(`.delete-row[data-name='variation_anchor[${index}]']`).on("click",
                                    function() {
                                        const deleteBtn = $(`#Anchorvariations${index}`)
                                            .parent().find('.btn-add')
                                        deleteBtn.css('opacity', 1);
                                        deleteBtn.prop('disabled', false);

                                        $(this).closest("div").remove();
                                        updateIndices($(`#Anchorvariations${index}`),
                                            `variation_anchor[${index}]`);
                                    });

                                $(`.delete-row[data-name='variation_keyword[${index}]']`).off(
                                    "click");
                                $(`.delete-row[data-name='variation_keyword[${index}]']`).on(
                                    "click",
                                    function() {
                                        const deleteBtn = $(`#KTvariations${index}`).parent()
                                            .find('.btn-add')
                                        deleteBtn.css('opacity', 1);
                                        deleteBtn.prop('disabled', false);

                                        $(this).closest("div").remove();
                                        updateIndices($(`#KTvariations${index}`),
                                            `variation_keyword[${index}]`);
                                    });
                            }

                            handleDeleteRowClick(0);
                            handleDeleteRowClick(1);

                            // handle add on multiple value input
                            function addVariationHandler(buttonSelector, variationsContainer, index,
                                name) {
                                let currentVariation = 1;
                                $(buttonSelector).off("click");
                                $(buttonSelector).on("click", () => {
                                    addVariation(variationsContainer, currentVariation,
                                        name);
                                });
                            }

                            addVariationHandler("#addVariationKT0", $("#KTvariations0"), 1,
                                "variation_keyword[0]");
                            addVariationHandler("#addVariationAnchor0", $("#Anchorvariations0"), 1,
                                "variation_anchor[0]");
                            addVariationHandler("#addVariationKT1", $("#KTvariations1"), 2,
                                "variation_keyword[1]");
                            addVariationHandler("#addVariationAnchor1", $("#Anchorvariations1"), 2,
                                "variation_anchor[1]");

                            // Handle suggest me behavior and initial check
                            for (let i = 1; i <= 2; i++) {
                                const radioSuggest = $(
                                    `input[data-type='suggest']`);

                                radioSuggest.off('change');

                                // Bind the change event handler
                                radioSuggest.on('change', function() {
                                    handleRadioChange(this);
                                });

                                // Initial check
                                checkInitialRadioValue(radioSuggest);
                            }

                            function checkInitialRadioValue(radioElements) {
                                radioElements.each(function() {
                                    handleRadioChange(this);
                                });
                            }

                            function handleRadioChange(radio) {
                                const cardElement = $(radio).closest('.detail-card');
                                const suggestMeNote = cardElement.find('.suggest-me-warning');
                                const inputNoSuggestContainer = cardElement.find(
                                    '.input-no-suggest');
                                const inputNoSuggest = cardElement.find('.input-no-suggest input');
                                const buttonAddNoSuggest = cardElement.find(
                                    '.input-no-suggest button');

                                if (inputNoSuggest.length > 2) {
                                    // inputNoSuggest.slice(2).parent().remove();
                                    inputNoSuggest.parent().parent().parent().find('.btn-add').css(
                                        'opacity', 1);
                                    inputNoSuggest.parent().parent().parent().find('.btn-add').prop(
                                        'disabled', false);
                                }

                                if (radio.value === "suggest" && radio.checked) {
                                    suggestMeNote.removeClass("d-none");
                                    inputNoSuggestContainer.hide();
                                    // inputNoSuggest.val(`Suggest me!`);
                                    cardElement.find('.input-no-suggest select').val('suggest');
                                } else {
                                    suggestMeNote.addClass("d-none");
                                    inputNoSuggestContainer.show();
                                    if (inputNoSuggest.val() == 'Suggest me!') {
                                        inputNoSuggest.val('')
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            // handle submit form
                            const submitForm = document.querySelector("#submit-form-step-2");

                            submitForm.addEventListener("click", () => {
                                const isErrorExist = $('.input-url.error-input')
                                saveDetailData(domain, isErrorExist.length > 0)

                                selectedDomainOrder.innerHTML = `Please select a domain`
                                fetchingDataStep2();
                            })
                        })
                        .catch((error) => console.error(error));
                })
            })
        };
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            const tabs = $('.accordion-item.tab-pane');
            const navTabs = $('.count.nav-link');
            const accordionHeaders = $('.accordion-header.count');
            const accordionCollapse = $('.accordion-collapse.count');

            function adjustTabs() {
                if (window.innerWidth >= 576) {
                    tabs.addClass('active')
                    tabs.addClass('show')
                    navTabs.removeClass('active')
                } else {
                    navTabs.removeClass('active')
                    tabs.removeClass('active')
                    tabs.removeClass('show')

                    $(navTabs[0]).addClass('active')
                    $(tabs[0]).addClass('active')
                    $(tabs[0]).addClass('show')

                    accordionHeaders.addClass('collapsed')
                    accordionCollapse.addClass('show')
                }
            }

            adjustTabs();

            $(window).on('resize', function() {
                adjustTabs();
            });
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        const globalBacklinkPlacement = {
            totalFee: null,
            totalDomainPrice: null,
        };
    </script>

    <script>
        let selectedDomainsInStep3 = [];
        if (localStorage.getItem('selectedDomains') != null) {
            selectedDomainsInStep3 = localStorage.getItem('selectedDomains').split(',');
        }

        const selectedDomainsInStep3Text = document.querySelector("#total-selected-domains-step-3");
        const totalDomainInStep3 = selectedDomainsInStep3.length > 0 ?
            `(${selectedDomainsInStep3.length})` :
            '(0)';
        selectedDomainsInStep3Text.innerHTML = totalDomainInStep3;

        const fetchingDataStep3 = () => {
            fetch(`/page/api/backlink-domains?selectedDomains=${selectedDomains}`, {
                    headers: {
                        "Content-Type": "application/json",
                        "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                        "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content')
                    },
                    method: 'get',
                })
                .then((response) => response.json())
                .then((result) => loadDataStep3(result.data))
                .catch((error) => console.error(error));
        }

        const loadDataStep3 = (data) => {
            let divDomain = document.querySelector("#review-selected-domains");
            divDomain.innerHTML = '';
            let totalDomainFee = 0;

            data.domains.forEach(domain => {
                let item = document.createElement('div');
                item.classList.add("col-6")
                item.classList.add("col-sm-3")
                item.classList.add("col-lg-3")
                item.innerHTML = `
                <div class="media-single">
                    <div class="media single-choice" id="selected-media-${domain.id}">
                    <img src="https://s3-cdn.cmlabs.co/${domain.icon}" alt="${domain.name} icon" class="img-fluid">
                    </div>
                    <input type="checkbox" name="${domain.name}" id="${domain.name}" value=${domain.id} hidden checked>
                    <p class="text-center s-400 text-dark-50">${domain.name}</p>
                </div>
                `;

                const demand = parseInt(JSON.parse(localStorage.domainDetail)[domain.id].demand);
                totalDomainFee += parseInt(domain.price.backlink);
                if (demand == 2 && domain.price.additional != null && domain.price.priceType == "additional-price") {
                    totalDomainFee += parseInt(domain.price.additional);
                }

                totalDomainFee = parseInt(totalDomainFee);
                globalBacklinkPlacement.totalDomainPrice = totalDomainFee;
                divDomain.appendChild(item);
            });

            const formatIDR = new Intl.NumberFormat('en-ID', {
                style: 'currency',
                currency: 'IDR',
                minimumFractionDigits: 0,
            });

            let serviceFee = 25000;
            let vatFee = (totalDomainFee + serviceFee) * 11 / 100;
            let totalFee = totalDomainFee + serviceFee + vatFee;

            globalBacklinkPlacement.totalFee = totalFee;
            vatFee = formatIDR.format(vatFee);
            serviceFee = formatIDR.format(serviceFee);
            totalDomainFee = formatIDR.format(totalDomainFee)
            totalFee = formatIDR.format(totalFee);

            let divCheckout = document.querySelector(".checkout")
            divCheckout.innerHTML = '<p class="b1-700 b1-m-700 m-0 text-dark-70 mt-4 mt-lg-0">Checkout Summary</p>';
            let divCheckoutBody = document.createElement('div');
            divCheckoutBody.classList.add("checkout-body");

            divCheckoutBody.innerHTML = `
                <div class="checkout-detail">
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Name</p>
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">Guest</p>
                </div>
                <div class="checkout-detail">
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Total*</p>
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${totalDomainFee}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="checkout-detail">
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Service Fee</p>
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${serviceFee}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="checkout-detail">
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">VAT (11%)</p>
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${vatFee}</p>
                </div>
                <div class="checkout-detail">
                    <hr class="border-top border-dark-40 w-100 m-0">
                </div>
                <div class="checkout-detail">
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Total Cost</p>
                    <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${totalFee}</p>
                </div>
            `;

            const totalFeeStep4 = document.querySelector('#total-fee')
            totalFeeStep4.innerHTML = totalFee;
            divCheckout.appendChild(divCheckoutBody);

            const mediaSingleChoice = document.querySelectorAll(".media-single .media.single-choice")
            mediaSingleChoice.forEach((media) => {
                media.addEventListener("click", () => {
                    const input = media.nextSibling.nextSibling
                    input.click()

                    mediaSingleChoice.forEach((item) => {
                        item.classList.remove("active")
                    })
                    media.classList.toggle("active")

                    const selectedDomainSpec = document.querySelector(".preview-spec");
                    selectedDomainSpec.innerHTML = "";
                    const mediaId = media.id.split('-')[2];
                    fetch(`/page/api/backlink-domain?selectedDomain=${mediaId}`, {
                        headers: {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json",
                            "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                            "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')
                                .getAttribute('content')
                        },
                        method: 'get',
                    }).then(function(response) {
                        return response.json();
                    }).then(function(result) {
                        const domain = result.data.domain
                        const updatedAt = new Date(domain.updated_at)
                        const getLocalStorage = JSON.parse(localStorage.domainDetail)
                        let domainStorage = {};
                        if (getLocalStorage[domain.id] != null) {
                            domainStorage = getLocalStorage[domain.id];
                        }
                        let specHeader = document.createElement('div');
                        specHeader.classList.add("preview-header")
                        specHeader.innerHTML = `
                            <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Backlink Specification: <strong class="text-dark-70">${domain.name}</strong></p>
                            <p class="b1-400 b1-m-400 m-0 text-dark-40">Backlink qty: <strong class="text-dark-70">${domainStorage['demand']}</strong></p>
                        `
                        selectedDomainSpec.innerHTML = ""
                        selectedDomainSpec.appendChild(specHeader);
                        let specBody = document.createElement('div');
                        specBody.classList.add("preview-body")

                        const variationKeywordsLength = Object.keys(domainStorage).filter(key =>
                            key.startsWith('specs-variation_keyword')).length;
                        const variationAnchorsLength = Object.keys(domainStorage).filter(key =>
                            key.startsWith('specs-variation_anchor')).length;

                        let variationKeywordsText = "",
                            variationAnchorsText = "";

                        // more than 1
                        if (variationKeywordsLength > 0) {
                            for (let i = 0; i < variationKeywordsLength; i++) {
                                variationKeywordsText += `
                                    <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${domainStorage[`specs-variation_keyword[${i}]`]}</p>
								`;
                            }
                        }

                        if (variationAnchorsLength > 0) {
                            for (let i = 0; i < variationAnchorsLength; i++) {
                                variationAnchorsText += `
                                    <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${domainStorage[`specs-variation_anchor[${i}]`]}</p>
								`;
                            }
                        }

                        const getVariationList = (variationLists) => {
                            let lists = '<ul>'
                            variationLists.forEach((item) => {
                                if (variationLists != "")
                                    lists +=
                                    `<li class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${item}</li>`
                            })
                            lists += '</ul>'

                            return lists
                        }

                        const getBacklinkList = (index) => `
                            <div class='b2-700 text-uppercase text-gray-110 text-start'>BACKLINK ${index}</div>
                            <div class="accordion-item">
                                <p class="accordion-header">
                                <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#kwTarget${index}" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="kwTarget${index}">
                                    Keyword Target                                </button>
                            </p>
                            <div id="kwTarget${index}" class="accordion-collapse collapse show">
                                <div class="accordion-body text-start">
                                <div class="text-container">
                                    <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20">MAIN KEYWORD</p>
                                    <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${domainStorage['specs-main_keyword'][index-1]}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="text-container">
                                    <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20">VARIATION KEYWORD</p>
                                    ${domainStorage['keywordTargetOption'][index-1] !== 'suggest' ? getVariationList(domainStorage['specs-variation_keyword'][index-1]) : '<p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0">Suggest me!</p>'}
                                </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="accordion-item">
                            <p class="accordion-header">
                                <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#anchor${index}" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="anchor">
                                Anchor Text
                                </button>
                            </p>
                            <div id="anchor${index}" class="accordion-collapse collapse show">
                                <div class="accordion-body text-start">
                                <div class="text-container">
                                    <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20">MAIN ANCHOR TEXT</p>
                                    <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${domainStorage['specs-main_anchor'][index-1]}</p>
                                </div>
                                <div class="text-container">
                                    <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20">VARIATION ANCHOR TEXT</p>
                                    ${domainStorage['anchorTextOption'][index-1] !== 'suggest' ? getVariationList(domainStorage['specs-variation_anchor'][index-1]) : '<p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0">Suggest me!</p>'}
                                </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="accordion-item">
                                <p class="accordion-header">
                                    <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#keyMsg${index}" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="article">
                                        Key Message                                    </button>
                                </p>
                                <div id="keyMsg${index}" class="accordion-collapse collapse show">
                                    <div class="accordion-body text-start row-direction">
                                    <div class="text-container">
                                        <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20 text-uppercase">Words</p>
                                        <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">
                                             ${domainStorage['specs-key_message'][index-1]}
                                        </p>
                                    </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `

                        specBody.innerHTML = `
                            <div class="accordion" id="accordionPreview">
                                ${getBacklinkList(1)}
                                ${domainStorage['demand'] == 2 ? getBacklinkList(2) : ''}

                                <hr/>

                                <div class="accordion-item">
                                    <p class="accordion-header">
                                        <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#articleSpecs" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="article">
                                            Words                                        </button>
                                    </p>
                                    <div id="articleSpecs" class="accordion-collapse collapse show">
                                        <div class="accordion-body text-start row-direction">
                                        <div class="text-container">
                                            <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20 text-uppercase">Words</p>
                                            <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">
                                                ${domainStorage['articleSpecOption'] !== 'suggest' ? domainStorage['specs-word_count'] : '<p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0">Suggest me!</p>'}
                                            </p>
                                        </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>

                                <div class="accordion-item">
                                    <p class="accordion-header">
                                        <button class="accordion-button b1-400 b1-m-400" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#schedule" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="schedule">
                                            Backlink Schedule                                        </button>
                                    </p>
                                    <div id="schedule" class="accordion-collapse collapse show">
                                        <div class="accordion-body text-start row-direction">
                                        <div class="text-container">
                                            <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20">DATE</p>
                                            <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${domainStorage['date_range']}</p>
                                        </div>
                                        <div class="text-container">
                                            <p class="s-700 s-m-700 m-0 text-dark-20">TIME</p>
                                            <p class="b2-400 b2-m-400 m-0 text-dark-70">${domainStorage['time_range']}</p>
                                        </div>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        `
                        selectedDomainSpec.appendChild(specBody);
                    })["catch"](function(error) {
                        console.error(error);
                    });
                })
            })
        };

        $(".read-tnc").on("change", function() {
            if (this.checked) {
                $('.checkout-btn').prop('disabled', false);
            } else {
                $('.checkout-btn').prop('disabled', true);
            }
        })

        $("#aggre-tnc").on("click", function() {
            $(".read-tnc").prop("checked", true);
            $('.checkout-btn').prop('disabled', false);
        });

        const backlinkDomainCheckout = () => {
            $(".checkout-btn").prop("disabled", true)
            const selectedDomains = localStorage.getItem('selectedDomains').split(",")
            const selectedDomainDetails = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('domainDetail'))

            for (const key in selectedDomainDetails) {
                if (!selectedDomains.includes(key)) {
                    delete selectedDomainDetails[key];
                }
            }

            $.ajax({
                headers: {
                    'X-CSRF-TOKEN': $('meta[name="csrf-token"]').attr('content')
                },
                url: "https://cmlabs.co/api/backlink/invoice/payment",
                method: 'POST',
                data: {
                    commission: globalBacklinkPlacement.totalDomainPrice,
                    amount: globalBacklinkPlacement.totalFee,
                    domains: JSON.stringify(selectedDomainDetails),
                    email: "-",
                    lang: "en-id",
                },
                success: (response) => {
                    window.location.href = response;

                                            localStorage.removeItem("domainDetail")
                        localStorage.removeItem("selectedDomains")
                                    },
                error: (error) => {
                    $(".checkout-btn").prop("disabled", false)
                    console.error("Error:", error);
                    $("#toast-error").find(".message").html("An error occurred, please try again later")
                    $("#toast-error").show()
                    setTimeout(function() {
                        $("#toast-error").hide()
                    }, 3000);
                }
            });
        }
    </script>
    <script>
        function requestXendit(type, method) {
            fetch(`/page/payment/backlink`, {
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json",
                    "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                    "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content')
                },
                method: 'post',
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    amount: localStorage.totalFee,
                    type: type,
                    method: method
                })
            }).then(function(response) {
                return response.json();
            }).then(function(result) {
                const virtualAccountNumber = document.querySelector("#virtual-account-number");
                virtualAccountNumber.innerHTML = result.data.response.payment_method.virtual_account
                    .channel_properties.virtual_account_number;
            })["catch"](function(error) {
                console.log(error);
            });
        }
        // requestXendit()

        function submitOrder() {
            fetch(`/api/page/payment/callback`, {
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json",
                    "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                    "X-CSRF-TOKEN": document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]').getAttribute('content')
                },
                method: 'post',
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    fee: localStorage.totalFee,
                    order_detail: localStorage.domainDetail,
                    user_id: 1
                }),
            }).then(function(response) {
                localStorage.removeItem("domainDetail");
                localStorage.removeItem("totalFee");
                localStorage.removeItem("selectedDomains");
                return response.json();
            }).then(function(result) {
                // console.log(result)
            })["catch"](function(error) {
                console.log(error);
            });
        }
    </script>
        <script>
            const notifCards = document.querySelectorAll(".notif-card.notif")
            notifCards.forEach((notif) => {
                const closeBtn = notif.querySelector(".close-btn")
                const closedNotification = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("closedNotification")) ?? []

                if (closedNotification.includes(notif.getAttribute("data-id"))) {
                    notif.remove()
                }

                closeBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
                    const id = this.getAttribute("data-id")
                    const closedNotification = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("closedNotification")) ?? []

                    closedNotification.push(id)

                    localStorage.setItem("closedNotification", JSON.stringify(closedNotification))
                    notif.remove()
                })
            })

            setTimeout(() => {
                if (document.querySelectorAll(".notif-card.notif").length === 0) {
                    document.querySelector(".btn-float-notif.open").classList.remove("active")
                    $(".notification-new").addClass('d-none')
                } else {
                    $(".notif-card.empty").remove()
                }
            }, 500);
        </script>

        <script>
            const Notifcard = document.querySelector(".cards-container.notifications");
            const Feedbackcard = document.querySelector(".cards-container.survey");

            const btnNotif = document.querySelector(".btn-float-notif");
            const btnNotifClose = document.querySelector(".btn-float-notif.close");

            const btnFeedback = document.querySelector(".btn-float-feedback");
            const btnFeedbackClose = document.querySelector(".btn-float-feedback.close");
            const iconFeedbackClose = document.querySelector("#closeFeedback");

            const notifContainer = document.querySelector(".cards-container-wrapper");

            const showNotifCard = () => {
                Notifcard.classList.remove("d-none");
                setTimeout(() => {
                    Notifcard.classList.remove("hide");
                }, 10);
                setTimeout(() => {
                    notifContainer.style.overflow = "auto"
                }, 800);
                btnNotif.style.display = "none";
                btnNotifClose.style.display = "flex";
                notifContainer.style.overflow = "hidden"
            }

            const hideNotifCard = () => {
                localStorage.setItem("isClosedNotification", "true")
                setTimeout(() => {
                    Notifcard.classList.add("d-none");
                }, 500);
                Notifcard.classList.add("hide");
                btnNotifClose.style.display = "none";
                btnNotif.style.display = "flex";
                notifContainer.style.overflow = "hidden"
            }

            const showFeedbackCard = () => {
                Feedbackcard.classList.remove("d-none");
                setTimeout(() => {
                    Feedbackcard.classList.remove("hide");
                }, 10);
                btnFeedback.style.display = "none";
                btnFeedbackClose.style.display = "flex";
            }

            const hideFeedbackCard = () => {
                setTimeout(() => {
                    Feedbackcard.classList.add("d-none");
                }, 500);
                Feedbackcard.classList.add("hide");
                btnFeedbackClose.style.display = "none";
                btnFeedback.style.display = "flex";
            }

            btnNotif?.addEventListener("click", () => {
                if (btnFeedback) {
                    Feedbackcard.classList.add("d-none");
                    Feedbackcard.classList.add("hide");
                    btnFeedbackClose.style.display = "none";
                    btnFeedback.style.display = "flex";
                }
                showNotifCard()
            });

            btnFeedback?.addEventListener("click", () => {
                if (btnNotif) {
                    Notifcard.classList.add("d-none");
                    Notifcard.classList.add("hide");
                    btnNotifClose.style.display = "none";
                    btnNotif.style.display = "flex";
                }
                showFeedbackCard()
            });

            btnFeedbackClose?.addEventListener("click", hideFeedbackCard);
            iconFeedbackClose?.addEventListener("click", hideFeedbackCard);
            btnNotifClose?.addEventListener("click", hideNotifCard);

            const isAlreadyClose = localStorage.getItem("isClosedNotification");
            const isNotFilledByUser = false;
            const isClosedByUser = false;

            if (isAlreadyClose !== "true") {
                showNotifCard();
            }

            if (Notifcard) {
                Notifcard?.classList.add("d-none");
                Notifcard?.classList.add("hide");
                btnNotifClose.style.display = "none";
                btnNotif.style.display = "flex";
            }

            if (Feedbackcard) {
                Feedbackcard?.classList.add("d-none");
                Feedbackcard?.classList.add("hide");
                btnFeedbackClose.style.display = "none";
                btnFeedback.style.display = "flex";
            }

            if (isNotFilledByUser && isClosedByUser) {
                $("#toggle-satisfaction").removeClass('d-none')
            } else {
                $("#toggle-satisfaction").addClass('d-none')
            }
        </script>

        
        <script>
            var storedData = localStorage.getItem('lastFilledUserSatisfaction');

            if (storedData) {
                var parsedData = JSON.parse(storedData);

                if (Date.now() > parsedData.expiration) {
                    localStorage.removeItem('lastFilledUserSatisfaction');
                } else {
                    document.querySelectorAll(".user-satisfaction").forEach((item) => {
                        item?.remove()
                    })
                    $(".no-survey").removeClass('d-none')
                    $(".survey-new").addClass('d-none')
                }
            }
        </script>
        <script>
        function convertAndFillUSD() {
            const USD_EXCHANGE_RATE = document.getElementById("usd-idr-footer").value;

            const priceElements = document.querySelectorAll('.update-cost');

            priceElements.forEach(priceElement => {
                const idrValue = parseFloat(priceElement.getAttribute('data-cost'));
                const usdValue = (idrValue / USD_EXCHANGE_RATE);

                const formattedUSDValue = usdValue.toFixed(2);
                const usdValueWithoutDecimal = usdValue === Math.floor(usdValue) ? Math.floor(usdValue) :
                    formattedUSDValue;

                if ("id" == "id") {
                    priceElement.textContent = priceElement.getAttribute("data-id");
                } else {
                    var usdPrice = priceElement.getAttribute("data-usd")
                    if (usdPrice != "-") {
                        priceElement.textContent = usdPrice;
                    } else {
                        priceElement.textContent = "USD " + usdValueWithoutDecimal;
                    }
                }
            });
        }

        async function fetchExchangeRate() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://currency-exchange.p.rapidapi.com/exchange?from=USD&to=IDR&q=1', {
                    method: 'GET',
                    headers: {
                        'X-RapidAPI-Key': '77fe18d216mshbe7bb1d4de0b02ap1553e1jsnb8c5add91843',
                        'X-RapidAPI-Host': 'currency-exchange.p.rapidapi.com'
                    }
                });
                const result = await response.text();
                document.getElementById("usd-idr-footer").value = result

                convertAndFillUSD()
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(error);
            }
        }

        fetchExchangeRate();
    </script>
    <script>
        $(document).ready(function() {
            var filterModal = $('#filterModal');

            function adjustModal() {
                if (window.innerWidth >= 768) {
                    filterModal.removeClass('modal');
                    filterModal.removeClass('fade');
                    $("#filterBody").removeClass('modal-body')
                    $("#filterContent").addClass('m-0')
                    $("#filterContent").addClass('h-100')
                    filterModal.show();
                } else {
                    filterModal.addClass('modal');
                    filterModal.addClass('fade');
                    $("#filterBody").addClass('modal-body')
                    $("#filterContent").removeClass('h-100')
                    $("#filterContent").removeClass('m-0')
                }
            }

            adjustModal();

            $(window).on('resize', function() {
                adjustModal();
            });
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        let categoryIds = [];
        let topicIds = [];
        let domainData = [];

        // Add checked category values
        $('.domain-category:checked').each(function() {
            categoryIds.push($(this).val());
        });

        // Add checked topic values
        $('.domain-topic:checked').each(function() {
            topicIds.push($(this).val());
        });

        const handleCheckboxChangeBacklink = (checkbox, name, selected) => {
            const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${name}"]`);
            if (checkbox.value === "all") {
                checkboxes.forEach(otherCheckbox => {
                    if (otherCheckbox !== checkbox) {
                        otherCheckbox.checked = checkbox.checked;
                        if (checkbox.checked && !selected.includes(otherCheckbox.value)) {
                            selected.push(otherCheckbox.value);
                        } else if (!checkbox.checked) {
                            selected.splice(selected.indexOf(otherCheckbox.value), 1);
                        }
                    }
                });
            } else {
                if (!checkbox.checked) {
                    selected.splice(selected.indexOf(checkbox.value), 1);
                } else if (!selected.includes(checkbox.value)) {
                    selected.push(checkbox.value);
                }

                document.querySelector(`input[name="${name}"][value="all"]`).checked = checkboxes.length ===
                    selected.length;
            }

            fetchingData();
        }

        const addCheckboxListenersBacklink = (name, selected) => {
            const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${name}"]`);
            checkboxes.forEach(checkbox => {
                checkbox.addEventListener('change', () => {
                    handleCheckboxChangeBacklink(checkbox, name, selected);
                });
            });
        }

        // Function to get the value of a numeric input field
        function getNumericInputValue(fieldName) {
            const val = document.querySelector(`input[name="${fieldName}"]`).value
            if (val === "") return ""

            return parseFloat(val);
        }

        // Function to get the value of the Spam Score operator
        function getSpamScoreOperator() {
            return document.querySelector('.form-select').value;
        }

        // Function to get the Spam Score value
        function getSpamScoreValue() {
            const val = document.querySelector('#moz-spamScore').value
            if (val === "") return ""

            return parseInt(val);
        }

        // Function to filter data based on the specified criteria
        function filterData() {
            const tfStart = getNumericInputValue('tf-start');
            const tfEnd = getNumericInputValue('tf-end');
            const cfStart = getNumericInputValue('cf-start');
            const cfEnd = getNumericInputValue('cf-end');
            const dauStart = getNumericInputValue('dau-start');
            const dauEnd = getNumericInputValue('dau-end');
            const pauStart = getNumericInputValue('pau-start');
            const pauEnd = getNumericInputValue('pau-end');
            const ahrefDRStart = getNumericInputValue('dr-start');
            const ahrefDREnd = getNumericInputValue('dr-end');
            const ahrefURStart = getNumericInputValue('ahref-ur-start');
            const ahrefUREnd = getNumericInputValue('ahref-ur-end');

            const spamScoreOperator = getSpamScoreOperator();
            const spamScoreValue = getSpamScoreValue();

            const filteredData = domainData.domains.filter(item => {
                return (
                    (tfStart === "" || (parseFloat(item.score.majesticScore.tf) >= tfStart && parseFloat(item
                        .score.majesticScore.tf) <= tfEnd)) &&
                    (cfStart === "" || (parseFloat(item.score.majesticScore.cf) >= cfStart && parseFloat(item
                        .score.majesticScore.cf) <= cfEnd)) &&
                    (dauStart === "" || (parseFloat(item.score.moz.domainAuthority) >= dauStart && parseFloat(
                        item.score.moz.domainAuthority) <= dauEnd)) &&
                    (pauStart === "" || (parseFloat(item.score.moz.pageAuthority) >= pauStart && parseFloat(item
                        .score.moz.pageAuthority) <= pauEnd)) &&
                    (ahrefDRStart === "" || (parseFloat(item.score.aHrefsScore.dr) >= ahrefDRStart &&
                        parseFloat(item.score.aHrefsScore.dr) <= ahrefDREnd)) &&
                    (ahrefURStart === "" || (parseFloat(item.score.aHrefsScore.ur) >= ahrefURStart &&
                        parseFloat(item.score.aHrefsScore.ur) <= ahrefUREnd)) &&
                    (spamScoreOperator === "" || spamScoreValue === "" || evaluateSpamScore(parseFloat(item
                        .score.moz.spamScore), spamScoreOperator, spamScoreValue))
                );
            });

            return {
                domains: filteredData,
                totalDomains: filteredData.length
            };
        }

        // Function to evaluate Spam Score
        function evaluateSpamScore(itemSpamScore, operator, value) {
            switch (operator) {
                case '>':
                    return itemSpamScore > value;
                case '>=':
                    return itemSpamScore >= value;
                case '<':
                    return itemSpamScore < value;
                case '<=':
                    return itemSpamScore <= value;
                case '=':
                    return itemSpamScore === value;
                default:
                    return true;
            }
        }

        // add listener to checkbox filter catagory and domain
        addCheckboxListenersBacklink("domain-topic", topicIds);
        addCheckboxListenersBacklink("domain-category", categoryIds);

        // Event listener for filtering button click
        $(".score-filter-button").on("click", function() {
            const filteredData = filterData();
            if (filteredData.totalDomains > 0) {
                loadData(filteredData);
            } else {
                showEmptyDomain();
            }

            $("#resetButton").removeClass("d-none")
        });

        $("#resetButton").on("click", function() {
            $(".score-filter").val("")

            if (domainData.totalDomains > 0) {
                loadData(domainData);
            } else {
                showEmptyDomain();
            }

            $("#resetButton").addClass("d-none")
        });
    </script>
    <script defer="" src="/assets/scripts/header-resources.js?id=a43020063125b293203ad9295ebb19ae"></script>
    <script defer="" src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/jquery-throttle-debounce/1.1/jquery.ba-throttle-debounce.min.js">
    </script>
    <script src="https://pagination.js.org/dist/2.6.0/pagination.min.js"></script>
    <script defer="" src="/assets/scripts/header-industries.js?id=ed60bd0a8a54c70e9dcbfbd37de91219"></script>
    <script>
        const detailNav = $(".nav-detail")
        const otherBtn = $(".other-buttons")
        $("#menu-detail-btn").on("click", function() {
            detailNav.removeClass("hide")
            setTimeout(() => {
                otherBtn.addClass("show")
            }, 10);
        })
        $("#back-nav-btn").on("click", function() {
            detailNav.addClass("hide")
            otherBtn.removeClass("show")
        })
    </script>
        <script>
        const FeedbackcardMiddle = document.querySelector("#middleFeedback");
        const iconFeedbackCloseMiddle = document.querySelector("#closeFeedbackMiddle");
        const leftToggle = document.querySelector(".btn-float-feedback-toggle");
        const windowWidth = window.innerWidth;
        const feedBackBtn = document.querySelector("#survey-modal-btn")

        const hideFeedbackCardMiddle = () => {
            FeedbackcardMiddle.remove();
            leftToggle?.classList.remove("d-none");
            satisfactionChecked();
            if (feedBackBtn)
                feedBackBtn.classList.add('survey-modal-btn-right')
        }

        iconFeedbackCloseMiddle?.addEventListener("click", hideFeedbackCardMiddle);

        if (innerWidth <= 991) {
            leftToggle?.classList.remove("d-none")
        }

        if (FeedbackcardMiddle)
            hideFeedbackCardMiddle()
    </script>
    <script>
        const getListCompliances = () => {
            fetch("https://cmlabs.co/api/en-id/service-compliances-lists", {
                    method: "GET",
                    headers: {
                        "Content-Type": "application/json",
                        "Accept": "application/json, text-plain, */*",
                    }
                })
                .then(function(response) {
                    if (!response.ok) {
                        throw new Error("Network response was not ok");
                    }
                    return response.json();
                })
                .then(function(response) {
                    const list = response.data
                    const container = document.getElementById('compliance-container')

                    list.forEach(item => {
                        container.innerHTML += `
                        <li class="footer-list"><a
                            class="text-dark-70 footer-link"
                            href="https://cmlabs.co/${item.language}-${item.region}/company/${item.slug}">${item.title}</a>
                        </li>
                    `;
                    });
                })
                .catch(function(error) {
                    console.error("Fetch error:", error);
                });
        }


        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            const floatingButtonContainer = document.querySelector('.mobile-menu');
            const floatingButtonContainerDesktop = document.querySelector('.floating-notification-section');
            const hiddFloatingMenu = document.querySelector('.hide-footer');
            const formTitle = document.getElementById('form-title');

            getListCompliances()

            function toggleFloatingButton() {
                const scrollPosition = window.scrollY;
                const hideFloatingMenuTop = hiddFloatingMenu.getBoundingClientRect().top +
                    scrollPosition - 100;
                const formTitleTop = formTitle.getBoundingClientRect().top + scrollPosition - 100;

                if (scrollPosition + window.innerHeight - 300 >= hideFloatingMenuTop) {
                    floatingButtonContainer.classList.add('d-none');
                    floatingButtonContainerDesktop.classList.add('d-none');
                } else {
                    floatingButtonContainer?.classList.remove('d-none');
                    floatingButtonContainerDesktop?.classList.remove('d-none');
                }
            }

            toggleFloatingButton();

            window.addEventListener('scroll', toggleFloatingButton);
        });
    </script>
    <script>
        // Create cookie
        function setCookie(cname, cvalue, exdays) {
            const d = new Date();
            d.setTime(d.getTime() + (exdays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
            let expires = "expires=" + d.toUTCString();
            document.cookie = cname + "=" + cvalue + ";" + expires + ";path=/";
        }

        // Delete cookie
        function deleteCookie(cname) {
            const d = new Date();
            d.setTime(d.getTime() + (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
            let expires = "expires=" + d.toUTCString();
            document.cookie = cname + "=;" + expires + ";path=/";
        }

        // Read cookie
        function getCookie(cname) {
            let name = cname + "=";
            let decodedCookie = decodeURIComponent(document.cookie);
            let ca = decodedCookie.split(';');
            for (let i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
                let c = ca[i];
                while (c.charAt(0) == ' ') {
                    c = c.substring(1);
                }
                if (c.indexOf(name) == 0) {
                    return c.substring(name.length, c.length);
                }
            }
            return "";
        }

        function acceptCookieConsent() {
            deleteCookie('user_cookie_consent');
            setCookie('user_cookie_consent', 1, 30);
            document.getElementById("cookiesConsentCard").remove();
        }

        (function() {
            const menu = document.getElementById("navbar-logo")
            const notif = document.getElementById("cookiesConsentCard")
            const dissmissBtn = document.querySelector("#cookiesConsentCard .reject-button")
            const confirmButton = document.querySelector("#cookiesConsentCard .confirm-button")

            Popper.createPopper(menu, notif, {
                placement: 'bottom-start',
                strategy: 'fixed',
                modifiers: [{
                        name: 'arrow',
                        options: {
                            padding: 12
                        },
                    },
                    {
                        name: 'offset',
                        options: {
                            offset: [0, 2],
                        },
                    },
                ],
            });

            dissmissBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
                notif.remove()
            })

            confirmButton.addEventListener("click", () => {
                acceptCookieConsent()
                notif.remove()
            })
        })()
    </script>
    <script>
        if (!getCookie('user_cookie_consent')) {
            const notif = document.getElementById("cookiesConsentCard")
            notif.classList.remove("d-none")
        }
    </script>
